1.name: Siphoning Impact
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants 100 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields.
1.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants 100 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields.

1.name: Assimilation Mastery
1.description: Regeneration Globe healing grants 50 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by 150%.
1.longDescription: Regeneration Globe healing grants 50 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by 150%.

1.name: Fury of the Swarm
1.description: After casting Ravage, Kerrigan's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds splashes for 100% damage around the target.
1.longDescription: After casting Ravage, Kerrigan's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds splashes for 100% damage around the target.

4.name: Ravaging Ferocity
4.description: Ravage grants Kerrigan 25% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
4.longDescription: Ravage grants Kerrigan 25% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

4.name: Kinetic Fulmination
4.description: Damaging an enemy increases the damage of Kerrigan's next Impaling Blades within 10 seconds by 10%, up to 100%.
4.longDescription: Damaging an enemy increases the damage of Kerrigan's next Impaling Blades within 10 seconds by 10%, up to 100%.

4.name: Psionic Pulse
4.description: Primal Grasp explodes a second time 2 seconds after its first explosion.
4.longDescription: Primal Grasp explodes a second time 2 seconds after its first explosion.

7.name: Queen of Blades
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Ravage by 4 seconds and increase its damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 100%.
7.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Ravage by 4 seconds and increase its damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 100%.

7.name: Boundless Fury
7.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants a charge of Ravage. Can only occur once every 12 seconds per Hero.
7.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants a charge of Ravage. Can only occur once every 12 seconds per Hero.

7.name: Bladed Momentum
7.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by 0.75 seconds.
7.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by 0.75 seconds.

10.name: Maelstrom
10.description: Deals 74 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.
10.longDescription: Deals 74 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.

10.name: Summon Ultralisk
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.

13.name: Psionic Barrier
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants 20 Spell Armor and 4% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20% Movement Speed.
13.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants 20 Spell Armor and 4% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20% Movement Speed.

13.name: Volatile Power
13.description: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by 10%, but reduce duration of Assimilation by 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by 10%, but reduce duration of Assimilation by 3 seconds.

13.name: Chrysalis
13.description: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with 650 (+4% per level) Health for 5 seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates 4% of her maximum Health per second.  Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.
13.longDescription: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with 650 (+4% per level) Health for 5 seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates 4% of her maximum Health per second.  Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.

16.name: Mounting Potency
16.description: Ravage grants 5% Spell Power for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
16.longDescription: Ravage grants 5% Spell Power for 5 seconds, up to 40%.

16.name: Painful Spikes
16.description: Enemies hit by Impaling Blades take an additional 60 (+4% per level) damage the next 6 times Kerrigan damages them within 5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Enemies hit by Impaling Blades take an additional 60 (+4% per level) damage the next 6 times Kerrigan damages them within 5 seconds.

16.name: Unbridled Energy
16.description: Damaging a Hero with a Heroic Ability grants 35% Spell Power for 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Damaging a Hero with a Heroic Ability grants 35% Spell Power for 4 seconds.

20.name: Omegastorm
20.description: Maelstrom's duration is increased by 0.4 seconds every time it damages a Hero.
20.longDescription: Maelstrom's duration is increased by 0.4 seconds every time it damages a Hero.

20.name: Torrasque
20.description: Increase the Health and Basic Attack damage of the Ultralisk by 20%. The Ultralisk morphs into an egg when it dies. If the egg isn't killed within 4 seconds, a new Ultralisk is born.
20.longDescription: Increase the Health and Basic Attack damage of the Ultralisk by 20%. The Ultralisk morphs into an egg when it dies. If the egg isn't killed within 4 seconds, a new Ultralisk is born.

20.name: Assimilation Blades
20.description: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by 2% for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
20.longDescription: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by 2% for 5 seconds, up to 40%.

20.name: Psionic Shift
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Generates 300% increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.
20.longDescription: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Generates 300% increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.

1.name: Olaf the Stout
1.description: Passive: Olaf gains 20% bonus maximum Health.  Every 5 seconds, Olaf gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
1.longDescription: Passive: Olaf gains 20% bonus maximum Health.  Every 5 seconds, Olaf gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges.

1.name: Spy Games
1.description: After standing still for 3 seconds, Erik gains Stealth and his Sight Radius is increased by 75%. The Stealth persists for 3 seconds after moving and once removed, Erik gains 75% bonus Basic Attack damage for 6 seconds.
1.longDescription: After standing still for 3 seconds, Erik gains Stealth and his Sight Radius is increased by 75%. The Stealth persists for 3 seconds after moving and once removed, Erik gains 75% bonus Basic Attack damage for 6 seconds.

1.name: Explosive Attacks
1.description: Baleog's Basic Attack splash damage against non-Heroes is no longer reduced by 50%.
1.longDescription: Baleog's Basic Attack splash damage against non-Heroes is no longer reduced by 50%.

1.name: Viking Bribery
1.description: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use 40 stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: 200.
1.longDescription: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use 40 stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: 200.

4.name: Pain Don't Hurt
4.description: Baleog's Basic Attacks and splash damage heal for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
4.longDescription: Baleog's Basic Attacks and splash damage heal for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing is doubled against Heroes.

4.name: Erik the Swift
4.description: Permanently increases Erik's base Movement Speed by 10%, and as long as Erik is moving he heals 34 (+4% per level) Health per second.
4.longDescription: Permanently increases Erik's base Movement Speed by 10%, and as long as Erik is moving he heals 34 (+4% per level) Health per second.

4.name: It's a Sabotage!
4.description: Erik's Basic Attacks against Structures light them on fire for 3 seconds, causing 225 (+4% per level) damage.
4.longDescription: Erik's Basic Attacks against Structures light them on fire for 3 seconds, causing 225 (+4% per level) damage.

4.name: Mercenary Lord
4.description: Friendly non-Boss Mercenaries near your Hero deal 50% more damage. Gain 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
4.longDescription: Friendly non-Boss Mercenaries near your Hero deal 50% more damage. Gain 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing the damage taken by 50%.

7.name: Baleog the Fierce
7.description: Increase Baleog's attack range by 2.5. While near Olaf and Erik, he becomes inspired by the power of teamwork and his Attack Speed is increased by 50%.
7.longDescription: Increase Baleog's attack range by 2.5. While near Olaf and Erik, he becomes inspired by the power of teamwork and his Attack Speed is increased by 50%.

7.name: Spin To Win!
7.description: Activate to have each Viking deal 85 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Deals 100% bonus damage to enemy Heroes.
7.longDescription: Activate to have each Viking deal 85 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Deals 100% bonus damage to enemy Heroes.

7.name: Norse Force!
7.description: All Vikings gain a 140 (+4% per level) to 308 (+4% per level) point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: All Vikings gain a 140 (+4% per level) to 308 (+4% per level) point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts 4 seconds.

10.name: Longboat Raid!
10.description: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for 128 (+4% per level) damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals 228 (+4% per level) damage in an area. The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for 1 second. Lasts 15 seconds.  Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.
10.longDescription: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for 128 (+4% per level) damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals 228 (+4% per level) damage in an area. The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for 1 second. Lasts 15 seconds.  Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.

10.name: Play Again!
10.description: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for 2 seconds.  Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.
10.longDescription: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for 2 seconds.  Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.

13.name: Hunka' Burning Olaf
13.description: Olaf deals 34 (+4% per level) damage every second to nearby enemies.
13.longDescription: Olaf deals 34 (+4% per level) damage every second to nearby enemies.

13.name: Jump!
13.description: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for 1.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for 1.5 seconds.

13.name: Nordic Attack Squad
13.description: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other two Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to 1.25% maximum Health to enemy Heroes.
13.longDescription: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other two Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to 1.25% maximum Health to enemy Heroes.

16.name: Large and In Charge
16.description: When Olaf charges enemies, they are stunned for 1 second.
16.longDescription: When Olaf charges enemies, they are stunned for 1 second.

16.name: Impatience Is a Virtue
16.description: Enemies damaged by a Viking's Basic Attack reduce the cooldown of all Viking Abilities by 0.3125 seconds.
16.longDescription: Enemies damaged by a Viking's Basic Attack reduce the cooldown of all Viking Abilities by 0.3125 seconds.

16.name: 64 KB Marathon
16.description: Activating Go Go Go! grants an additional 40% Movement Speed and breaks the Vikings out of Roots and Slows.
16.longDescription: Activating Go Go Go! grants an additional 40% Movement Speed and breaks the Vikings out of Roots and Slows.

16.name: Executioner
16.description: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.

20.name: Ragnarok 'n' Roll!
20.description: The Longboat can attack two targets at once and the range of its Mortar is increased by 100%. Reduce Longboat Raid!'s cooldown by 30 seconds.
20.longDescription: The Longboat can attack two targets at once and the range of its Mortar is increased by 100%. Reduce Longboat Raid!'s cooldown by 30 seconds.

20.name: Checkpoint Reached
20.description: 10 seconds after using Play Again!, any dead Vikings are revived and summoned again, and all are healed to full.
20.longDescription: 10 seconds after using Play Again!, any dead Vikings are revived and summoned again, and all are healed to full.

20.name: The Sequel!
20.description: Reduces the Lost Vikings's death timer by 50%.
20.longDescription: Reduces the Lost Vikings's death timer by 50%.

20.name: Fury of the Storm
20.description: Every 5 seconds, the next Basic Attack will deal an additional 41 (+4% per level) damage to the target, and 105 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters. Each Viking has their own cooldown.
20.longDescription: Every 5 seconds, the next Basic Attack will deal an additional 41 (+4% per level) damage to the target, and 105 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters. Each Viking has their own cooldown.

1.name: Pity the Frail
1.description: For every Hero hit with Searing Lash, lower the cooldown of Inquisition by 1.5 seconds. Allies below 30% Health receive 25% more healing from Whitemane.
1.longDescription: For every Hero hit with Searing Lash, lower the cooldown of Inquisition by 1.5 seconds. Allies below 30% Health receive 25% more healing from Whitemane.

1.name: Righteous Flame
1.description: Searing Lash deals 25% more damage to enemies. If the second strike hits an enemy Hero, they take an additional 25% damage and Whitemane gains 40% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
1.longDescription: Searing Lash deals 25% more damage to enemies. If the second strike hits an enemy Hero, they take an additional 25% damage and Whitemane gains 40% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

1.name: Inquisitor's Prayer
1.description: Repeatable Quest: Hit Heroes with Searing Lash. Repeatable Quest: Hit 3 Heroes with Basic Attacks.  Reward: Permanently increase Whitemane's maximum Health by 3 and Mana by 2. Heroes hit with the second strike of Searing Lash count as 2 hits.
1.longDescription: Repeatable Quest: Hit Heroes with Searing Lash. Repeatable Quest: Hit 3 Heroes with Basic Attacks.  Reward: Permanently increase Whitemane's maximum Health by 3 and Mana by 2. Heroes hit with the second strike of Searing Lash count as 2 hits.

4.name: Unwavering Faith
4.description: Increase Whitemane's Basic Attack range by 1.1. Whitemane gains 20% increased Basic Attack damage for each active Zeal buff.
4.longDescription: Increase Whitemane's Basic Attack range by 1.1. Whitemane gains 20% increased Basic Attack damage for each active Zeal buff.

4.name: Martyrdom
4.description: Desperate Plea's healing is increased by 30%. Increase this by an additional 10% for each active Zeal.
4.longDescription: Desperate Plea's healing is increased by 30%. Increase this by an additional 10% for each active Zeal.

4.name: Indulgence
4.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Increase this by an additional 5% for each active Zeal.
4.longDescription: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Increase this by an additional 5% for each active Zeal.

7.name: Zealous Spirit
7.description: Upon reaching 2 stacks of Desperation, Whitemane gains Zeal.
7.longDescription: Upon reaching 2 stacks of Desperation, Whitemane gains Zeal.

7.name: Saintly Greatstaff
7.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Searing Lash are marked for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 55 (+4% per level) Spell damage and remove the mark.
7.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Searing Lash are marked for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 55 (+4% per level) Spell damage and remove the mark.

7.name: Intercession
7.description: Activate to make an ally Unstoppable for 1 second.
7.longDescription: Activate to make an ally Unstoppable for 1 second.

10.name: Scarlet Aegis
10.description: Bolster the spirits of nearby allied Heroes, healing them for 300 (+4% per level) and granting them 40 Armor for 4 seconds.
10.longDescription: Bolster the spirits of nearby allied Heroes, healing them for 300 (+4% per level) and granting them 40 Armor for 4 seconds.

10.name: Divine Reckoning
10.description: After 1 second, consecrate an area for 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies inside. 25% of the damage dealt to Heroes is returned as Mana.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, consecrate an area for 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies inside. 25% of the damage dealt to Heroes is returned as Mana.

13.name: Subjugation
13.description: Inquisition reduces all damage the target deals by 50%.
13.longDescription: Inquisition reduces all damage the target deals by 50%.

13.name: Lashing Out
13.description: If Searing Lash's second strike hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown to 1 second.
13.longDescription: If Searing Lash's second strike hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown to 1 second.

13.name: Scarlet Wrath
13.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the duration of all active Zeals by 0.75 seconds, restore 0.5% Mana to all Zeal targets, and lower the cooldown of Zeals activation by 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the duration of all active Zeals by 0.75 seconds, restore 0.5% Mana to all Zeal targets, and lower the cooldown of Zeals activation by 4 seconds.

16.name: Radiance
16.description: Reaching 3 stacks of Desperation heals for 175 (+4% per level) and reapplies Zeal to allies with Zeal.
16.longDescription: Reaching 3 stacks of Desperation heals for 175 (+4% per level) and reapplies Zeal to allies with Zeal.

16.name: Shared Punishment
16.description: Upon casting, Inquisition can chain to an additional enemy Hero near its target, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.5 seconds. Affected enemies lose 10 Armor.
16.longDescription: Upon casting, Inquisition can chain to an additional enemy Hero near its target, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.5 seconds. Affected enemies lose 10 Armor.

16.name: Harsh Discipline
16.description: Hitting a Hero with Searing Lash while they are being targeted by Inquisition Roots them for 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Inquisition's cooldown by 2 seconds.
16.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Searing Lash while they are being targeted by Inquisition Roots them for 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Inquisition's cooldown by 2 seconds.

20.name: Scarlet Crusade
20.description: Scarlet Aegis heals for 50% more and makes affected allies Unstoppable for 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Scarlet Aegis heals for 50% more and makes affected allies Unstoppable for 2 seconds.

20.name: Judgment Day
20.description: Divine Reckoning deals 50% more damage and pulls enemies to its center the first time it hits them.
20.longDescription: Divine Reckoning deals 50% more damage and pulls enemies to its center the first time it hits them.

20.name: Guiding Light
20.description: Activate to cast a permanent Zeal on an allied Hero that costs no Mana and doesn't grant Desperation. Only one can be active at a time and has global cast range.
20.longDescription: Activate to cast a permanent Zeal on an allied Hero that costs no Mana and doesn't grant Desperation. Only one can be active at a time and has global cast range.

20.name: Purge the Wicked
20.description: Activate to blast an enemy Hero with holy fire, reducing their Armor by 25 and dealing 300 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to blast an enemy Hero with holy fire, reducing their Armor by 25 and dealing 300 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds.

1.name: Backlash
1.description: When Bone Armor expires, nearby enemy Heroes take damage equal to 12% of their maximum Health.
1.longDescription: When Bone Armor expires, nearby enemy Heroes take damage equal to 12% of their maximum Health.

1.name: Shackler
1.description: While Bone Armor is active, nearby enemies are Slowed by 35% for 1 second. Basic Attacks against Heroes that are Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor by 2 seconds.
1.longDescription: While Bone Armor is active, nearby enemies are Slowed by 35% for 1 second. Basic Attacks against Heroes that are Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor by 2 seconds.

1.name: Shade
1.description: While Bone Armor is active, Xul evades all Basic Attacks, but increases the cooldown of Bone Armor by 10 seconds.
1.longDescription: While Bone Armor is active, Xul evades all Basic Attacks, but increases the cooldown of Bone Armor by 10 seconds.

4.name: Reaper's Toll
4.description: Reduce the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by 2 seconds and its Mana cost by 15.
4.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by 2 seconds and its Mana cost by 15.

4.name: Grim Scythe
4.description: Increase Xul's Basic Attack damage by 15%. Each enemy hit by Cursed Strikes reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 12 seconds.
4.longDescription: Increase Xul's Basic Attack damage by 15%. Each enemy hit by Cursed Strikes reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 12 seconds.

4.name: Jailors
4.description: Bone Prison spawns 2 Skeletal Warriors. These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.  Quest: Spawn 80 Skeletal Warriors.  Reward: While fixating on an enemy, Skeletal Warriors gain 25% Movement and Attack Speed.
4.longDescription: Bone Prison spawns 2 Skeletal Warriors. These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.  Quest: Spawn 80 Skeletal Warriors.  Reward: While fixating on an enemy, Skeletal Warriors gain 25% Movement and Attack Speed.

7.name: Harvest Vitality
7.description: Cursed Strikes heals for 70% of the damage dealt to Heroes.
7.longDescription: Cursed Strikes heals for 70% of the damage dealt to Heroes.

7.name: Trag'Oul's Essence
7.description: Every time a Skeletal Warrior attacks an enemy, restore 0.5% of Xul's maximum Health and 0.2% of his maximum Mana.
7.longDescription: Every time a Skeletal Warrior attacks an enemy, restore 0.5% of Xul's maximum Health and 0.2% of his maximum Mana.

7.name: Wall Of Bones
7.description: Increase the Shield amount of Bone Armor to 35% of Xul's maximum Health, and Xul gains 20 Spell Armor for its duration.
7.longDescription: Increase the Shield amount of Bone Armor to 35% of Xul's maximum Health, and Xul gains 20 Spell Armor for its duration.

10.name: Poison Nova
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal 630 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies hit over 10 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal 630 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies hit over 10 seconds.

10.name: Skeletal Mages
10.description: Vector Targeting Summon 4 Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for 47 (+4% per level) damage a second and Slow them by 30% for 2 seconds. Last up to 15 seconds.
10.longDescription: Vector Targeting Summon 4 Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for 47 (+4% per level) damage a second and Slow them by 30% for 2 seconds. Last up to 15 seconds.

13.name: Echoes of Death
13.description: Spectral Scythe spawns 2 additional scythes next to the first after 1.5 seconds, dealing 40% damage.
13.longDescription: Spectral Scythe spawns 2 additional scythes next to the first after 1.5 seconds, dealing 40% damage.

13.name: Rapid Harvest
13.description: Gain 5% Attack Speed for 3 seconds each time Cursed Strikes hits an enemy, up to 75%.
13.longDescription: Gain 5% Attack Speed for 3 seconds each time Cursed Strikes hits an enemy, up to 75%.

13.name: Amplify Damage
13.description: Increase the Root duration of Bone Prison by 0.25 seconds. Enemies Rooted by Bone Prison lose 25 Armor for 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase the Root duration of Bone Prison by 0.25 seconds. Enemies Rooted by Bone Prison lose 25 Armor for 2 seconds.

16.name: Decrepify
16.description: Enemy Heroes that are damaged by Spectral Scythe or Skeletal Warriors are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes that are damaged by Spectral Scythe or Skeletal Warriors are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds.

16.name: Weaken
16.description: Enemy Heroes who are damaged by Cursed Strikes or Skeletal Warriors deal 35% less damage for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes who are damaged by Cursed Strikes or Skeletal Warriors deal 35% less damage for 3 seconds.

16.name: Bone Spear
16.description: Deal 230 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line.
16.longDescription: Deal 230 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line.

20.name: Andariel's Visage
20.description: Poison Nova heals for 50% of the damage dealt and its duration is increased by 50%.
20.longDescription: Poison Nova heals for 50% of the damage dealt and its duration is increased by 50%.

20.name: Cold Hand of Death
20.description: Increase the Slow of Frost Mages by 20%.  Every 5th Spectral Scythe that hits enemy Heroes spawns a Frost Mage instead of a Skeletal Warrior at their location.
20.longDescription: Increase the Slow of Frost Mages by 20%.  Every 5th Spectral Scythe that hits enemy Heroes spawns a Frost Mage instead of a Skeletal Warrior at their location.

20.name: Mortal Wound
20.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Spectral Scythe receive 75% less healing for 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Spectral Scythe receive 75% less healing for 4 seconds.

20.name: Kalan's Edict
20.description: Each time Skeletal Warriors deal damage, reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor and Xul's Heroic Ability by 1.5%.
20.longDescription: Each time Skeletal Warriors deal damage, reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor and Xul's Heroic Ability by 1.5%.

1.name: Immolation
1.description: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for 22 (+4% per level) damage a second for 4 seconds.
1.longDescription: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for 22 (+4% per level) damage a second for 4 seconds.

1.name: Battered Assault
1.description: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from 3 to 5 seconds. If Sweeping Strike hits 2 Heroes its damage bonus is increased from 35% to 125%.
1.longDescription: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from 3 to 5 seconds. If Sweeping Strike hits 2 Heroes its damage bonus is increased from 35% to 125%.

1.name: Unending Hatred
1.description: Quest: Minion kills grant 0.2 Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant 1 Basic Attack Damage.  Reward: After gaining 20 increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional 20 Basic Attack Damage.
1.longDescription: Quest: Minion kills grant 0.2 Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant 1 Basic Attack Damage.  Reward: After gaining 20 increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional 20 Basic Attack Damage.

4.name: Reflexive Block
4.description: Using Dive grants 75 Physical Armor against the next 3 Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
4.longDescription: Using Dive grants 75 Physical Armor against the next 3 Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.

4.name: Thirsting Blade
4.description: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from 30% to 50% while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.
4.longDescription: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from 30% to 50% while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.

4.name: Hunter's Onslaught
4.description: Basic Abilities heal for 35% of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.
4.longDescription: Basic Abilities heal for 35% of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.

7.name: Rapid Chase
7.description: Dive grants 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.
7.longDescription: Dive grants 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.

7.name: Friend or Foe
7.description: Increases the range of Dive by 20% and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.
7.longDescription: Increases the range of Dive by 20% and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.

7.name: Unbound
7.description: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes with Sweeping Strike, gain a second charge.
7.longDescription: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes with Sweeping Strike, gain a second charge.

10.name: Metamorphosis
10.description: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 (+4% per level) damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 (+4% per level) for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.
10.longDescription: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 (+4% per level) damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 (+4% per level) for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.

10.name: The Hunt
10.description: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 (+4% per level) damage on impact and stunning for 1 second.
10.longDescription: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 (+4% per level) damage on impact and stunning for 1 second.

13.name: Nimble Defender
13.description: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain 25 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.
13.longDescription: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain 25 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.

13.name: Elusive Strike
13.description: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by 3 seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.
13.longDescription: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by 3 seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.

13.name: Sixth Sense
13.description: While active, Evasion grants Illidan 75 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 75%.
13.longDescription: While active, Evasion grants Illidan 75 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 75%.

16.name: Marked for Death
16.description: Dive deals an extra 180 (+4% per level) damage if used consecutively on a target within 10 seconds.
16.longDescription: Dive deals an extra 180 (+4% per level) damage if used consecutively on a target within 10 seconds.

16.name: Fiery Brand
16.description: Every 3rd attack against the same Hero deals an additional 7% of their maximum Health as damage.
16.longDescription: Every 3rd attack against the same Hero deals an additional 7% of their maximum Health as damage.

16.name: Blades of Azzinoth
16.description: Hitting 5 Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by 75% for 8 seconds.
16.longDescription: Hitting 5 Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by 75% for 8 seconds.

20.name: Demonic Form
20.description: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by 20% and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by 50%. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.
20.longDescription: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by 20% and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by 50%. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.

20.name: Nowhere to Hide
20.description: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively reveals enemy Heroes below 25% Health anywhere on the Battleground.
20.longDescription: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively reveals enemy Heroes below 25% Health anywhere on the Battleground.

20.name: Nexus Blades
20.description: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.

20.name: Bolt of the Storm
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.
20.longDescription: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

1.name: Bonds of Justice
1.description: Quest: Each tether applied to a secondary target of Umbral Bind permanently increases Umbral Bind's pull damage by 15.  Reward: After applying 5 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's pull damage by 75.  Reward: After applying 10 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's cleave damage by 30%.
1.longDescription: Quest: Each tether applied to a secondary target of Umbral Bind permanently increases Umbral Bind's pull damage by 15.  Reward: After applying 5 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's pull damage by 75.  Reward: After applying 10 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's cleave damage by 30%.

1.name: Pursuit of Vengeance
1.description: Each Hero tethered by Umbral Bind reduces the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance by 2.5 seconds and each Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance reduces the cooldown of Umbral Bind by 1 second.
1.longDescription: Each Hero tethered by Umbral Bind reduces the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance by 2.5 seconds. Each Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance reduces the cooldown of Umbral Bind by 1 second.

1.name: Naisha's Memento
1.description: Activate to make primary Basic Attacks bounce between nearby enemies up to 2 times. Lasts 8 seconds.  Recharge Naisha's Memento by hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.
1.longDescription: Activate to make primary Basic Attacks bounce between nearby enemies up to 2 times. Lasts 8 seconds.  Recharge Naisha's Memento by hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.

4.name: Pin Down
4.description: Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.  Reward: Increase Fan of Knives damage by 35%.  Reward: Each additional time 3 enemy Heroes are hit by a single Fan of Knives, gain an additional 5% damage, up to 50%.  Reward: Hit 4 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives to instantly gain all Rewards.
4.longDescription: Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.  Reward: Increase Fan of Knives damage by 35%.  Reward: Each additional time 3 enemy Heroes are hit by a single Fan of Knives, gain an additional 5% damage, up to 50%.  Reward: Hit 4 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives to instantly gain all Rewards.

4.name: Blade Dance
4.description: Using Fan of Knives deals 50 (+4% per level) Physical Damage to enemies around Maiev.
4.longDescription: Using Fan of Knives deals 50 (+4% per level) Physical Damage to enemies around Maiev.

4.name: Sudden Vengeance
4.description: After blinking with Spirit of Vengeance, the shadow explodes, damaging all nearby enemy Heroes for 6% of their maximum Health.
4.longDescription: After blinking with Spirit of Vengeance, the shadow explodes, damaging all nearby enemy Heroes for 6% of their maximum Health.

7.name: Elune's Wrath
7.description: Hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives causes the next Fan of Knives to drop a star on targets that deals 77 (+4% per level) damage when it impacts.
7.longDescription: Hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives causes the next Fan of Knives to drop a star on targets that deals 77 (+4% per level) damage when it impacts.

7.name: Bonds of Corruption
7.description: Enemy Heroes pulled by Umbral Bind have their Armor reduced by 15 and are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds
7.longDescription: Enemy Heroes pulled by Umbral Bind have their Armor reduced by 15 and are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds

7.name: Ruthless Spirit
7.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance increases all damage Maiev deals by 15% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 30%.
7.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance increases all damage Maiev deals by 15% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 30%.

10.name: Containment Disc
10.description: Throw a glaive in the target direction. If an enemy Hero is hit, Containment Disc can be reactivated to remove their vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds. Leaving Containment Silences the enemy Hero for 1.5 seconds.  Containment Disc automatically activates 6 seconds after hitting a Hero.
10.longDescription: Throw a glaive in the target direction. If an enemy Hero is hit, Containment Disc can be reactivated to remove their vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds. Leaving Containment Silences the enemy Hero for 1.5 seconds.  Containment Disc automatically activates 6 seconds after hitting a Hero.

10.name: Warden's Cage
10.description: Summon 8 Warden Avatars as a cage around Maiev. After 1.5 seconds, enemy Heroes that come in contact with an Avatar consume it and are knocked to the center of the cage. Warden Avatars last 5 seconds.
10.longDescription: Summon 8 Warden Avatars as a cage around Maiev. After 1.5 seconds, enemy Heroes that come in contact with an Avatar consume it and are knocked to the center of the cage. Warden Avatars last 5 seconds.

13.name: Bladed Armor
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Fan of Knives grants 5 Armor for 5 seconds, up to 20 Armor.
13.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Fan of Knives grants 5 Armor for 5 seconds, up to 20 Armor.

13.name: Chain Gang
13.description: Tethering at least 2 enemy Heroes with Umbral Bind grants 35 Armor for 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Tethering at least 2 enemy Heroes with Umbral Bind grants 35 Armor for 4 seconds.

13.name: Shadow Armor
13.description: Blink grants 20 Armor for 3.5 seconds. Maiev's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes refresh this duration.
13.longDescription: Blink grants 20 Armor for 3.5 seconds. Maiev's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes refresh this duration.

16.name: Vengeful Knives
16.description: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Fan of Knives that hits enemy Heroes to deal 1% maximum Health as bonus damage, up to 5%.
16.longDescription: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Fan of Knives that hits enemy Heroes to deal 1% maximum Health as bonus damage, up to 5%.

16.name: Cruel Chain
16.description: Umbral Bind grants 25% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds. In addition, each time Maiev deals damage to tethered targets, Umbral Bind's pull damage to all targets is increased by 30%, up to 150%.
16.longDescription: Umbral Bind grants 25% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds. In addition, each time Maiev deals damage to tethered targets, Umbral Bind's pull damage to all targets is increased by 30%, up to 150%.

16.name: Armored Assault
16.description: While Maiev has positive Armor of any kind, all Physical Damage dealt is increased by 25%.
16.longDescription: While Maiev has positive Armor of any kind, all Physical Damage dealt is increased by 25%.

20.name: Shadow Orb: Vengeance
20.description: Activate to reset the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance.  Recharge Shadow Orb by damaging enemy Heroes with Spirit of Vengeance 5 times.
20.longDescription: Activate to reset the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance.  Recharge Shadow Orb by damaging enemy Heroes with Spirit of Vengeance 5 times.

20.name: Shadow Orb: Huntress
20.description: Activate to increase Movement Speed and Attack Speed by 40% for 5 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Physical Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
20.longDescription: Activate to increase Movement Speed and Attack Speed by 40% for 5 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Physical Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.

20.name: Shadow Orb: Shadow Strike
20.description: Activate to deal 75 (+4% per level) damage to an enemy Hero, Slowing them by 30% and reducing their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Spell Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
20.longDescription: Activate to deal 75 (+4% per level) damage to an enemy Hero, Slowing them by 30% and reducing their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Spell Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.

1.name: Full Metal
1.description: D.Va's Mech gains 10% increased Health and its Fusion Cannons heal for 16% of the damage dealt to enemies in its bonus area.
1.longDescription: D.Va's Mech gains 10% increased Health and its Fusion Cannons heal for 16% of the damage dealt to enemies in its bonus area.

1.name: Pro Moves
1.description: D.Va's Mech gains 2% Movement Speed and 2 Armor every time it takes damage, stacking up to 15 times. Stacks of this effect decay every 0.5 seconds.  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes in Pilot Mode reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by 1 additional second.
1.longDescription: D.Va's Mech gains 2% Movement Speed and 2 Armor every time it takes damage, stacking up to 15 times. Stacks of this effect decay every 0.5 seconds.  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes in Pilot Mode reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by 1 additional second.

1.name: Liquid Cooling
1.description: Activate to gain the effects of Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode.  Passive: While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to 50 seconds and its effects last 50% longer.
1.longDescription: Activate to gain the effects of Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode.  Passive: While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to 50 seconds and its effects last 50% longer.

4.name: Rush-down
4.description: Boosters deals an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes and heals D.Va's Mech for the damage dealt. Boosters deals 50% increased damage to non-Heroic enemies.
4.longDescription: Boosters deals an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes and heals D.Va's Mech for the damage dealt. Boosters deals 50% increased damage to non-Heroic enemies.

4.name: Aggression Matrix
4.description: Enemy Heroes within your Defense Matrix receive 35% less healing.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Defense Matrix by 0.1875 seconds.
4.longDescription: Enemy Heroes within your Defense Matrix receive 35% less healing.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Defense Matrix by 0.1875 seconds.

4.name: Nuclear Option
4.description: Hitting your self-destructing Mech with Big Shot causes it to self-destruct 40% faster.  Passive: When Fusion Cannons deal bonus damage to an enemy Hero, gain 0.25 Self-Destruct Charge.
4.longDescription: Hitting your self-destructing Mech with Big Shot causes it to self-destruct 40% faster.  Passive: When Fusion Cannons deal bonus damage to an enemy Hero, gain 0.25 Self-Destruct Charge.

7.name: Get On The Point!
7.description: Casting Boosters grants nearby allies 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.  Passive: If D.Va has not taken damage in the last 2 seconds, Boosters' cooldown refreshes 100% faster.
7.longDescription: Casting Boosters grants nearby allies 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.  Passive: If D.Va has not taken damage in the last 2 seconds, Boosters' cooldown refreshes 100% faster.

7.name: Hit The Nitrous
7.description: The initial speed bonus of Boosters is increased to 300%, then decays to normal boost speed over 0.5 seconds. During this time, Boosters Stuns for 0.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: The initial speed bonus of Boosters is increased to 300%, then decays to normal boost speed over 0.5 seconds. During this time, Boosters Stuns for 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Fusion Generator
7.description: Every time an enemy Hero deals damage while inside Defense Matrix, D.Va's Self-Destruct Charge increases by 1%. Max of 20% Charge gained per use.  Passive: While at full Self-Destruct charge, Fusion Cannons' bonus damage is increased to 100%.
7.longDescription: Every time an enemy Hero deals damage while inside Defense Matrix, D.Va's Self-Destruct Charge increases by 1%. Max of 20% Charge gained per use.  Passive: While at full Self-Destruct charge, Fusion Cannons' bonus damage is increased to 100%.

10.name: Bunny Hop
10.description: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every 0.5 seconds, dealing 78 (+4% per level) damage in a large area. Every 4th consecutive hit on a Hero deals 80% more damage and Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.  Lasts for 4 seconds.  Requires Mech Mode.
10.longDescription: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every 0.5 seconds, dealing 78 (+4% per level) damage in a large area. Every 4th consecutive hit on a Hero deals 80% more damage and Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.  Lasts for 4 seconds.  Requires Mech Mode.

10.name: Micro Missiles
10.description: After .375 seconds, Channel to launch a volley of 12 missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing 40 (+4% per level) damage in a small area and Slowing by 30% for 2 seconds.  Stores 2 charges with a 3 second cooldown between each use.  Requires Mech Mode.
10.longDescription: After .375 seconds, Channel to launch a volley of 12 missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing 40 (+4% per level) damage in a small area and Slowing by 30% for 2 seconds.  Stores 2 charges with a 3 second cooldown between each use.  Requires Mech Mode.

13.name: Target Locked
13.description: Enemy Heroes that remain in your Defense Matrix for 0.75 seconds have their Armor reduced by 15 and their Movement Speed reduced by 25% for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Enemy Heroes that remain in your Defense Matrix for 0.75 seconds have their Armor reduced by 15 and their Movement Speed reduced by 25% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Good To Go
13.description: Pilot Mode: Unlocks the Torpedo Dash and Concussive Pulse abilities.  Torpedo Dash: Dash a short distance. 10 second cooldown.  Concussive Pulse: Deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a cone and knock them back. 10 second cooldown.
13.longDescription: Pilot Mode: Unlocks the Torpedo Dash and Concussive Pulse abilities.  Torpedo Dash: Dash a short distance. 10 second cooldown.  Concussive Pulse: Deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a cone and knock them back. 10 second cooldown.

13.name: Pew! Pew! Pew!
13.description: Pilot Mode: Instead of a single shot, Big Shot fires 3 shots over 0.5 seconds. Each shot deals 75% damage.
13.longDescription: Pilot Mode: Instead of a single shot, Big Shot fires 3 shots over 0.5 seconds. Each shot deals 75% damage.

16.name: In For The Kill
16.description: Casting Boosters grants a Shield equal to 10% of maximum life for 2.5 seconds. Each Enemy Hero hit by Boosters increases D.Va's Mech's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
16.longDescription: Casting Boosters grants a Shield equal to 10% of maximum life for 2.5 seconds. Each Enemy Hero hit by Boosters increases D.Va's Mech's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

16.name: Diverting Power
16.description: Defense Matrix's area grows drastically in size and each time it reduces damage dealt to Heroes D.Va's Mech is healed for 31 (+4% per level) Health.
16.longDescription: Defense Matrix's area grows drastically in size and each time it reduces damage dealt to Heroes D.Va's Mech is healed for 31 (+4% per level) Health.

16.name: Emergency Shielding
16.description: When D.Va's Mech would be destroyed, it instead gains a Shield that absorbs 290 (+4% per level) damage over 8 seconds.  This effect has a 30 second cooldown.
16.longDescription: When D.Va's Mech would be destroyed, it instead gains a Shield that absorbs 290 (+4% per level) damage over 8 seconds.  This effect has a 30 second cooldown.

20.name: Stop and Pop
20.description: Increase Bunny Hop's duration by 4 seconds, and it does not decay while D.Va's Mech is stationary.
20.longDescription: Increase Bunny Hop's duration by 4 seconds, and it does not decay while D.Va's Mech is stationary.

20.name: Timing Attack
20.description: Micro Missiles gains an additional charge. Each time Micro Missiles hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds and charge cooldown by 0.25 seconds.
20.longDescription: Micro Missiles gains an additional charge. Each time Micro Missiles hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds and charge cooldown by 0.25 seconds.

20.name: Headshot!
20.description: Pilot Mode: Increase Big Shot's damage by 75% and reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Pilot Mode: Increase Big Shot's damage by 75% and reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds.

20.name: Ablative Armor
20.description: 45% of Spell damage dealt to D.Va's Mech is returned as healing over 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: 45% of Spell damage dealt to D.Va's Mech is returned as healing over 4 seconds.

1.name: Zealous Glare
1.description: Shield Glare gains 1 additional charge, and deals 70% more damage.
1.longDescription: Shield Glare gains 1 additional charge, and deals 70% more damage.

1.name: Divine Fortress
1.description: Basic Attacks grant 10 Physical Armor for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus maximum Health. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.
1.longDescription: Basic Attacks grant 10 Physical Armor for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus maximum Health. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.

1.name: Laws of Hope
1.description: Activate to heal 20% of Johanna's max Health over 5 seconds.  Quest: Every 10 Regeneration Globes gathered increases this heal amount by 5% of Johanna's max Health.
1.longDescription: Activate to heal 20% of Johanna's max Health over 5 seconds.  Quest: Every 10 Regeneration Globes gathered increases this heal amount by 5% of Johanna's max Health.

4.name: Subdue
4.description: Hitting 2 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish increases the Slow to 70% and the Slow amount does not decay.  Quest: Hit 4 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish.  Reward: Punish always Slows by 70%.
4.longDescription: Hitting 2 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish increases the Slow to 70% and the Slow amount does not decay.  Quest: Hit 4 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish.  Reward: Punish always Slows by 70%.

4.name: Eternal Retaliation
4.description: Mark enemies hit by Condemn for 10 seconds. Johanna's next Basic Attack against them removes the mark, lowering the cooldown of Condemn by 1 second, refunding 10 Mana, and killing Minions.
4.longDescription: Mark enemies hit by Condemn for 10 seconds. Johanna's next Basic Attack against them removes the mark, lowering the cooldown of Condemn by 1 second, refunding 10 Mana, and killing Minions.

4.name: Hold Your Ground
4.description: Increases Iron Skin's Shield by 40% and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
4.longDescription: Increases Iron Skin's Shield by 40% and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

7.name: Sins Exposed
7.description: Punish reduces healing received by 35% for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them refresh this duration.
7.longDescription: Punish reduces healing received by 35% for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them refresh this duration.

7.name: Conviction
7.description: Gain 10% Movement Speed, increased to 20% while Condemn is charging up.
7.longDescription: Gain 10% Movement Speed, increased to 20% while Condemn is charging up.

7.name: Steed Charge
7.description: Activate to instantly Mount for 4 seconds, unhindered by damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Iron Skin by 2 second.
7.longDescription: Activate to instantly Mount for 4 seconds, unhindered by damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Iron Skin by 2 second.

10.name: Falling Sword
10.description: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.
10.longDescription: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.

10.name: Blessed Shield
10.description: Deal 114 (+4% per level) damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
10.longDescription: Deal 114 (+4% per level) damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.

13.name: Roar
13.description: Increase Punish's damage by 50%. This bonus is increased to 150% whenever Punish hits 2 or more Heroes.
13.longDescription: Increase Punish's damage by 50%. This bonus is increased to 150% whenever Punish hits 2 or more Heroes.

13.name: Holy Fury
13.description: Deal 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Each Hero hit by Condemn increases this damage by 40% for 5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Deal 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Each Hero hit by Condemn increases this damage by 40% for 5 seconds.

13.name: Blessed Hammer
13.description: Activate to create 2 hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing 65 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduce the cooldown of this Ability by 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Every 3rd Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a hammer.
13.longDescription: Activate to create 2 hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing 65 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduce the cooldown of this Ability by 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Every 3rd Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a hammer.

16.name: Shrinking Vacuum
16.description: Condemn reduces enemy Heroes damage by 30% and Slows by 30% for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Condemn reduces enemy Heroes damage by 30% and Slows by 30% for 3 seconds.

16.name: Holy Renewal
16.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Shield Glare reduce its cooldown by 1 second and heals for 5% of Johanna's maximum Health.
16.longDescription: Hitting enemy Heroes with Shield Glare reduce its cooldown by 1 second and heals for 5% of Johanna's maximum Health.

16.name: Blessed Momentum
16.description: Basic Attacks grant 10% increased Attack Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40%. They also reduce Johanna's Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks grant 10% Attack Speed for 4 seconds (up to 40%) and lower the cooldown of all Basic Abilities by 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Heaven's Fury
20.description: Falling Sword rains down holy bolts, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemies, healing allied Heroes for 68 (+4% per level), and reducing its cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
20.longDescription: Falling Sword rains down holy bolts, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemies, healing allied Heroes for 68 (+4% per level), and reducing its cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.

20.name: Radiating Faith
20.description: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blessed Shield by 2. Its Stun duration is increased to 1.75 seconds and all targets hit are Stunned for the maximum duration.
20.longDescription: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blessed Shield by 2. Its Stun duration is increased to 1.75 seconds and all targets hit are Stunned for the maximum duration.

20.name: Indestructible
20.description: Upon taking fatal damage, Johanna gains a Shield equal to her maximum Health for 4 seconds. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.
20.longDescription: Upon taking fatal damage, Johanna gains a Shield equal to her maximum Health for 4 seconds. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.

20.name: Blinded By The Light
20.description: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 25% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.  Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 8 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 25% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.  Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 8 seconds.

1.name: Journeyman Cooking
1.description: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for 8% of maximum Health.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Ez-Thro Dynamite permanently increases your maximum Health by 10, to a maximum of 750 bonus Health.
1.longDescription: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for 8% of maximum Health.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Ez-Thro Dynamite permanently increases your maximum Health by 10, to a maximum of 750 bonus Health.

1.name: Bones to Gnaw
1.description: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain 10 Armor.
1.longDescription: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain 10 Armor.

1.name: On The Prowl
1.description: Activate to gain 30 Rage over 8 seconds.  Passive: You heal for 7 (+4% per level) Health every second, increased by 2% per point of Rage.
1.longDescription: Activate to gain 30 Rage over 8 seconds.  Passive: You heal for 7 (+4% per level) Health every second, increased by 2% per point of Rage.

4.name: Brute Force
4.description: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by 25% and its damage by 50%.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow permanently increases Basic Attack damage by 2, to a maximum of 150 bonus damage. Enemy Heroes that hit terrain grant an additional 6 damage.
4.longDescription: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by 25% and its damage by 50%.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow permanently increases Basic Attack damage by 2, to a maximum of 150 bonus damage. Enemy Heroes that hit terrain grant an additional 6 damage.

4.name: Aggro Range
4.description: Increase Hogg Wild's radius by 20% and each enemy hit generates 0.5 Rage, increased to 2 against Heroes.
4.longDescription: Increase Hogg Wild's radius by 20% and each enemy hit generates 0.5 Rage, increased to 2 against Heroes.

4.name: Hogger's Joggers
4.description: While above 30 Rage, gain 10% increased Movement Speed and healing received.  When at or above 50 Rage, increase these bonuses to 15%.
4.longDescription: While above 30 Rage, gain 10% increased Movement Speed and healing received.  When at or above 50 Rage, increase these bonuses to 15%.

7.name: Dense Blasting Powder
7.description: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite creates an additional dynamite behind the Hero hit.  Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into three sticks and launches them forward in an arc.
7.longDescription: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite creates an additional dynamite behind the Hero hit.  Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into three sticks and launches them forward in an arc.

7.name: Garbage Fire
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by 2 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take 23 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 20%.
7.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by 2 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take 23 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 20%.

7.name: Seeing Red
7.description: While above 50 Rage, gain 35% Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh 30% faster.
7.longDescription: While above 50 Rage, gain 35% Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh 30% faster.

10.name: Hoardapult
10.description: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds.  Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.
10.longDescription: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds.  Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.

10.name: Shockwave
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.

13.name: Dust Devil
13.description: Gain 25 Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for 4 seconds after. When at or above 50 Rage, increase this Armor to 40.
13.longDescription: Gain 25 Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for 4 seconds after. When at or above 50 Rage, increase this Armor to 40.

13.name: Pummel
13.description: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by 10% for 2 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.  Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by 30% for 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by 10% for 2 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.  Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by 30% for 2 seconds.

13.name: Bloodthirst
13.description: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow, or Hogg Wild heals you for 33% of the damage dealt.
13.longDescription: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow, or Hogg Wild heals you for 33% of the damage dealt.

16.name: Headbanger
16.description: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional 8% of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional 0.5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional 8% of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional 0.5 seconds.

16.name: Kablooie!
16.description: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal 50% more damage, reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and increase its Slow amount to 50%.  Passive: Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite's range by 25%.
16.longDescription: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal 50% more damage, reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and increase its Slow amount to 50%.  Passive: Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite's range by 25%.

16.name: Furzerker
16.description: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within 8 seconds by 50%, stacking up to 2 times.  When Hogg Wild ends, gain 30% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.
16.longDescription: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within 8 seconds by 50%, stacking up to 2 times.  When Hogg Wild ends, gain 30% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.

20.name: Secret Stash
20.description: Every 2 seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.  Every 5 seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.
20.longDescription: Every 2 seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.  Every 5 seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.

20.name: Power Spike
20.description: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and grants 20 Rage.  Passive: Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.
20.longDescription: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and grants 20 Rage.  Passive: Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.

20.name: No Control
20.description: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to 5 seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.  Cannot be cancelled.
20.longDescription: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to 5 seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.  Cannot be cancelled.

20.name: Anger Management
20.description: Increase maximum Rage by 50, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to 75% and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to 75%.  Passive: Basic Attacks grant 5 additional Rage.
20.longDescription: Increase maximum Rage by 50, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to 75% and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to 75%.  Passive: Basic Attacks grant 5 additional Rage.

1.name: Ranger
1.description: Sentinel width is increased by 25% and deals up to 250% more damage based on distance traveled.
1.longDescription: Sentinel width is increased by 25% and deals up to 250% more damage based on distance traveled.

1.name: Moonlit Arrows
1.description: Basic Attacks decrease the cooldown of Light of Elune by an additional 0.5 seconds.
1.longDescription: Basic Attacks decrease the cooldown of Light of Elune by an additional 0.5 seconds.

1.name: Trueshot Aura
1.description: Activate to grant Tyrande and nearby allied Heroes 40% increased Attack Damage for 5 seconds, and to reset the cooldown of Hunter's Mark.
1.longDescription: Activate to grant Tyrande and nearby allied Heroes 40% increased Attack Damage for 5 seconds, and to reset the cooldown of Hunter's Mark.

4.name: Everlasting Light
4.description: If Light of Elune's second charge is cast on a different target from the first, it heals for 80% more.
4.longDescription: If Light of Elune's second charge is cast on a different target from the first, it heals for 80% more.

4.name: Mark of Mending
4.description: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against Marked targets heal other allied Heroes near the enemy for 4% of their maximum Health.
4.longDescription: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against Marked targets heal other allied Heroes near the enemy for 4% of their maximum Health.

4.name: Elune's Chosen
4.description: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for 175% of the damage dealt. Lasts for 8 seconds.
4.longDescription: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for 175% of the damage dealt. Lasts for 8 seconds.

7.name: Elune's Gift
7.description: Hitting an enemy hero with Lunar Flare grants 20% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
7.longDescription: Hitting an enemy hero with Lunar Flare grants 20% Spell Power for 10 seconds.

7.name: Kaldorei Resistance
7.description: Light of Elune grants the target 10 Spell Armor for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 2 times.
7.longDescription: Light of Elune grants the target 10 Spell Armor for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 2 times.

7.name: Huntress' Fury
7.description: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against targets with Hunter's Mark bounce to nearby enemy Heroes.  Passive: Increase Hunter's Mark duration by 1 second, and its cast range by 25%.
7.longDescription: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against targets with Hunter's Mark bounce to nearby enemy Heroes.  Passive: Increase Hunter's Mark duration by 1 second, and its cast range by 25%.

10.name: Shadowstalk
10.description: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 (+4% per level) Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
10.longDescription: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 (+4% per level) Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

10.name: Starfall
10.description: Deal 92 (+4% per level) damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.
10.longDescription: Deal 92 (+4% per level) damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.

13.name: Quickening Blessing
13.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Light of Elune increases the target's Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Light of Elune increases the target's Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Harsh Moonlight
13.description: Sentinel Slows enemies hit by 35% and reduces their damage dealt by 35% for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Sentinel Slows enemies hit by 35% and reduces their damage dealt by 35% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Ranger's Mark
13.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hunter's Mark by 2 second. Basic Attacks against marked targets reduce the cooldown of Lunar Flare by 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hunter's Mark by 2 second. Basic Attacks against marked targets reduce the cooldown of Lunar Flare by 4 seconds.

16.name: Celestial Attunement
16.description: Light of Elune removes Stuns, Silences, and Slows from its target.
16.longDescription: Light of Elune removes Stuns, Silences, and Slows from its target.

16.name: Empower
16.description: Reduce Sentinel's cooldown by 3 seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel takes bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.
16.longDescription: Reduce Sentinel's cooldown by 3 seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel takes bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.

16.name: Darnassian Archery
16.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant a stacking 12% increased Attack Damage bonus for 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant a stacking 12% increased Attack Damage bonus for 4 seconds.

20.name: Eyes of the Huntress
20.description: Shadowstalk reveals all enemy Heroes for 10 seconds and heals for 75% more.
20.longDescription: Shadowstalk reveals all enemy Heroes for 10 seconds and heals for 75% more.

20.name: Celestial Wrath
20.description: Increase the Slow of Starfall to 60% and cause it to apply Hunter's Mark to enemy Heroes while inside of its area of effect.
20.longDescription: Increase the Slow of Starfall to 60% and cause it to apply Hunter's Mark to enemy Heroes while inside of its area of effect.

20.name: Commander of Sentinels
20.description: Sentinel gains a 2nd charge.
20.longDescription: Sentinel gains a 2nd charge.

20.name: Iceblade Arrows
20.description: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce their damage dealt by 8% for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
20.longDescription: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce their damage dealt by 8% for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

1.name: One-Two Punch
1.description: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by 1 second and it gains an additional charge.
1.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by 1 second and it gains an additional charge.

1.name: Parting Gift
1.description: Recall leaves behind 6 bombs that deal 240 (+4% per level) damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are Slowed by 50% for 0.75 seconds and grant 7% Pulse Bomb charge.
1.longDescription: Recall leaves behind 6 bombs that deal 240 (+4% per level) damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are Slowed by 50% for 0.75 seconds and grant 7% Pulse Bomb charge.

1.name: Tracer Rounds
1.description: Increase Basic Attack range by 10%. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for 3 seconds.
1.longDescription: Increase Basic Attack range by 10%. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for 3 seconds.

4.name: Leeching Rounds
4.description: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to 200%, based on the amount of health Tracer is missing.
4.longDescription: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to 200%, based on the amount of health Tracer is missing.

4.name: Pulse Generator
4.description: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for 12% of her maximum Health over 1.5 seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.
4.longDescription: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for 12% of her maximum Health over 1.5 seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.

4.name: Is That a Health Pack?!
4.description: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for 15% of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 15 seconds.  Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for 20% of Tracer's maximum Health.
4.longDescription: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for 15% of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 15 seconds.  Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for 20% of Tracer's maximum Health.

7.name: Sleight of Hand
7.description: Reduces Reload time by 50%. This equals 20% more damage per second.
7.longDescription: Reduces Reload time by 50%. This equals 20% more damage per second.

7.name: Focus Fire
7.description: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy within 2 seconds, the last bullet will deal 80 (+4% per level) bonus damage. This is equal to 35% of the total magazine.
7.longDescription: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy within 2 seconds, the last bullet will deal 80 (+4% per level) bonus damage. This is equal to 35% of the total magazine.

7.name: Locked and Loaded
7.description: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.
7.longDescription: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.

10.name: Sticky Bomb
10.description: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by 50% and enemies hit are Slowed by 70% for 3 seconds.
10.longDescription: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by 50% and enemies hit are Slowed by 70% for 3 seconds.

10.name: Quantum Spike
10.description: Pulse Bomb deals an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.
10.longDescription: Pulse Bomb deals an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.

10.name: Pulse Rounds
10.description: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by 100%.
10.longDescription: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by 100%.

13.name: Untouchable
13.description: Passive: After Blinking, gain 20% Movement Speed for 1.25 seconds.  Quest: Takedowns increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 5%, up to 25%. These bonuses are lost on death.
13.longDescription: Passive: After Blinking, gain 20% Movement Speed for 1.25 seconds.  Quest: Takedowns increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 5%, up to 25%. These bonuses are lost on death.

13.name: Jumper
13.description: Passive: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown refreshes 100% faster.  Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health for 3 seconds. This Shield stacks up to 3 times.
13.longDescription: Passive: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown refreshes 100% faster.  Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health for 3 seconds. This Shield stacks up to 3 times.

13.name: Telefrag
13.description: Passive: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by 0.1875 seconds.  When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for 1 second and nearby enemies take 175 (+4% per level) damage and are knocked back.
13.longDescription: Passive: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by 0.1875 seconds.  When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for 1 second and nearby enemies take 175 (+4% per level) damage and are knocked back.

16.name: Bullet Spray
16.description: Increases the radius of Melee by 30%, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.
16.longDescription: Increases the radius of Melee by 30%, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.

16.name: Heavy Handed
16.description: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.

16.name: Ricochet
16.description: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a 60% chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.
16.longDescription: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a 60% chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.

20.name: Chrono Triggers
20.description: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for 1 second.
20.longDescription: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for 1 second.

20.name: Get Stuffed!
20.description: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from 10% to 20%. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.
20.longDescription: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from 10% to 20%. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.

20.name: Total Recall
20.description: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.
20.longDescription: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.

20.name: Composition B
20.description: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals 50% damage and explodes slightly earlier.
20.longDescription: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals 50% damage and explodes slightly earlier.

1.name: Death's Reach
1.description: Increase Wraith Strike's range by 35%.
1.longDescription: Increase Wraith Strike's range by 35%.

1.name: On a Pale Horse
1.description: Gain an additional 20% Movement Speed while mounted.
1.longDescription: Gain an additional 20% Movement Speed while mounted.

1.name: Fear the Reaper
1.description: Activate to increase Movement Speed by 25% and pass through other units for 4 seconds.
1.longDescription: Activate to increase Movement Speed by 25% and pass through other units for 4 seconds.

4.name: Die Alone
4.description: Soul Rip deals 50% more damage to Heroes if it hits only one Hero.
4.longDescription: Soul Rip deals 50% more damage to Heroes if it hits only one Hero.

4.name: Throwing Shade
4.description: Increase Death Shroud's range by 33%, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and reduce its Mana cost from 50 to 30.  Death Shroud's initial impact deals 2% maximum Health as damage to non-Structure enemies.
4.longDescription: Increase Death Shroud's range by 33%, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and reduce its Mana cost from 50 to 30.  Death Shroud's initial impact deals 2% maximum Health as damage to non-Structure enemies.

4.name: Black Harvest
4.description: Quest: Apply Reaper's Mark to Heroes for a total of 150 seconds.  Reward: Permanently increase Reaper's Mark's duration by 2 seconds.
