4.longDescription: Quest: Apply Reaper's Mark to Heroes for a total of 150 seconds.  Reward: Permanently increase Reaper's Mark's duration by 2 seconds.

7.name: Cold Hand
7.description: Soul Rip Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Soul Rip Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds.

7.name: Massacre
7.description: Wraith Strike now damages and applies Reaper's Mark to enemies around its target.
7.longDescription: Wraith Strike now damages and applies Reaper's Mark to enemies around its target.

7.name: Touch of Death
7.description: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by Reaper's Mark by 50% for 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by Reaper's Mark by 50% for 4 seconds.

10.name: Tormented Souls
10.description: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies for 4 seconds.  Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.
10.longDescription: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies for 4 seconds.  Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.

10.name: Last Rites
10.description: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.  Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.
10.longDescription: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.  Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.

13.name: Soul Siphon
13.description: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to 4.75% of the Hero's maximum Health.
13.longDescription: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to 4.75% of the Hero's maximum Health.

13.name: Ethereal Existence
13.description: Gain 10 Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by Reaper's Mark, up to a maximum of 30.
13.longDescription: Gain 10 Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by Reaper's Mark, up to a maximum of 30.

13.name: Inevitable End
13.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds, but remove all active Reaper's Marks.
13.longDescription: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds, but remove all active Reaper's Marks.

13.name: Shroud of Wisdom
13.description: After 2 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: After 2 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.

16.name: Soul Collector
16.description: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by 0.5 seconds and increase its range by 25%.
16.longDescription: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by 0.5 seconds and increase its range by 25%.

16.name: Mortality
16.description: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to 8% of the Hero's maximum Health.
16.longDescription: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to 8% of the Hero's maximum Health.

16.name: Memento Mori
16.description: Reaper's Mark deals 60% increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Reaper's Mark deals 60% increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than 4 seconds.

20.name: Reaper of Souls
20.description: Increase the duration of Tormented Souls to 6 seconds, and while Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh its duration.  If 2 or more enemy Heroes are in Tormented Souls' radius, it does not decay.
20.longDescription: Increase the duration of Tormented Souls to 6 seconds, and while Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh its duration.  If 2 or more enemy Heroes are in Tormented Souls' radius, it does not decay.

20.name: Angel of Death
20.description: Last Rites heals for 100% of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.
20.longDescription: Last Rites heals for 100% of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.

20.name: Final Curtain
20.description: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for 4 seconds, applying Reaper's Mark to enemies in its area.
20.longDescription: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for 4 seconds, applying Reaper's Mark to enemies in its area.

20.name: No One Can Stop Death
20.description: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by 25%.
20.longDescription: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by 25%.

1.name: Echo Pulse
1.description: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius 1.25 seconds after reaching its target, dealing 100% damage on the return trip.
1.longDescription: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius 1.25 seconds after reaching its target, dealing 100% damage on the return trip.

1.name: Warp Resonance
1.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Warp Rift explosions.  Reward: After hitting 8 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, increase the explosion damage by 120.  Reward: After hitting 16 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, Warp Rift gains 1 additional charge.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit Heroes with Warp Rift explosions.  Reward: After hitting 8 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, increase the explosion damage by 120.  Reward: After hitting 16 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, Warp Rift gains 1 additional charge.

1.name: Gather Minerals
1.description: Quest: Gather Minerals to increase the Health of Photon Cannons by 8, up to 560.  Reward: After collecting 70 Minerals, Photon Cannons deal 35% more damage.
1.longDescription: Quest: Gather Minerals to increase the Health of Photon Cannons by 8, up to 560.  Reward: After collecting 70 Minerals, Photon Cannons deal 35% more damage.

4.name: Photon Barrier
4.description: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains 40 Spell Armor.
4.longDescription: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains 40 Spell Armor.

4.name: Turbo Charged
4.description: Worker Rush grants an additional 10% passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds.
4.longDescription: Worker Rush grants an additional 10% passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds.

4.name: Shield Capacitor
4.description: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to 10% of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.
4.longDescription: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to 10% of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.

7.name: Particle Accelerator
7.description: After hitting 3 Heroes with Disruption Pulse, the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires 4 additional pulses that deal 78 (+5% per level) damage from the impact location in different directions.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: After hitting 3 Heroes with Disruption Pulse, the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires 4 additional pulses that deal 78 (+5% per level) damage from the impact location in different directions.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Rift Shock
7.description: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within 1 second of it arming deals 105 (+5% per level) damage over 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within 1 second of it arming deals 105 (+5% per level) damage over 3 seconds.

7.name: Tower Defense
7.description: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by 3.5 seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.
7.longDescription: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by 3.5 seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.

10.name: Pylon Overcharge
10.description: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for 96 (+4% per level) damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.
10.longDescription: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for 96 (+4% per level) damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.

10.name: Null Gate
10.description: Vector Targeting Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 (+4% per level) damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.
10.longDescription: Vector Targeting Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 (+4% per level) damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.

13.name: Aggressive Matrix
13.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 35% increased Attack Damage.
13.longDescription: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 35% increased Attack Damage.

13.name: Power Overflowing
13.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 10% increased Spell Power and 2 Mana per second.
13.longDescription: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 10% increased Spell Power and 2 Mana per second.

13.name: Shield Battery
13.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 28 (+4% per level) Shields per second, up to 112 (+4% per level). Shields persist for 2 seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.
13.longDescription: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 28 (+4% per level) Shields per second, up to 112 (+4% per level). Shields persist for 2 seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.

16.name: Quantum Entanglement
16.description: Enemies continue to be Slowed for 3 seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.
16.longDescription: Enemies continue to be Slowed for 3 seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.

16.name: Gravity Well
16.description: Enemies are Slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum slow of 60%.
16.longDescription: Enemies are Slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum slow of 60%.

16.name: Interference
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift explosions have their Spell Power reduced by 35% for 5 seconds. Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift explosions have their Spell Power reduced by 35% for 5 seconds. Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.

20.name: Construct Additional Pylons
20.description: Probius can now have up to 3 active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by 25%.
20.longDescription: Probius can now have up to 3 active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by 25%.

20.name: Gate Keeper
20.description: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.
20.longDescription: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.

20.name: Shoot 'Em Up
20.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a bonus 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a bonus 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Probius Loop
20.description: Whenever a Rift explosion hits 1 or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.
20.longDescription: Whenever a Rift explosion hits 1 or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.

1.name: Gathering Storm
1.description: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Hammerang. Restore 6 Mana for each Hero hit. Upon dying, Lose 8 stacks.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals 30% more damage.  Reward: After hitting 80 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 50% damage.  Mythic Reward: After hitting 150 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 70% damage.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Hammerang. Restore 6 Mana for each Hero hit. Upon dying, Lose 8 stacks.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals 30% more damage.  Reward: After hitting 80 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 50% damage.  Mythic Reward: After hitting 150 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 70% damage.

1.name: Dishonorable Discharge
1.description: Quest: Each Lightning Rod strike upon a Hero after the 3rd generates 1 stack. If a Hero dies under its effect, generate 2 stacks.  Reward: After 20 stacks, its damage is increased by 30%.  Reward: After 45 stacks, its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds and its damage is increased by an additional 75%.  Mythic Reward: After 75 stacks, its number of strikes is increased by 2 and the final strike Stuns for 1.25 seconds.
1.longDescription: Quest: Each Lightning Rod strike upon a Hero after the 3rd generates 1 stack. If a Hero dies under its effect, generate 2 stacks.  Reward: After 20 stacks, its damage is increased by 30%.  Reward: After 45 stacks, its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds and its damage is increased by an additional 75%.  Mythic Reward: After 75 stacks, its number of strikes is increased by 2 and the final strike Stuns for 1.25 seconds.

1.name: Frequent Flyer
1.description: Activate Frequent Flyer to gain 25% Attack Speed and Tailwind for 4 seconds.  Quest: Minion kills grant 1 stack. Hero Takedowns grant 5 stacks.  Reward: After 60 stacks, gain 20 Attack Damage.  Reward: After 150 stacks, gain 50 additional Attack Damage.  Mythic Reward: After 300 stacks, gain 125 additional Attack Damage.
1.longDescription: Activate Frequent Flyer to gain 25% Attack Speed and Tailwind for 4 seconds.  Quest: Minion kills grant 1 stack. Hero Takedowns grant 5 stacks.  Reward: After 60 stacks, gain 20 Attack Damage.  Reward: After 150 stacks, gain 50 additional Attack Damage.  Mythic Reward: After 300 stacks, gain 125 additional Attack Damage.

4.name: Static Shield
4.description: Lightning Rod strikes grant a Shield equal to 4% of Falstad's maximum Health, up to 28%, for 4 seconds.
4.longDescription: Lightning Rod strikes grant a Shield equal to 4% of Falstad's maximum Health, up to 28%, for 4 seconds.

4.name: Updraft
4.description: Increases Barrel Roll's range by 40% and Shield amount by 70%, and its Shield now lasts indefinitely.
4.longDescription: Increases Barrel Roll's range by 40% and Shield amount by 70%, and its Shield now lasts indefinitely.

4.name: Hammer Gains
4.description: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt to the primary target.
4.longDescription: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt to the primary target.

7.name: Secret Weapon
7.description: Increases Hammerang's range by 30% and Basic Attacks deal 75% bonus damage while Hammerang is in flight.
7.longDescription: Increases Hammerang's range by 30% and Basic Attacks deal 75% bonus damage while Hammerang is in flight.

7.name: BOOMerang
7.description: Hammerang's explosion deals 100% additional damage, and hitting enemy Heroes reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Hammerang's explosion deals 100% additional damage, and hitting enemy Heroes reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 3 seconds.

7.name: Thunderstrikes
7.description: Lightning Rod deals 25% more damage each subsequent strike.
7.longDescription: Lightning Rod deals 25% more damage each subsequent strike.

10.name: Hinterland Blast
10.description: After 1 second, deal 475 (+4.75% per level) damage to enemies within a long line. The cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds for every enemy Hero hit.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, deal 475 (+4.75% per level) damage to enemies within a long line. The cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds for every enemy Hero hit.

10.name: Mighty Gust
10.description: Push enemies away, and Slow them by 40%, decaying over 4 seconds.
10.longDescription: Push enemies away, and Slow them by 40%, decaying over 4 seconds.

13.name: Charged Up
13.description: Increases Lightning Rod range by 25%. Hero Takedowns reset Lightning Rod's cooldown.
13.longDescription: Increases Lightning Rod range by 25%. Hero Takedowns reset Lightning Rod's cooldown.

13.name: Flow Rider
13.description: While Tailwind is active, Falstad's Basic Abilities recharge 100% faster.
13.longDescription: While Tailwind is active, Falstad's Basic Abilities recharge 100% faster.

13.name: Sustained Winds
13.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1.5% of the Hero's maximum Health, increased to 2% while Tailwind is active.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1.5% of the Hero's maximum Health, increased to 2% while Tailwind is active.

16.name: Crippling Hammer
16.description: Increase Hammerang's Slow from 25% to 50%, and Hammerang's explosion also Slows.
16.longDescription: Increase Hammerang's Slow from 25% to 50%, and Hammerang's explosion also Slows.

16.name: Aerie Gusts
16.description: Reduces the activation time for Tailwind from 5 to 3 seconds, and increases the Movement Speed bonus from 15% to 25%.
16.longDescription: Reduces the activation time for Tailwind from 5 to 3 seconds, and increases the Movement Speed bonus from 15% to 25%.

16.name: Afterburner
16.description: Barrel Roll increases Movement Speed by 60%, decaying over 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Barrel Roll increases Movement Speed by 60%, decaying over 3 seconds.

20.name: Call of the Wildhammer
20.description: Hinterland Blast has double the range and deals 25% more damage.
20.longDescription: Hinterland Blast has double the range and deals 25% more damage.

20.name: Wind Tunnel
20.description: Mighty Gust creates a wind tunnel for 4 seconds. Enemies caught in the tunnel will periodically be pushed back.
20.longDescription: Mighty Gust creates a wind tunnel for 4 seconds. Enemies caught in the tunnel will periodically be pushed back.

20.name: Nexus Frenzy
20.description: Increases Attack Speed by 20% and Attack Range by 1.1.
20.longDescription: Increases Attack Speed by 20% and Attack Range by 1.1.

20.name: Epic Mount
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Flight by 50 seconds, reduce the cast time before flying to 0.5 seconds, and increase the speed by 50%.
20.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Flight by 50 seconds, reduce the cast time before flying to 0.5 seconds, and increase the speed by 50%.

1.name: Salvation
1.description: Increase the Shield amount Tyrael gains from Righteousness by 35% and heal Tyrael for 150 (+4% per level) Health if his Shield is destroyed. Does not increase the Shield amount gained by allies.
1.longDescription: Increase the Shield amount Tyrael gains from Righteousness by 35% and heal Tyrael for 150 (+4% per level) Health if his Shield is destroyed. Does not increase the Shield amount gained by allies.

1.name: Justice for All
1.description: Increase the Shield applied to allies by Righteousness to 80% of the Shield gained by Tyrael.
1.longDescription: Increase the Shield applied to allies by Righteousness to 80% of the Shield gained by Tyrael.

1.name: Ardent Restoration
1.description: Dealing damage to a Hero heals Tyrael for 20 (+4% per level) Health over 5 seconds. Dealing damage resets this timer, and the heal amount stacks up to 8 times.  Quest: Every Regeneration Globe gathered increases this heal amount by 1%.
1.longDescription: Dealing damage to a Hero heals Tyrael for 20 (+4% per level) Health over 5 seconds. Dealing damage resets this timer, and the heal amount stacks up to 8 times.  Quest: Every Regeneration Globe gathered increases this heal amount by 1%.

4.name: Stalwart Angel
4.description: Gain 25 Armor while El'druin's Might is active, and for 3 seconds after teleporting.
4.longDescription: Gain 25 Armor while El'druin's Might is active, and for 3 seconds after teleporting.

4.name: Reciprocate
4.description: When Tyrael's Shield from Righteousness expires or is destroyed, it deals 170 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Heroes and Summons.  For each enemy Hero damaged by Reciprocate or El'Druin's Might, Tyrael heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
4.longDescription: When Tyrael's Shield from Righteousness expires or is destroyed, it deals 170 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Heroes and Summons.  For each enemy Hero damaged by Reciprocate or El'Druin's Might, Tyrael heals for 3% of his maximum Health.

4.name: Divine Vigor
4.description: If Smite hits an enemy, Tyrael's Basic Attacks within the next 4 seconds heal for 70% of the damage dealt.
4.longDescription: If Smite hits an enemy, Tyrael's Basic Attacks within the next 4 seconds heal for 70% of the damage dealt.

7.name: Burning Halo
7.description: Both Tyrael and El'druin deal 12 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Teleporting increases this damage from Tyrael by 125% for 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Both Tyrael and El'druin deal 12 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Teleporting increases this damage from Tyrael by 125% for 2 seconds.

7.name: Purge Evil
7.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite increases Tyrael's Basic Attack damage by 60% for 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite increases Tyrael's Basic Attack damage by 60% for 4 seconds.

7.name: Swift Retribution
7.description: Smite grants 20% more Movement Speed and also grants 25% Attack Speed for 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Smite grants 20% more Movement Speed and also grants 25% Attack Speed for 2 seconds.

10.name: Judgment
10.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 (+4% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: Sanctification
10.description: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.

13.name: Sword of Justice
13.description: Upon teleporting using El'druin's Might, El'druin swaps places with Tyrael, and El'druin's Might can be reactivated to teleport an additional time.
13.longDescription: Upon teleporting using El'druin's Might, El'druin swaps places with Tyrael, and El'druin's Might can be reactivated to teleport an additional time.

13.name: Holy Ground
13.description: Create a ring for 3 seconds that blocks enemies from entering the area teleported to using El'druin's Might.
13.longDescription: Create a ring for 3 seconds that blocks enemies from entering the area teleported to using El'druin's Might.

13.name: Law and Order
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite reduces the cooldown of Righteousness by 1 second. Each allied Hero Shielded by Righteousness increases the damage of the next Smite by 35%.
13.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite reduces the cooldown of Righteousness by 1 second. Each allied Hero Shielded by Righteousness increases the damage of the next Smite by 35%.

16.name: Bound by Law
16.description: El'Druin's Might's Slow is increased to 65% for 1 second, decaying to 30% over the remaining duration.
16.longDescription: El'Druin's Might's Slow is increased to 65% for 1 second, decaying to 30% over the remaining duration.

16.name: Horadric Reforging
16.description: Tyrael's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of El'druin's Might by 2 seconds.
16.longDescription: Tyrael's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of El'druin's Might by 2 seconds.

16.name: Smite the Wicked
16.description: While El'druin's Might is active, and for 2 seconds after teleporting, Smite's cooldown recharges 125% faster.
16.longDescription: While El'druin's Might is active, and for 2 seconds after teleporting, Smite's cooldown recharges 125% faster.

20.name: Angel of Justice
20.description: Increases the cast range of Judgment by 50%, and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increases the cast range of Judgment by 50%, and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.

20.name: Holy Arena
20.description: Increase the duration of Sanctification by 1 second and increase the damage of allies inside by 25%.
20.longDescription: Increase the duration of Sanctification by 1 second and increase the damage of allies inside by 25%.

20.name: Seal of El'Druin
20.description: Using a Basic Ability grants 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
20.longDescription: Using a Basic Ability grants 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

20.name: Defense of the Angels
20.description: Activate to gain 50 Armor for 3 seconds.  Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by 0.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to gain 50 Armor for 3 seconds.  Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Aspect of Justice
20.description: After 1.25 seconds, gain the effects of Archangel's Wrath without dying. Cooldown is reduced by 15% for each enemy Hero hit by the explosion.
20.longDescription: After 1.25 seconds, gain the effects of Archangel's Wrath without dying. Cooldown is reduced by 15% for each enemy Hero hit by the explosion.

1.name: Increasing Clarity
1.description: Quest: Every time Sacred Sweep hits a Hero in the center, increase the center damage by 2, up to 50.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, this center damage bonus is increased to 180.
1.longDescription: Quest: Every time Sacred Sweep hits a Hero in the center, increase the center damage by 2, up to 50.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, this center damage bonus is increased to 180.

1.name: Righteous Assault
1.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sacred Sweep by 3 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by its center.
1.longDescription: Reduces the cooldown of Sacred Sweep by 3 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by its center.

1.name: Searing Light
1.description: Ray of Heaven also deals damage to enemy Heroes in the area equal to 30% of the energy consumed.
1.longDescription: Ray of Heaven also deals damage to enemy Heroes in the area equal to 30% of the energy consumed.

4.name: Majestic Span
4.description: Increases the radius of Sacred Sweep by 15%.
4.longDescription: Increases the radius of Sacred Sweep by 15%.

4.name: Heavy Burden
4.description: Detainment Strike Slows enemy Heroes by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Slow amount and duration doubled on enemies it Stuns.  Passive: Increase Detainment Strikes' Stun duration by 0.25 seconds.
4.longDescription: Detainment Strike Slows enemy Heroes by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Slow amount and duration doubled on enemies it Stuns.  Passive: Increase Detainment Strikes' Stun duration by 0.25 seconds.

4.name: Repeated Offense
4.description: Enemies hit by Detainment Strike are knocked back 30% farther.  Quest: Every time Detainment Strike stuns a Hero, increase the stun damage by 10, up to 60.  Reward: After stunning 6 Heroes, increase this damage bonus to 250.
4.longDescription: Enemies hit by Detainment Strike are knocked back 30% farther.  Quest: Every time Detainment Strike stuns a Hero, increase the stun damage by 10, up to 60.  Reward: After stunning 6 Heroes, increase this damage bonus to 250.

7.name: Glimmer of Hope
7.description: Collecting a Regeneration Globe reduces the cost of Auriel's next Ray of Heaven by 75%.
7.longDescription: Collecting a Regeneration Globe reduces the cost of Auriel's next Ray of Heaven by 75%.

7.name: Empathic Link
7.description: Auriel stores 25% of damage taken by allies with Bestow Hope.
7.longDescription: Auriel stores 25% of damage taken by allies with Bestow Hope.

7.name: Energized Cord
7.description: Increases the energy stored from Auriel's Basic Attacks to 130% of the damage against Heroes and 70% of the damage against non-Heroes.  Does not affect Auriel's Bestow Hope ally.  Passive: Increase Basic Attack Range by 1.1.
7.longDescription: Increases the energy stored from Auriel's Basic Attacks to 130% of the damage against Heroes and 70% of the damage against non-Heroes.  Does not affect Auriel's Bestow Hope ally.  Passive: Increase Basic Attack Range by 1.1.

10.name: Resurrect
10.description: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for 1 second. After a 3 second delay, they are brought back to life with 100% of their maximum Health at the location where they died.  Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.
10.longDescription: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for 1 second. After a 3 second delay, they are brought back to life with 100% of their maximum Health at the location where they died.  Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.

10.name: Crystal Aegis
10.description: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals 255 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.
10.longDescription: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals 255 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.

13.name: Blinding Flash
13.description: Enemies hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep are blinded for 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Enemies hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep are blinded for 2 seconds.

13.name: Converging Force
13.description: Enemies hit by the outer area are pushed slightly toward the center.
13.longDescription: Enemies hit by the outer area are pushed slightly toward the center.

13.name: Piercing Lash
13.description: Detainment Strike now pierces and hits all enemy Heroes in a line, reducing the cooldown by 2 seconds for each Hero hit.
13.longDescription: Detainment Strike now pierces and hits all enemy Heroes in a line, reducing the cooldown by 2 seconds for each Hero hit.

16.name: Reservoir of Hope
16.description: Quest: Each maximum energy Ray of Heaven Auriel casts increases the maximum amount of energy that can be stored by 55.
16.longDescription: Quest: Each maximum energy Ray of Heaven Auriel casts increases the maximum amount of energy that can be stored by 55.

16.name: Will of Heaven
16.description: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 20% Attack Speed.  Passive: Auriel gains 10% increased Basic Attack Damage.
16.longDescription: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 20% Attack Speed.  Passive: Auriel gains 10% increased Basic Attack Damage.

16.name: Wrath of Heaven
16.description: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 15% Spell Power.  Enemy Heroes hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep or the terrain collision of Detainment Strike have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 15% Spell Power.  Enemy Heroes hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep or the terrain collision of Detainment Strike have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 3 seconds.

20.name: Light Speed
20.description: Resurrected allies gain 200% increased Movement Speed, decaying over 4 seconds. While a resurrected ally remains alive, Resurrect's next cooldown recharges 100% faster.
20.longDescription: Resurrected allies gain 200% increased Movement Speed, decaying over 4 seconds. While a resurrected ally remains alive, Resurrect's next cooldown recharges 100% faster.

20.name: Diamond Resolve
20.description: When Crystal Aegis expires, it grants the target 75 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.
20.longDescription: When Crystal Aegis expires, it grants the target 75 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.

20.name: Angelic Flight
20.description: After 2 seconds, fly to a target location.
20.longDescription: After 2 seconds, fly to a target location.

20.name: Shield of Hope
20.description: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a shield for 3 seconds equal to 50% of the amount of Health they are missing.
20.longDescription: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a shield for 3 seconds equal to 50% of the amount of Health they are missing.

1.name: Quarterback
1.description: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by 10% and its range by 45%.
1.longDescription: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by 10% and its range by 45%.

1.name: Dash
1.description: Increase the range of Run and Gun by 50%. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
1.longDescription: Increase the range of Run and Gun by 50%. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Press the Advantage
1.description: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.
1.longDescription: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.

4.name: In the Rhythm
4.description: Quest: While Minigun is active, Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increase future Minigun durations by 0.03 seconds.
4.longDescription: Quest: While Minigun is active, Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increase future Minigun durations by 0.03 seconds.

4.name: The Bigger They Are...
4.description: Increase the damage bonus to 4% while enemy Heroes are above 30% Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below 30%.
4.longDescription: Increase the damage bonus to 4% while enemy Heroes are above 30% Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below 30%.

4.name: Master Assassin
4.description: Passive: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by 10%.  Reward: After getting 15 Takedowns, Tychus's Attack Speed is increased by an additional 15%.
4.longDescription: Passive: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by 10%.  Reward: After getting 15 Takedowns, Tychus's Attack Speed is increased by an additional 15%.

7.name: Melting Point
7.description: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional 75 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% against Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
7.longDescription: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional 75 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% against Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

7.name: Combat Tactician
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by 4 seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by an additional 4 seconds after using Run and Gun.
7.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by 4 seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by an additional 4 seconds after using Run and Gun.

7.name: Relentless Soldier
7.description: Being Stunned or Rooted grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.
7.longDescription: Being Stunned or Rooted grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.

10.name: Commandeer Odin
10.description: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.
10.longDescription: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.

10.name: Drakken Laser Drill
10.description: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 (+4% per level) damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.
10.longDescription: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 (+4% per level) damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.

13.name: Spray 'n' Pray
13.description: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by 25% and its range is increased by 25%.
13.longDescription: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by 25% and its range is increased by 25%.

13.name: That's the Stuff!
13.description: Minigun heals Tychus for 100% of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.
13.longDescription: Minigun heals Tychus for 100% of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.

13.name: Neosteel Coating
13.description: Activate to gain 75 Spell Armor for 4 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.
13.longDescription: Activate to gain 75 Spell Armor for 4 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.

16.name: Armor Piercing Rounds
16.description: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by 15%, stacking up to 60% bonus damage.
16.longDescription: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by 15%, stacking up to 60% bonus damage.

16.name: Titan Grenade
16.description: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their maximum Health. Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
16.longDescription: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their maximum Health. Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by 1 second.

16.name: Sizzlin' Attacks
16.description: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.

20.name: Big Red Button
20.description: Odin lasts 50% longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile which lands 2.5 seconds later, dealing 319 (+4% per level) damage in its area.
20.longDescription: Odin lasts 50% longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile which lands 2.5 seconds later, dealing 319 (+4% per level) damage in its area.

20.name: Focusing Diodes
20.description: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by 50%. Deals increasing damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to 100% additional damage.
20.longDescription: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by 50%. Deals increasing damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to 100% additional damage.

20.name: Can Do This All Day
20.description: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by 5 seconds. While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains 40 Armor.
20.longDescription: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by 5 seconds. While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains 40 Armor.

20.name: Bob and Weave
20.description: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain 2 additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from 50 to 25. After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.5 for 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain 2 additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from 50 to 25. After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.5 for 4 seconds.

1.name: Ambush
1.description: Gain Stealth when entering Siege Mode or after not taking or dealing damage for 3 seconds while in Siege Mode. Basic Attacks while Stealthed deal 125% more damage.  Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
1.longDescription: Gain Stealth when entering Siege Mode or after not taking or dealing damage for 3 seconds while in Siege Mode. Basic Attacks while Stealthed deal 125% more damage.  Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

1.name: Advanced Artillery
1.description: Increase Siege Mode's splash damage to 60% of Basic Attack damage, and increase its splash radius by 25%.
1.longDescription: Increase Siege Mode's splash damage to 60% of Basic Attack damage, and increase its splash radius by 25%.

1.name: Maelstrom Rounds
1.description: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage dealt by 30% for 5 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode reduces the cooldown of Maelstrom Rounds by 5 seconds.  Stores up to 3 charges.
1.longDescription: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage dealt by 30% for 5 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode reduces the cooldown of Maelstrom Rounds by 5 seconds.  Stores up to 3 charges.

4.name: Barricade
4.description: Reduce Concussive Blast's cooldown by 4 seconds, its Mana cost by 40, and when cast create an impassable wall in front of Sgt. Hammer for 4 seconds.
4.longDescription: Reduce Concussive Blast's cooldown by 4 seconds, its Mana cost by 40, and when cast create an impassable wall in front of Sgt. Hammer for 4 seconds.

4.name: Siege Tactics
4.description: Using Neosteel Plating while in Siege Mode grants Unstoppable for 2 seconds, as long as she remains in Siege Mode.
4.longDescription: Using Neosteel Plating while in Siege Mode grants Unstoppable for 2 seconds, as long as she remains in Siege Mode.

4.name: Regenerative Bio-Steel
4.description: Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode heal for 10% of the damage dealt.
4.longDescription: Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode heal for 10% of the damage dealt.

7.name: Pulse Detonation Core
7.description: Spider Mines detonate 3 times over 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Spider Mines by 1.5 seconds. Increase this bonus to 2.5 seconds while in Siege Mode.
7.longDescription: Spider Mines detonate 3 times over 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Spider Mines by 1.5 seconds. Increase this bonus to 2.5 seconds while in Siege Mode.

7.name: Hover Siege Mode
7.description: Sgt. Hammer can move at 50% Movement Speed while in Siege Mode.
7.longDescription: Sgt. Hammer can move at 50% Movement Speed while in Siege Mode.

7.name: Graduating Range
7.description: While in Siege Mode, Basic Attack range is increased by 1 every 1.5 seconds, up to 3.
7.longDescription: While in Siege Mode, Basic Attack range is increased by 1 every 1.5 seconds, up to 3.

10.name: Blunt Force Gun
10.description: Fire a missile across the battlefield, dealing 500 (+3% per level) damage to non-Structure enemies in its path.
10.longDescription: Fire a missile across the battlefield, dealing 500 (+3% per level) damage to non-Structure enemies in its path.

10.name: Napalm Strike
10.description: Deals 164 (+4% per level) damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals 50 (+4% per level) damage per second. Lasts for 4 seconds.
10.longDescription: Deals 164 (+4% per level) damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals 50 (+4% per level) damage per second. Lasts for 4 seconds.

13.name: Tactical Mine Deployment
13.description: Moving while Thrusters is active leaves a trail of up to 5 Spider Mines. Additionally, increase the Slow of Spider Mines by 15%.
13.longDescription: Moving while Thrusters is active leaves a trail of up to 5 Spider Mines. Additionally, increase the Slow of Spider Mines by 15%.

13.name: Entrenched
13.description: While in Siege Mode, Concussive Blasts's damage and knockback distance are increased by 75%.
13.longDescription: While in Siege Mode, Concussive Blasts's damage and knockback distance are increased by 75%.

13.name: Hyper-Cooling Engines
13.description: While in Siege Mode, hitting Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Thrusters by 5 seconds.
13.longDescription: While in Siege Mode, hitting Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Thrusters by 5 seconds.

16.name: Mechanical Know-how
16.description: Neosteel Plating grants 20% maximum Health as a Shield for 2 seconds and increases Basic Attack damage by 30% for 5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Neosteel Plating grants 20% maximum Health as a Shield for 2 seconds and increases Basic Attack damage by 30% for 5 seconds.

16.name: Executioner
16.description: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Attacking a Hero that is slowed, rooted, or stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.

16.name: Giant Killer
16.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.

20.name: Orbital BFG
20.description: Blunt Force Gun's missile orbits the planet every 5 seconds. Only the last missile fired orbits.
20.longDescription: Blunt Force Gun's missile orbits the planet every 5 seconds. Only the last missile fired orbits.

20.name: Advanced Lava Strike
20.description: Increase the cast range of Napalm Strike by 75%, and its impact deals 50% more damage.
20.longDescription: Increase the cast range of Napalm Strike by 75%, and its impact deals 50% more damage.

20.name: Shrapnel Mines
20.description: Upon detonating, Spider Mines reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10, up to 50, for 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Upon detonating, Spider Mines reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10, up to 50, for 4 seconds.

20.name: Ultra Capacitors
20.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode grants 10% Attack Speed for 5 seconds, up to 60%.
20.longDescription: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode grants 10% Attack Speed for 5 seconds, up to 60%.

1.name: Dragon Soul
1.description: Destroyer: Incinerate heals Deathwing for 100% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.  World Breaker: Lava Burst's explosion damage heals Deathwing for 200% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.
1.longDescription: Destroyer: Incinerate heals Deathwing for 100% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.  World Breaker: Lava Burst's explosion damage heals Deathwing for 200% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.

1.name: Molten Blood
1.description: While Deathwing has 3 or more Armor Plates, he heals for 0.6% of his maximum Health per second.
1.longDescription: While Deathwing has 3 or more Armor Plates, he heals for 0.6% of his maximum Health per second.

1.name: Draconic Might
1.description: Deathwing's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal him for 25% of the damage dealt. Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for 0.75 seconds.
1.longDescription: Deathwing's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal him for 25% of the damage dealt. Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for 0.75 seconds.

4.name: Infernus
4.description: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by 25%. Increase this damage bonus to 75% when Molten Flame is cast at 75 Energy or higher.
4.longDescription: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by 25%. Increase this damage bonus to 75% when Molten Flame is cast at 75 Energy or higher.

4.name: Heat Wave
4.description: Destroyer: After hitting an enemy Hero with Incinerate, Deathwing deals 18 (+4% per level) damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next 9 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.  World Breaker: Increase the explosion damage of Lava Burst by 150%.
4.longDescription: Destroyer: After hitting an enemy Hero with Incinerate, Deathwing deals 18 (+4% per level) damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next 9 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.  World Breaker: Increase the explosion damage of Lava Burst by 150%.

4.name: Dragon's Ire
4.description: While Deathwing has 3 or fewer Armor Plates, his damage is increased by 25%.
4.longDescription: While Deathwing has 3 or fewer Armor Plates, his damage is increased by 25%.

7.name: Firestorm
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Deathwing's landing Abilities by 3 seconds. When Deathwing lands, he drops 7 meteors near the landing area, dealing 77 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit.  Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.
7.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Deathwing's landing Abilities by 3 seconds. When Deathwing lands, he drops 7 meteors near the landing area, dealing 77 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit.  Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.

7.name: Death Drop
7.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 6 seconds and Deathwing's Basic Ability cooldowns by 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 6 seconds and Deathwing's Basic Ability cooldowns by 2 seconds.

7.name: Skyfall
7.description: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision dealing 58 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area. Has 3 charges.  If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
7.longDescription: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision dealing 58 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area. Has 3 charges.  If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for 3% of his maximum Health.

10.name: Burn Beneath My Shadow
10.description: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by 80%.
10.longDescription: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by 80%.

10.name: Bellowing Roar
10.description: After 1 second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing 25 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for 1.5 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing 25 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for 1.5 seconds.

13.name: Wicked Inferno
13.description: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by 10. After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains 15 Energy over 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by 10. After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains 15 Energy over 3 seconds.

13.name: Ruination
13.description: Destroyer: The bite from Onslaught now Slows by 60% for 1.5 seconds.  World Breaker: Reduce Earth Shatter's cooldown by 6 seconds and its Energy cost by 10.
13.longDescription: Destroyer: The bite from Onslaught now Slows by 60% for 1.5 seconds.  World Breaker: Reduce Earth Shatter's cooldown by 6 seconds and its Energy cost by 10.

13.name: Fire and Fury
13.description: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal 40% additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by 0.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal 40% additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by 0.5 seconds.

16.name: Conflagration
16.description: Dealing 320 (+4% per level) damage with Molten Flame to enemy Heroes within 4 seconds causes them to burn for an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. While burning, they explode every 1 second, dealing 80 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.
16.longDescription: Dealing 320 (+4% per level) damage with Molten Flame to enemy Heroes within 4 seconds causes them to burn for an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. While burning, they explode every 1 second, dealing 80 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.

16.name: Gaze Onto Destruction
16.description: Hitting Heroes with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing causes their damage to be reduced by 75% and Slows them by 40% for 5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Hitting Heroes with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing causes their damage to be reduced by 75% and Slows them by 40% for 5 seconds.

16.name: Elementium Plating
16.description: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 30% of Deathwing's missing Health for 8 seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates 2% of his maximum Health per second.  When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.  The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.
16.longDescription: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 30% of Deathwing's missing Health for 8 seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates 2% of his maximum Health per second.  When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.  The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.

20.name: Stood in the Fire
20.description: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by 40% while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by 50%.
20.longDescription: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by 40% while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by 50%.

20.name: Arrival of a God
20.description: Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage is increased by 400%.  Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level 7 talents.
20.longDescription: Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage is increased by 400%.  Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level 7 talents.

20.name: Destroyer's Rampage
20.description: For the next 6 seconds after landing in Destroyer form, Deathwing's damage is increased by 40% and his Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.  Damaging Heroes refreshes this effect and switching to World Breaker form removes the effect.
20.longDescription: For the next 6 seconds after landing in Destroyer form, Deathwing's damage is increased by 40% and his Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.  Damaging Heroes refreshes this effect and switching to World Breaker form removes the effect.

1.name: Overwhelming Power
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 40% Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for 15% of the damage dealt, increased by 50% of Sadism's bonus when hitting Heroes. These effects last for 4 seconds.
1.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 40% Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for 15% of the damage dealt, increased by 50% of Sadism's bonus when hitting Heroes. These effects last for 4 seconds.

1.name: Ruthless Momentum
1.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from 30 to 20. Telekinesis's cooldown recharges 100% faster while above 80% Health.
1.longDescription: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from 30 to 20. Telekinesis's cooldown recharges 100% faster while above 80% Health.

1.name: Extended Lightning
1.description: Reduce Sadism by 10%.  Quest: Hit Heroes with the center of Lightning Surge.  Reward: After hitting 5 Heroes, increase Lightning Surge's range by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Lightning Surge's center also Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with the center of a single cast, increase Sadism by 10% and instantly gain all other Rewards.
1.longDescription: Reduce Sadism by 10%.  Quest: Hit Heroes with the center of Lightning Surge.  Reward: After hitting 5 Heroes, increase Lightning Surge's range by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Lightning Surge's center also Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with the center of a single cast, increase Sadism by 10% and instantly gain all other Rewards.

4.name: Chaos Reigns
4.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Discord Strike.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, increase Discord Strike's damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 2 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 100 and instantly gain all other Rewards.
4.longDescription: Quest: Hit Heroes with Discord Strike.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, increase Discord Strike's damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 2 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 100 and instantly gain all other Rewards.

4.name: Negatively Charged
4.description: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.  Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by 5%.
4.longDescription: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.  Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by 5%.

4.name: Show of Force
4.description: Heroes hit with 3 of Alarak's Abilities within 2 seconds take an additional 61 (+4% per level) damage and increase Sadism by 2%, stacking up to 20%.  Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.
4.longDescription: Heroes hit with 3 of Alarak's Abilities within 2 seconds take an additional 61 (+4% per level) damage and increase Sadism by 2%, stacking up to 20%.  Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.

7.name: Dissonance
7.description: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by 0.75 seconds.
7.longDescription: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by 0.75 seconds.

7.name: Hindered Motion
7.description: Telekinesis Slows enemies by 30% for 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Telekinesis Slows enemies by 30% for 3 seconds.

7.name: Applied Force
7.description: Reduce Sadism by 10%, but Telekinesis pushes 15% further and has 15% increased range.
7.longDescription: Reduce Sadism by 10%, but Telekinesis pushes 15% further and has 15% increased range.

10.name: Deadly Charge
10.description: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
10.longDescription: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

10.name: Counter-Strike
10.description: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 (+4% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 (+4% per level) damage.

13.name: Blade of the Highlord
13.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by 2% stacking up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by 2% stacking up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.

13.name: Pure Malice
13.description: Increase Sadism by 10% any time an allied Hero dies, up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.
13.longDescription: Increase Sadism by 10% any time an allied Hero dies, up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.

13.name: Rite of Rak'Shir
13.description: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.
13.longDescription: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.

16.name: Lethal Onslaught
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 50% of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.
16.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 50% of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.

16.name: Lightning Barrage
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next 3 seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.
16.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next 3 seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.

16.name: Mocking Strikes
16.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds. This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed, or Rooted.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds. This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed, or Rooted.

20.name: Wrath of the Highlord
20.description: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Charge take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to 75% of Sadism's bonus damage for 4 seconds.  If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, its cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.
20.longDescription: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Charge take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to 75% of Sadism's bonus damage for 4 seconds.  If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, its cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.

20.name: Might of the Highlord
20.description: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.
20.longDescription: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

20.name: Last Laugh
20.description: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.
20.longDescription: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.

20.name: Hasty Bargain
20.description: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.
20.longDescription: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.

1.name: Unyielding Power
1.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Skull Missile.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, increase Skull Missile's damage by 100.  Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Skull Missile gains an additional charge.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit Heroes with Skull Missile.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, increase Skull Missile's damage by 100.  Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Skull Missile gains an additional charge.

1.name: Furious Spark
1.description: Every 3rd hit from Lightning Nova against the same target deals 65 (+4% per level) bonus damage and grants Mephisto 2 Mana.
1.longDescription: Every 3rd hit from Lightning Nova against the same target deals 65 (+4% per level) bonus damage and grants Mephisto 2 Mana.

1.name: Malicious Intent
1.description: Shade of Mephisto grants 25% Spell Power while active and for 2.5 seconds after ending.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then increase the duration of the Spell Power bonus to 10 seconds after it ends.
1.longDescription: Shade of Mephisto grants 25% Spell Power while active and for 2.5 seconds after ending.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then increase the duration of the Spell Power bonus to 10 seconds after it ends.

4.name: Hateful Mending
4.description: Skull Missile grants 10 Mana and heals Mephisto for 70% of the damage it deals to Heroes.
4.longDescription: Skull Missile grants 10 Mana and heals Mephisto for 70% of the damage it deals to Heroes.

4.name: Static Barrier
4.description: At the end of its duration, Lightning Nova grants Mephisto a Shield equal to 40% of the damage it dealt to Heroes. Lasts 5 seconds.
4.longDescription: At the end of its duration, Lightning Nova grants Mephisto a Shield equal to 40% of the damage it dealt to Heroes. Lasts 5 seconds.

4.name: Spite
4.description: Increase Regeneration Globe healing duration by 100%. Every tick of Regeneration Globe healing activates Lord of Hatred, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second.
4.longDescription: Increase Regeneration Globe healing duration by 100%. Every tick of Regeneration Globe healing activates Lord of Hatred, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second.

7.name: Ghastly Armor
7.description: Shade of Mephisto grants 25 Armor while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.
7.longDescription: Shade of Mephisto grants 25 Armor while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.

7.name: Frost Storm
7.description: While Shade of Mephisto is active, enemies who are hit by Lightning Nova are Slowed by 15% for 1 second and the Slow from Skull Missile is increased to 50%.
7.longDescription: While Shade of Mephisto is active, enemies who are hit by Lightning Nova are Slowed by 15% for 1 second and the Slow from Skull Missile is increased to 50%.

7.name: Trickery
7.description: Shade of Mephisto grants 20% Movement Speed while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then reset the cooldown of Shade of Mephisto.
7.longDescription: Shade of Mephisto grants 20% Movement Speed while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then reset the cooldown of Shade of Mephisto.

10.name: Consume Souls
10.description: Channel for 2.5 seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take 357 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
10.longDescription: Channel for 2.5 seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take 357 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 25% for 2.5 seconds.

10.name: Durance of Hate
10.description: After 1 second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for 2.5 seconds and deal 250 (+4% per level) damage to them over the same duration.  Durance of Hate spreads outwards from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for 2.5 seconds and deal 250 (+4% per level) damage to them over the same duration.  Durance of Hate spreads outwards from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.

13.name: Abhorred Skull
13.description: Hitting a Hero with Skull Missile grants 25% Spell Power for 6 seconds. Skull Missile deals 40% more damage to Heroes under 50% Health.
13.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Skull Missile grants 25% Spell Power for 6 seconds. Skull Missile deals 40% more damage to Heroes under 50% Health.

13.name: Hysteria
13.description: Lord of Hatred also reduces the cooldown of Mephisto's Heroic Ability. Mephisto is healed for 15% of his maximum Health and Mana when he casts his Heroic Ability.
13.longDescription: Lord of Hatred also reduces the cooldown of Mephisto's Heroic Ability. Mephisto is healed for 15% of his maximum Health and Mana when he casts his Heroic Ability.

13.name: Shard of Hate
13.description: Basic Attacks hit enemies near the primary target and activate Lord of Hatred against enemy Heroes, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second per Hero hit.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks hit enemies near the primary target and activate Lord of Hatred against enemy Heroes, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second per Hero hit.

16.name: Lightning Reaction
16.description: Skull Missile explodes on contact with Lightning Nova, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.
16.longDescription: Skull Missile explodes on contact with Lightning Nova, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.

16.name: Static Field
16.description: When Lightning Nova's damage bonus reaches 30%, enemy Heroes within its radius take damage equal to 10% of their maximum Health.
16.longDescription: When Lightning Nova's damage bonus reaches 30%, enemy Heroes within its radius take damage equal to 10% of their maximum Health.

16.name: Animosity
16.description: Increase the duration of Lightning Nova by 1 second and the maximum amount of bonus damage it can deal from 30% to 42%.
16.longDescription: Increase the duration of Lightning Nova by 1 second and the maximum amount of bonus damage it can deal from 30% to 42%.

20.name: Consumed by Hatred
20.description: Consume Souls deals bonus damage equal to 10% of the target's missing Health. If Consume Souls initial cast kills a Hero it will cast 1 additional time.
20.longDescription: Consume Souls deals bonus damage equal to 10% of the target's missing Health. If Consume Souls initial cast kills a Hero it will cast 1 additional time.

20.name: Unspeakable Horror
20.description: Durance of Hate Silences enemies while they are Rooted and for 3 seconds after its Root expires.
20.longDescription: Durance of Hate Silences enemies while they are Rooted and for 3 seconds after its Root expires.

20.name: Mimic
20.description: While both Shade of Mephisto and Lightning Nova are active, Lightning Nova also casts from the Shade's location.
20.longDescription: While both Shade of Mephisto and Lightning Nova are active, Lightning Nova also casts from the Shade's location.

20.name: Shade Lord
20.description: Activate to swap locations with Shade of Mephisto and refresh its duration.  Passive: Shade of Mephisto benefits from all of Mephisto's level 7 Talents.
20.longDescription: Activate to swap locations with Shade of Mephisto and refresh its duration.  Passive: Shade of Mephisto benefits from all of Mephisto's level 7 Talents.

1.name: Stormcaller
1.description: Increase the radius of Lightning Shield by 25%.  Quest: Each time Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, permanently increase Rehgar's Health by 2 and Mana by 1, stacking up to 200 times.
1.longDescription: Increase the radius of Lightning Shield by 25%.  Quest: Each time Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, permanently increase Rehgar's Health by 2 and Mana by 1, stacking up to 200 times.

1.name: Colossal Totem
1.description: Reactivate Earthbind Totem to move an existing totem to a new location. This can be used once per cast.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's area and duration by 50%, and Health by 25%.
1.longDescription: Reactivate Earthbind Totem to move an existing totem to a new location. This can be used once per cast.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's area and duration by 50%, and Health by 25%.

1.name: Feral Heart
1.description: Ghost Wolf's Movement Speed bonus is increased to 40% for the first second, then falls to 30%. Entering or exiting Ghost Wolf form grants 15 Armor for 1 second.
1.longDescription: Ghost Wolf's Movement Speed bonus is increased to 40% for the first second, then falls to 30%. Entering or exiting Ghost Wolf form grants 15 Armor for 1 second.

4.name: Earthliving Enchant
4.description: When Chain Heal heals a Hero below 50% Health, they are healed an additional 160 (+4% per level) Health over 4 seconds.
4.longDescription: When Chain Heal heals a Hero below 50% Health, they are healed an additional 160 (+4% per level) Health over 4 seconds.

4.name: Electric Charge
4.description: The bearer of Lightning Shield Heals for 20% of the damage it deals to enemy Heroes, doubled if the bearer is Rehgar.  While Lightning Shield is damaging an enemy, its bearer gains 10% increased Movement Speed.
4.longDescription: The bearer of Lightning Shield Heals for 20% of the damage it deals to enemy Heroes, doubled if the bearer is Rehgar.  While Lightning Shield is damaging an enemy, its bearer gains 10% increased Movement Speed.

4.name: Healing Totem
4.description: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for 2% of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has 125 (+4% per level) Health and lasts for 10 seconds.
4.longDescription: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for 2% of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has 125 (+4% per level) Health and lasts for 10 seconds.

7.name: Grounded Totem
7.description: Enemy Heroes in Earthbind Totem's area also have their Attack Speed Slowed by 15% and their Spell Power reduced by 15%.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's cast range by 45%.
7.longDescription: Enemy Heroes in Earthbind Totem's area also have their Attack Speed Slowed by 15% and their Spell Power reduced by 15%.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's cast range by 45%.

7.name: Purification
7.description: If Purge removes a Slow, Stun, Root, or Silence effect from an ally, heal them for 220 (+4% per level).  Using Purge on an enemy Hero deals up to 330 (+4% per level) damage to Shields and reduces healing received by 40% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Purge's cooldown by 15 seconds.
7.longDescription: If Purge removes a Slow, Stun, Root, or Silence effect from an ally, heal them for 220 (+4% per level).  Using Purge on an enemy Hero deals up to 330 (+4% per level) damage to Shields and reduces healing received by 40% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Purge's cooldown by 15 seconds.

7.name: Blood and Thunder
7.description: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.5 seconds and restore 4% of Rehgar's maximum Mana.
7.longDescription: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.5 seconds and restore 4% of Rehgar's maximum Mana.

10.name: Ancestral Healing
10.description: After 1 second, heal an allied Hero for 1180 (+4% per level) Health.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, heal an allied Hero for 1180 (+4% per level) Health.

10.name: Bloodlust
10.description: Grant nearby allied Heroes 40% Attack Speed and 35% Movement Speed and causes them to heal for 30% of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for 6 seconds.
10.longDescription: Grant nearby allied Heroes 40% Attack Speed and 35% Movement Speed and causes them to heal for 30% of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for 6 seconds.

13.name: Tidal Waves
13.description: Reduces Chain Heal's cooldown by 1 second for each Hero healed, and reduces its Mana cost from 60 to 40.
13.longDescription: Reduces Chain Heal's cooldown by 1 second for each Hero healed, and reduces its Mana cost from 60 to 40.

13.name: Earth Shield
13.description: Lightning Shield gives Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 14% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Lightning Shield gives Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 14% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.

13.name: Wellspring
13.description: Every 2 seconds, Earthbind Totem will cast an untalented Chain Heal at the nearest allied Hero with the lowest Health. This Chain Heal heals for 35% of its normal amount.
13.longDescription: Every 2 seconds, Earthbind Totem will cast an untalented Chain Heal at the nearest allied Hero with the lowest Health. This Chain Heal heals for 35% of its normal amount.

16.name: Rising Storm
16.description: Every time a Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, increase its damage by 10%. Stacks up to 15 times.  Passive: Increase the duration of Lightning Shield by 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Every time a Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, increase its damage by 10%. Stacks up to 15 times.  Passive: Increase the duration of Lightning Shield by 3 seconds.

16.name: Earthgrasp Totem
16.description: When Earthbind Totem is first cast, it deals 90 (+4% per level) damage and Slows nearby enemies by 90% for 1 second.
16.longDescription: When Earthbind Totem is first cast, it deals 90 (+4% per level) damage and Slows nearby enemies by 90% for 1 second.

16.name: Hunger of the Wolf
16.description: Ghost Wolf attacks against Heroes deal an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health and heal Rehgar for 6% of his maximum Health.
16.longDescription: Ghost Wolf attacks against Heroes deal an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health and heal Rehgar for 6% of his maximum Health.

20.name: Farseer's Blessing
20.description: After 1.5 seconds, Ancestral Healing is cast a second time on the same target. Allies near the target are healed for 590 (+4% per level).
20.longDescription: After 1.5 seconds, Ancestral Healing is cast a second time on the same target. Allies near the target are healed for 590 (+4% per level).

20.name: Gladiator's War Shout
20.description: Increase the duration and range of Bloodlust by 100%.
20.longDescription: Increase the duration and range of Bloodlust by 100%.

20.name: Elemental Conduit
20.description: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 10% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.  For up to 5 seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 10% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.  For up to 5 seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.

20.name: Pit Fighter
20.description: Gain 10% increased Attack Damage and 3 Spell Power. Each nearby ally Hero grants an additional stack of this effect, up to 5 stacks.  While at 2 or more stacks, Purge's cooldown refreshes 50% faster.
20.longDescription: Gain 10% increased Attack Damage and 3 Spell Power. Each nearby ally Hero grants an additional stack of this effect, up to 5 stacks.  While at 2 or more stacks, Purge's cooldown refreshes 50% faster.

1.name: Free Drinks
1.description: When Healing Brew heals a Hero under 50% Health, its cooldown is reduced by 1 second, and its Mana cost is refunded.
1.longDescription: When Healing Brew heals a Hero under 50% Health, its cooldown is reduced by 1 second, and its Mana cost is refunded.

1.name: Serpent Sidekick
1.description: Cloud Serpent no longer costs Mana and while Fast Feet is active its cooldown refreshes an additional 75% faster.
1.longDescription: Cloud Serpent no longer costs Mana and while Fast Feet is active its cooldown refreshes an additional 75% faster.

1.name: Eager Adventurer
1.description: Increase Fast Feet's duration by 150% and increase Mana regeneration by 150% while Fast Feet is active.
1.longDescription: Increase Fast Feet's duration by 150% and increase Mana regeneration by 150% while Fast Feet is active.

4.name: Wind Serpent
4.description: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased Movement Speed. Casting Blinding Wind increases this bonus to 20% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Cloud Serpent attacks 25% faster.
4.longDescription: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased Movement Speed. Casting Blinding Wind increases this bonus to 20% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Cloud Serpent attacks 25% faster.

4.name: Surging Winds
4.description: If Blinding Wind targets 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is instantly reduced by 2 seconds and Li Li gains 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
4.longDescription: If Blinding Wind targets 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is instantly reduced by 2 seconds and Li Li gains 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds.

4.name: Safety Sprint
