16.longDescription: Gain 5% maximum Health, increase Groundbreaker's Slow duration by 1 second, and Bloodthirst gains an additional charge.

20.name: Death Wish
20.description: Increase the duration of Warlord's Challenge by 0.5 seconds. If an enemy Hero is killed while Taunted by Warlord's Challenge, its cooldown is reduced by 45 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increase the duration of Warlord's Challenge by 0.5 seconds. If an enemy Hero is killed while Taunted by Warlord's Challenge, its cooldown is reduced by 45 seconds.

20.name: Deadly Calm
20.description: Heroes hit by Decimate deal 40% less damage for 3 seconds.
20.longDescription: Heroes hit by Decimate deal 40% less damage for 3 seconds.

20.name: Titanic Might
20.description: Wrecking Ball now throws the 2 closest enemies.
20.longDescription: Wrecking Ball now throws the 2 closest enemies.

20.name: Inner Rage
20.description: Body Check gains an additional charge and its healing reduction is increased by an additional 45%.
20.longDescription: Body Check gains an additional charge and its healing reduction is increased by an additional 45%.

1.name: Transcendence
1.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals the lowest nearby allied Hero for 104 (+4% per level) and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
1.longDescription: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals the lowest nearby allied Hero for 104 (+4% per level) and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Iron Fists
1.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 110% bonus damage and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
1.longDescription: Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 110% bonus damage and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Insight
1.description: Quest: Every 3rd Basic Attack restores 14 (+4% per level) Mana, grants a stack of Insight, and gives 25% increased Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.  Reward: Upon getting 100 stacks of Insight, every 3rd attack also reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.75 seconds.
1.longDescription: Quest: Every 3rd Basic Attack restores 14 (+4% per level) Mana, grants a stack of Insight, and gives 25% increased Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.  Reward: Upon getting 100 stacks of Insight, every 3rd attack also reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.75 seconds.

4.name: Spirit Ally
4.description: Place a Spirit Ally that heals allied Heroes in a large area around it for 2% of their maximum Health every second. Has 150 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Spirit Allies.
4.longDescription: Place a Spirit Ally that heals allied Heroes in a large area around it for 2% of their maximum Health every second. Has 150 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Spirit Allies.

4.name: Earth Ally
4.description: Place an Earth Ally that grants nearby allied Heroes 50 Physical Armor against Heroic Basic Attacks, reducing damage taken by 50%. Has 400 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Earth Allies.
4.longDescription: Place an Earth Ally that grants nearby allied Heroes 50 Physical Armor against Heroic Basic Attacks, reducing damage taken by 50%. Has 400 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Earth Allies.

4.name: Air Ally
4.description: Place an Air Ally that gives allied Heroes 20% Spell Power, grants vision, and reveals a large area around it. Has 300 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Air Allies.
4.longDescription: Place an Air Ally that gives allied Heroes 20% Spell Power, grants vision, and reveals a large area around it. Has 300 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Air Allies.

7.name: Blinding Speed
7.description: Decreases Radiant Dash's cooldown by 2 seconds and increases the maximum number of charges by 1.
7.longDescription: Decreases Radiant Dash's cooldown by 2 seconds and increases the maximum number of charges by 1.

7.name: Heavenly Zeal
7.description: Increases Breath of Heaven's Movement Speed bonus to 30%. Radiant Dashing to an ally increases the healing they receive from Breath of Heaven by 50% for 3.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Increases Breath of Heaven's Movement Speed bonus to 30%. Radiant Dashing to an ally increases the healing they receive from Breath of Heaven by 50% for 3.5 seconds.

7.name: Blazing Fists
7.description: Increase the duration of Deadly Reach by 100%. Every 3rd Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Deadly Reach by 0.75 seconds.
7.longDescription: Increase the duration of Deadly Reach by 100%. Every 3rd Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Deadly Reach by 0.75 seconds.

10.name: Divine Palm
10.description: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 (+4% per level) if they take fatal damage in the next 4 seconds.
10.longDescription: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 (+4% per level) if they take fatal damage in the next 4 seconds.

10.name: Seven-Sided Strike
10.description: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 2 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.
10.longDescription: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 2 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.

13.name: Quicksilver
13.description: Radiant Dashing to an ally gives Kharazim and the target 30% bonus Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Radiant Dashing to an ally gives Kharazim and the target 30% bonus Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

13.name: Spell Shield
13.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
13.longDescription: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

13.name: Sixth Sense
13.description: While Stunned or Rooted, gain 75 Physical Armor against Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing their damage by 75%.
13.longDescription: While Stunned or Rooted, gain 75 Physical Armor against Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing their damage by 75%.

16.name: Cleansing Touch
16.description: Radiant Dashing to an ally makes them Unstoppable for 1 second.
16.longDescription: Radiant Dashing to an ally makes them Unstoppable for 1 second.

16.name: Way of the Hundred Fists
16.description: Radiant Dashing to an enemy launches a rapid volley of 6 Basic Attacks dealing 45% damage each.
16.longDescription: Radiant Dashing to an enemy launches a rapid volley of 6 Basic Attacks dealing 45% damage each.

16.name: Echo of Heaven
16.description: Breath of Heaven heals 75% of its normal amount, but heals a second time 3 seconds later.
16.longDescription: Breath of Heaven heals 75% of its normal amount, but heals a second time 3 seconds later.

20.name: Peaceful Repose
20.description: Divine Palm's healing amount is increased by 75% and its cooldown is set to 5 seconds if the Hero does not die.
20.longDescription: Divine Palm's healing amount is increased by 75% and its cooldown is set to 5 seconds if the Hero does not die.

20.name: Transgression
20.description: Seven-Sided Strike hits 4 additional times.
20.longDescription: Seven-Sided Strike hits 4 additional times.

20.name: Fists of Legend
20.description: Gain 50% of the benefit from both level 1 talents that were not chosen.
20.longDescription: Gain 50% of the benefit from both level 1 talents that were not chosen.

20.name: Storm Shield
20.description: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 20% of their max Health for 3 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 20% of their max Health for 3 seconds.

20.name: Epiphany
20.description: Activate to restore 70% of Kharazim's maximum Mana and refill 2 charges of Radiant Dash.
20.longDescription: Activate to restore 70% of Kharazim's maximum Mana and refill 2 charges of Radiant Dash.

1.name: Winged Guard
1.description: Each time Necrotic Embrace hits an enemy Hero, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack.  If Winged Guard has no charges, Mal'Ganis will gain 1 charge after 6 seconds.
1.longDescription: Each time Necrotic Embrace hits an enemy Hero, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack.  If Winged Guard has no charges, Mal'Ganis will gain 1 charge after 6 seconds.

1.name: Vampiric Aura
1.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 30% of Physical Damage dealt, and nearby allied Heroes heal for 15% of Physical Damage dealt.
1.longDescription: Mal'Ganis heals for 30% of Physical Damage dealt, and nearby allied Heroes heal for 15% of Physical Damage dealt.

1.name: Time to Feed
1.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 70 (+4% per level) when damaging a nearby enemy Hero. This can occur once every 6 seconds against each enemy Hero, but is also refreshed when they are Slept by Night Rush.
1.longDescription: Mal'Ganis heals for 70 (+4% per level) when damaging a nearby enemy Hero. This can occur once every 6 seconds against each enemy Hero, but is also refreshed when they are Slept by Night Rush.

4.name: Fueled by Torment
4.description: While Necrotic Embrace is active, Mal'Ganis heals for 12 (+4% per level) when damage is taken and Vampiric Touch converts 20% more Hero damage into healing.
4.longDescription: While Necrotic Embrace is active, Mal'Ganis heals for 12 (+4% per level) when damage is taken and Vampiric Touch converts 20% more Hero damage into healing.

4.name: Might of Sargeras
4.description: Necrotic Embrace's Armor is increased to 50.
4.longDescription: Necrotic Embrace's Armor is increased to 50.

4.name: Echo of Doom
4.description: When Necrotic Embrace expires, it explodes again for 68 (+4% per level) damage. For each enemy Hero hit, gain 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Necrotic Embrace by 0.75 seconds.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.
4.longDescription: When Necrotic Embrace expires, it explodes again for 68 (+4% per level) damage. For each enemy Hero hit, gain 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Necrotic Embrace by 0.75 seconds.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.

7.name: Black Claws
7.description: After Mal'Ganis hits an enemy Hero with Fel Claws, his next Basic Attack deals 60% more damage and reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes by 15 for 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: After Mal'Ganis hits an enemy Hero with Fel Claws, his next Basic Attack deals 60% more damage and reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes by 15 for 2 seconds.

7.name: Will of Tichondrius
7.description: Each enemy Hero hit by the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws causes the final slash to steal 1% of maximum Health from enemy Heroes, up to 4%.  If at least 4 enemy Heroes are hit with the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws, then the final slash Stuns enemies for an additional 0.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws causes the final slash to steal 1% of maximum Health from enemy Heroes, up to 4%.  If at least 4 enemy Heroes are hit with the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws, then the final slash Stuns enemies for an additional 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Spreading Plague
7.description: After casting Night Rush, deal 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. This effect lasts for 5 seconds and Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh its duration.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.
7.longDescription: After casting Night Rush, deal 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. This effect lasts for 5 seconds and Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh its duration.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.

10.name: Carrion Swarm
10.description: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies.  Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies.  Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.

10.name: Dark Conversion
10.description: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.
10.longDescription: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.

13.name: Deep Sleep
13.description: Increase Night Rush's Sleep duration by 0.75 seconds and its Movement Speed bonus by 10%.
13.longDescription: Increase Night Rush's Sleep duration by 0.75 seconds and its Movement Speed bonus by 10%.

13.name: The Night Beckons
13.description: Basic Attacks deal 200% bonus damage to Sleeping enemies. After Night Rush's Sleep ends, targets are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks deal 200% bonus damage to Sleeping enemies. After Night Rush's Sleep ends, targets are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Blood Rush
13.description: When Mal'Ganis is healed by a Hero, he gains 1% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 15%.
13.longDescription: When Mal'Ganis is healed by a Hero, he gains 1% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 15%.

16.name: Plague Bats
16.description: Necrotic Embrace unleashes a wave of bats in front of Mal'Ganis, dealing 81 (+4% per level) damage.
16.longDescription: Necrotic Embrace unleashes a wave of bats in front of Mal'Ganis, dealing 81 (+4% per level) damage.

16.name: Frenzied Assault
16.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes with a higher Health percentage heal for an additional 50% of damage dealt.  Basic Attacks against Heroes with a lower Health percentage grant 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Heroes with a higher Health percentage heal for an additional 50% of damage dealt.  Basic Attacks against Heroes with a lower Health percentage grant 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

16.name: Blind as a Bat
16.description: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts 6 seconds.  Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts 6 seconds.  Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 4 seconds.

20.name: Seeker Swarm
20.description: Upon expiring, Carrion Swarm's bats seek nearby enemy Heroes, dealing 132 (+4% per level) damage and Sleeping them for 2.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Upon expiring, Carrion Swarm's bats seek nearby enemy Heroes, dealing 132 (+4% per level) damage and Sleeping them for 2.5 seconds.

20.name: Wrath of Nathreza
20.description: Enemy Heroes near the target suffer 75% of the transferred Health as damage over 3 seconds.  Does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.
20.longDescription: Enemy Heroes near the target suffer 75% of the transferred Health as damage over 3 seconds.  Does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.

20.name: Vanquish the Weak
20.description: Damage from Fel Claws and Basic Attacks Slows enemies by 25% for 1.5 seconds, and Vampiric Touch converts 10% more damage into healing versus Slowed Heroes.
20.longDescription: Damage from Fel Claws and Basic Attacks Slows enemies by 25% for 1.5 seconds, and Vampiric Touch converts 10% more damage into healing versus Slowed Heroes.

20.name: Alone in the Dark
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Night Rush by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes put to Sleep by Night Rush have their vision greatly reduced during the Sleep and for 2 seconds after.
20.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Night Rush by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes put to Sleep by Night Rush have their vision greatly reduced during the Sleep and for 2 seconds after.

1.name: Demolitions Expert
1.description: Quest: For every 5 enemy Heroes hit by Particle Grenade, its recharge rate lowers by 0.4375 seconds, up to 3.5 seconds.  Reward: Once Particle Grenade has hit 40 enemy Heroes, its radius is increased by 15%.
1.longDescription: Quest: For every 5 enemy Heroes hit by Particle Grenade, its recharge rate lowers by 0.4375 seconds, up to 3.5 seconds.  Reward: Once Particle Grenade has hit 40 enemy Heroes, its radius is increased by 15%.

1.name: Together We Are Strong
1.description: For 3 seconds after gaining Shield Ally, every 5.35 (+4% per level) damage done by the bearer contributes 1 Energy to Zarya, up to 40 Energy per Shield.
1.longDescription: For 3 seconds after gaining Shield Ally, every 5.35 (+4% per level) damage done by the bearer contributes 1 Energy to Zarya, up to 40 Energy per Shield.

1.name: Feel the Heat
1.description: Zarya's Basic Attack deals 50% additional damage to enemies in melee range. While above 40 Energy, Zarya's Basic Attack size is increased by 35%.
1.longDescription: Zarya's Basic Attack deals 50% additional damage to enemies in melee range. While above 40 Energy, Zarya's Basic Attack size is increased by 35%.

1.name: Maximum Charge
1.description: Regen Globes now instantly grant 20 Energy.  Quest: Spend 150 seconds at or above 50 Energy.  Reward: Gain an additional 20 maximum Energy.
1.longDescription: Regen Globes now instantly grant 20 Energy.  Quest: Spend 150 seconds at or above 50 Energy.  Reward: Gain an additional 20 maximum Energy.

4.name: I Am the Strongest
4.description: Personal Barrier absorbs an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage.  Passive: Damage absorbed by Zarya's Shields contributes 20% more Energy.
4.longDescription: Personal Barrier absorbs an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage.  Passive: Damage absorbed by Zarya's Shields contributes 20% more Energy.

4.name: Give Me Twenty
4.description: Quest: Regeneration Globes increase Shield Ally absorb amount by 15, up to 300 permanently.  Reward: After collecting 20 Regen Globes, permanently reduce the cooldown of Shield Ally by 2 seconds.
4.longDescription: Quest: Regeneration Globes increase Shield Ally absorb amount by 15, up to 300 permanently.  Reward: After collecting 20 Regen Globes, permanently reduce the cooldown of Shield Ally by 2 seconds.

4.name: Speed Barrier
4.description: Shield Ally increases the allied Hero's Movement Speed by 50% for the duration.
4.longDescription: Shield Ally increases the allied Hero's Movement Speed by 50% for the duration.

4.name: Defensive Shielding
4.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier and Shield Ally grant 75 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks for 6 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
4.longDescription: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier and Shield Ally grant 75 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks for 6 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.

7.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
7.description: Particle Grenade deals 25 (+4% per level) more damage and Slows Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds to enemies hit by the center of the blast.
7.longDescription: Particle Grenade deals 25 (+4% per level) more damage and Slows Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds to enemies hit by the center of the blast.

7.name: Deep Burn
7.description: Hitting a Hero with Particle Grenade causes Basic Attacks against them to generate 2 Energy. Lasts 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Particle Grenade causes Basic Attacks against them to generate 2 Energy. Lasts 4 seconds.

7.name: Explosive Barrier
7.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier explodes, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.
7.longDescription: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier explodes, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.

10.name: Graviton Surge
10.description: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 (+4% per level) damage a second.
10.longDescription: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 (+4% per level) damage a second.

10.name: Expulsion Zone
10.description: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 (+4% per level) damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.
10.longDescription: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 (+4% per level) damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.

13.name: Unstoppable Competitor
13.description: Personal Barrier makes Zarya Unstoppable for up to 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Personal Barrier makes Zarya Unstoppable for up to 2 seconds.

13.name: Spell Barrier
13.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier grants Zarya 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken from Abilities by 75%.
13.longDescription: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier grants Zarya 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken from Abilities by 75%.

13.name: Endurance Training
13.description: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya gains 20 Armor, reducing all damage taken by 20%.
13.longDescription: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya gains 20 Armor, reducing all damage taken by 20%.

13.name: Pain is Temporary
13.description: Activate to consume all Energy and gain a Shield that absorbs 0.8% of Zarya's maximum Health per Energy consumed and lasts for 3 seconds. Zarya may only have one personal Shield active on herself at a time.
13.longDescription: Activate to consume all Energy and gain a Shield that absorbs 0.8% of Zarya's maximum Health per Energy consumed and lasts for 3 seconds. Zarya may only have one personal Shield active on herself at a time.

16.name: Cleansing Shield
16.description: Causes Shield Ally to remove all disabling effects and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Causes Shield Ally to remove all disabling effects and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.

16.name: Gain Train
16.description: Shield Ally now grants an untalented Shield to a nearby ally upon impact.
16.longDescription: Shield Ally now grants an untalented Shield to a nearby ally upon impact.

16.name: Born in Battle
16.description: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya's cooldowns regenerate 25% faster.
16.longDescription: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya's cooldowns regenerate 25% faster.

20.name: Gravity Kills
20.description: Increases Graviton Surge's duration by 1 second and it Silences Heroes caught in its area.
20.longDescription: Increases Graviton Surge's duration by 1 second and it Silences Heroes caught in its area.

20.name: Clear Out
20.description: Reduce Expulsion Zone's cooldown by 25 seconds and increase its duration by 1.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Reduce Expulsion Zone's cooldown by 25 seconds and increase its duration by 1.5 seconds.

20.name: Grenadier
20.description: All Particle Grenade charges are returned at once.
20.longDescription: All Particle Grenade charges are returned at once.

20.name: Unyielding Defender
20.description: Activate to reset the cooldown of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally.
20.longDescription: Activate to reset the cooldown of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally.

1.name: Might of the Banshee Queen
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Withering Fire increases Sylvanas's Attack Speed and Spell Power by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
1.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Withering Fire increases Sylvanas's Attack Speed and Spell Power by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

1.name: Unrelenting Torment
1.description: Increase the damage of Shadow Dagger by 20% and increase its duration by 1 second.
1.longDescription: Increase the damage of Shadow Dagger by 20% and increase its duration by 1 second.

1.name: Overwhelming Affliction
1.description: Enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows are Slowed by 15%. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against Slowed enemy Heroes deal 1% of their maximum Health as damage.
1.longDescription: Enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows are Slowed by 15%. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against Slowed enemy Heroes deal 1% of their maximum Health as damage.

4.name: Unstable Poison
4.description: Minions that die under the effects of Shadow Dagger or Sylvanas's Traits explode, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons.
4.longDescription: Minions that die under the effects of Shadow Dagger or Sylvanas's Traits explode, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons.

4.name: Mercenary Queen
4.description: Friendly non-Elite Mercenaries near Sylvanas deal 60% more damage. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks Stun and instantly apply 3 stacks of Black Arrows to Mercenaries.  Sylvanas deals 30% additional damage to Mercenaries with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.
4.longDescription: Friendly non-Elite Mercenaries near Sylvanas deal 60% more damage. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks Stun and instantly apply 3 stacks of Black Arrows to Mercenaries.  Sylvanas deals 30% additional damage to Mercenaries with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.

4.name: Haunting Arrows
4.description: Black Arrows can now be activated to cause all Basic Attacks and Abilities to Stun Minions and Structures for 3 seconds. Lasts for 10 seconds. Basic Attacks against Structures reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.
4.longDescription: Black Arrows can now be activated to cause all Basic Attacks and Abilities to Stun Minions and Structures for 3 seconds. Lasts for 10 seconds. Basic Attacks against Structures reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.

7.name: Barbed Shot
7.description: Hitting the same enemy with 5 shots of Withering Fire causes the 5th shot to deal 400% bonus damage.
7.longDescription: Hitting the same enemy with 5 shots of Withering Fire causes the 5th shot to deal 400% bonus damage.

7.name: Lost Soul
7.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows reduce the cooldown of Shadow Dagger by 0.75 seconds, doubled against Heroes.  Passive: Shadow Dagger deals 10% more damage.
7.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows reduce the cooldown of Shadow Dagger by 0.75 seconds, doubled against Heroes.  Passive: Shadow Dagger deals 10% more damage.

7.name: Festering Wounds
7.description: Increase Haunting Wave's damage by 15%. Haunting Wave applies 3 stacks of Black Arrows.
7.longDescription: Increase Haunting Wave's damage by 15%. Haunting Wave applies 3 stacks of Black Arrows.

10.name: Wailing Arrow
10.description: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 (+4% per level) damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.
10.longDescription: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 (+4% per level) damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.

10.name: Mind Control
10.description: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.

13.name: Cold Embrace
13.description: Shadow Dagger reduces the Armor of the initial target by 25 and any enemy it spreads to by 10 for 2.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Shadow Dagger reduces the Armor of the initial target by 25 and any enemy it spreads to by 10 for 2.5 seconds.

13.name: Windrunner
13.description: Haunting Wave can be cast a second time for free within 4 seconds after teleporting. Teleporting with Haunting Wave resets the cooldown of Withering Fire.
13.longDescription: Haunting Wave can be cast a second time for free within 4 seconds after teleporting. Teleporting with Haunting Wave resets the cooldown of Withering Fire.

13.name: Remorseless
13.description: Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows shoot an untalented shot of Withering Fire. This shot of Withering Fire applies Black Arrows.  Increase Sylvanas's Basic Attack range by 1.
13.longDescription: Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows shoot an untalented shot of Withering Fire. This shot of Withering Fire applies Black Arrows.  Increase Sylvanas's Basic Attack range by 1.

16.name: Evasive Fire
16.description: Hitting an enemy with Withering Fire grants 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%. Basic Attacks refresh this duration.
16.longDescription: Hitting an enemy with Withering Fire grants 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%. Basic Attacks refresh this duration.

16.name: Life Drain
16.description: Heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sylvanas to enemies with 3 stacks of Black Arrows. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
16.longDescription: Heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sylvanas to enemies with 3 stacks of Black Arrows. Healing is doubled against Heroes.

16.name: Will of the Forsaken
16.description: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

20.name: Deafening Blast
20.description: Enemies at the center of Wailing Arrow's explosion take 50% more damage and are Silenced for twice as long.
20.longDescription: Enemies at the center of Wailing Arrow's explosion take 50% more damage and are Silenced for twice as long.

20.name: Dark Lady's Call
20.description: Heroes hit by Mind Control have their vision radius greatly reduced for 5 seconds. Mind Control's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
20.longDescription: Heroes hit by Mind Control have their vision radius greatly reduced for 5 seconds. Mind Control's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.

20.name: Withering Barrage
20.description: Withering Fire applies Black Arrows, and Heroes hit by Withering Fire reduce its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
20.longDescription: Withering Fire applies Black Arrows, and Heroes hit by Withering Fire reduce its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.

20.name: Bolt of the Storm
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.
20.longDescription: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

1.name: Puncturing Arrow
1.description: Increase the number of Hungering Arrow bounces by 1.  Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Hungering Arrow refunds 40 Mana and permanently increases the damage of its initial impact by 6.
1.longDescription: Increase the number of Hungering Arrow bounces by 1.  Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Hungering Arrow refunds 40 Mana and permanently increases the damage of its initial impact by 6.

1.name: Fire At Will
1.description: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Multishot grants 2 Hatred and permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes with Multishot, increase its damage by 40.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Multishot grants 2 Hatred and permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes with Multishot, increase its damage by 40.

1.name: Creed of the Hunter
1.description: Quest: Every 50 Basic Attacks against Heroes increases Hatred's damage bonus per stack by 1%, up to 6%.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus Attack Speed. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.
1.longDescription: Quest: Every 50 Basic Attacks against Heroes increases Hatred's damage bonus per stack by 1%, up to 6%.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus Attack Speed. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.

4.name: Arsenal
4.description: Increase the range of Multishot by 20%. Multishot also fires 3 grenades that deal 100 (+4% per level) damage and refund 25 Mana after hitting enemy Heroes.
4.longDescription: Increase the range of Multishot by 20%. Multishot also fires 3 grenades that deal 100 (+4% per level) damage and refund 25 Mana after hitting enemy Heroes.

4.name: Death Dealer
4.description: Increase Vaults Basic Attack damage bonus from 6% to 15% per stack of Hatred. If this attack kills its victim within 1.5 seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Vault by 5 seconds.
4.longDescription: Increase Vaults Basic Attack damage bonus from 6% to 15% per stack of Hatred. If this attack kills its victim within 1.5 seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Vault by 5 seconds.

4.name: Repeating Arrow
4.description: Vault no longer has a Mana cost. Casting Vault resets the cooldown of Hungering Arrow.
4.longDescription: Vault no longer has a Mana cost. Casting Vault resets the cooldown of Hungering Arrow.

7.name: Monster Hunter
7.description: Hungering Arrow deals 150% additional damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
7.longDescription: Hungering Arrow deals 150% additional damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

7.name: Frost Shot
7.description: Multishot Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Hungering Arrows deals 25% more damage to Slowed enemies.
7.longDescription: Multishot Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Hungering Arrows deals 25% more damage to Slowed enemies.

7.name: Hot Pursuit
7.description: Increase the Movement Speed bonus of each stack of Hatred from 1% to 2%.
7.longDescription: Increase the Movement Speed bonus of each stack of Hatred from 1% to 2%.

10.name: Strafe
10.description: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 (+4% per level) damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.
10.longDescription: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 (+4% per level) damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.

10.name: Rain of Vengeance
10.description: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 (+4% per level) damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds.  Stores up to 2 charges.
10.longDescription: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 (+4% per level) damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds.  Stores up to 2 charges.

13.name: Siphoning Arrows
13.description: Hitting a Hero with Hungering Arrow heals Valla for 4% of her maximum Health, and Multishot heals for 2%.
13.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Hungering Arrow heals Valla for 4% of her maximum Health, and Multishot heals for 2%.

13.name: Tempered by Discipline
13.description: Basic Attacks heal for 10% of the damage dealt, increased by 2% per Hatred stack.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks heal for 10% of the damage dealt, increased by 2% per Hatred stack.

13.name: Gloom
13.description: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting 3 Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 15 Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for 1.2 (+4% per level) Health per second.
13.longDescription: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting 3 Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 15 Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for 1.2 (+4% per level) Health per second.

16.name: Punishment
16.description: While at max Hatred, Multishot's cooldown recharges 50% faster.  Passive: Reduce Multishot's Mana cost from 75 to 55.
16.longDescription: While at max Hatred, Multishot's cooldown recharges 50% faster.  Passive: Reduce Multishot's Mana cost from 75 to 55.

16.name: Seething Hatred
16.description: While at max Hatred, increase all damage dealt by 10%.
16.longDescription: While at max Hatred, increase all damage dealt by 10%.

16.name: Manticore
16.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same Hero deals an additional 4% of their maximum Health as damage.
16.longDescription: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same Hero deals an additional 4% of their maximum Health as damage.

20.name: Death Siphon
20.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Strafe increases its duration by 0.125 seconds. Strafe also fires penetrating bolts in a line for 34 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds.
20.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Strafe increases its duration by 0.125 seconds. Strafe also fires penetrating bolts in a line for 34 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds.

20.name: Storm of Vengeance
20.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Rain of Vengeance by 5 seconds.  Passive: Each stack of Hatred increases your Attack Speed by 2%. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Attack Speed.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Rain of Vengeance by 5 seconds.  Passive: Each stack of Hatred increases your Attack Speed by 2%. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Attack Speed.

20.name: Acrobat
20.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Vault. Drop 3 Caltrops while Vaulting that deal 60 (+4% per level) damage and Slow enemies by 40% for 1 second.
20.longDescription: Gain 2 additional charges of Vault. Drop 3 Caltrops while Vaulting that deal 60 (+4% per level) damage and Slow enemies by 40% for 1 second.

20.name: Farflight Quiver
20.description: Gain 20% Basic Attack range. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Basic Attack range.
20.longDescription: Gain 20% Basic Attack range. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Basic Attack range.

1.name: Lion's Maw
1.description: Quest: Every time Lion's Fang hits a Hero, increase its damage by 7, up to 175.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, the Slow is increased to 50% and its duration is increased to 2 seconds.
1.longDescription: Quest: Every time Lion's Fang hits a Hero, increase its damage by 7, up to 175.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, the Slow is increased to 50% and its duration is increased to 2 seconds.

1.name: Overpower
1.description: When Parry blocks a Hero's Basic Attack, Heroic Strike's cooldown is refreshed and the next one does 40% more damage.
1.longDescription: When Parry blocks a Hero's Basic Attack, Heroic Strike's cooldown is refreshed and the next one does 40% more damage.

1.name: High King's Quest
1.description: Quest: Hit 50 Heroes with Basic Attacks. Quest: Participate in 5 Hero Takedowns. Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Completing a Quest grants 10 Base Attack Damage. Completing all 3 Quests grants an additional 30 Base Attack Damage.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit 50 Heroes with Basic Attacks. Quest: Participate in 5 Hero Takedowns. Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Completing a Quest grants 10 Base Attack Damage. Completing all 3 Quests grants an additional 30 Base Attack Damage.

4.name: Taunt
4.description: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for 1.25 seconds.  Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by 40%.
4.longDescription: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for 1.25 seconds.  Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by 40%.

4.name: Colossus Smash
4.description: Smash a target enemy, dealing 185 (+4% per level) damage and lowering their Armor by 25 for 3 seconds, causing them to take 25% increased damage.  Passive: Base Attack Damage increased by 100%. Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration reduced by 10%.
4.longDescription: Smash a target enemy, dealing 185 (+4% per level) damage and lowering their Armor by 25 for 3 seconds, causing them to take 25% increased damage.  Passive: Base Attack Damage increased by 100%. Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration reduced by 10%.

4.name: Twin Blades of Fury
4.description: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by an additional 7 seconds, and increase Varian's Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Attack Speed increased by 100%. Passive: Base Attack Damage reduced by 25%.
4.longDescription: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by an additional 7 seconds, and increase Varian's Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Attack Speed increased by 100%. Passive: Base Attack Damage reduced by 25%.

7.name: Lionheart
7.description: Increase Lion's Fang's healing from Heroes by 75%.
7.longDescription: Increase Lion's Fang's healing from Heroes by 75%.

7.name: Second Wind
7.description: Basic Attacks heal Varian for 1% of his maximum Health. While below 50% Health, they also heal him for 50% of the damage dealt.
7.longDescription: Basic Attacks heal Varian for 1% of his maximum Health. While below 50% Health, they also heal him for 50% of the damage dealt.

7.name: Victory Rush
7.description: Every 30 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack will heal him for 350 (+4% per level) Health. When a nearby enemy Minion or Monster dies, the cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
7.longDescription: Every 30 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack will heal him for 350 (+4% per level) Health. When a nearby enemy Minion or Monster dies, the cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.

10.name: Shield Wall
10.description: Parry grants Protected, preventing all incoming damage while active. Additionally, Parry's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, but it loses 1 charge.
10.longDescription: Parry grants Protected, preventing all incoming damage while active. Additionally, Parry's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, but it loses 1 charge.

10.name: Warbringer
10.description: Reduce Charge's cooldown by 8 seconds and Mana cost from 45 to 25. Additionally, Charge can be cast on allied Heroes.
10.longDescription: Reduce Charge's cooldown by 8 seconds and Mana cost from 45 to 25. Additionally, Charge can be cast on allied Heroes.

13.name: Juggernaut
13.description: Charge deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 4% of their maximum Health.
13.longDescription: Charge deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 4% of their maximum Health.

13.name: Mortal Strike
13.description: Heroes hit by Heroic Strike receive 40% reduced healing for 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Heroes hit by Heroic Strike receive 40% reduced healing for 4 seconds.

13.name: Shattering Throw
13.description: Activate to throw a sword at a target Hero that deals 50 (+4% per level) damage, and up to 1400 (+4% per level) bonus damage to their Shields.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal up to 200% bonus Physical Damage to Shields.
13.longDescription: Activate to throw a sword at a target Hero that deals 50 (+4% per level) damage, and up to 1400 (+4% per level) bonus damage to their Shields.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal up to 200% bonus Physical Damage to Shields.

16.name: Banner of Stormwind
16.description: Activate to place a Banner that grants 25% increased Movement Speed to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to place a Banner that grants 25% increased Movement Speed to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.

16.name: Banner of Ironforge
16.description: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20 Armor to nearby allied Heroes, reducing damage taken by 20%. Lasts 12 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20 Armor to nearby allied Heroes, reducing damage taken by 20%. Lasts 12 seconds.

16.name: Banner of Dalaran
16.description: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20% increased Spell Power to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20% increased Spell Power to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.

20.name: Vigilance
20.description: Being hit by a Hero Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Taunt by 1 second.
20.longDescription: Being hit by a Hero Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Taunt by 1 second.

20.name: Master at Arms
20.description: Colossus Smash affects all enemies near the target, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
20.longDescription: Colossus Smash affects all enemies near the target, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.

20.name: Frenzy
20.description: Twin Blades of Fury increases Heroic Strike damage by an additional 25%, and Basic Attacks increase his Movement Speed by an additional 10%.
20.longDescription: Twin Blades of Fury increases Heroic Strike damage by an additional 25%, and Basic Attacks increase his Movement Speed by an additional 10%.

20.name: Glory to the Alliance
20.description: Banner now also increases health regeneration and all healing received for nearby allied Heroes by 50%, and the cooldown is reduced by 50%.
20.longDescription: Banner now also increases health regeneration and all healing received for nearby allied Heroes by 50%, and the cooldown is reduced by 50%.

20.name: Demoralizing Shout
20.description: Activate to demoralize nearby enemy Heroes, reducing damage they deal by 40% for 5 seconds.  Each time an enemy Hero affected by Demoralizing Shout deals damage to a Hero, reduce its cooldown and Parry's cooldown by 5%.
20.longDescription: Activate to demoralize nearby enemy Heroes, reducing damage they deal by 40% for 5 seconds.  Each time an enemy Hero affected by Demoralizing Shout deals damage to a Hero, reduce its cooldown and Parry's cooldown by 5%.

1.name: Guitar Hero
1.description: While Guitar Solo is active, E.T.C. heals for 60% of his damage dealt by Basic Attacks. Basic Attacks increase the duration of Guitar Solo by 0.5 seconds.
1.longDescription: While Guitar Solo is active, E.T.C. heals for 60% of his damage dealt by Basic Attacks. Basic Attacks increase the duration of Guitar Solo by 0.5 seconds.

1.name: Prog Rock
1.description: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe permanently increases the healing per second of Guitar Solo by 5, to a maximum of 100  Reward: After gathering 20 Regeneration Globes, Guitar Solo also heals nearby allied Heroes for 50 (+4% per level) Health every second while it is active.
1.longDescription: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe permanently increases the healing per second of Guitar Solo by 5, to a maximum of 100 Reward: After gathering 20 Regeneration Globes, Guitar Solo also heals nearby allied Heroes for 50 (+4% per level) Health every second while it is active.

1.name: Block Party
1.description: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes a stack of Block, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next Hero Basic Attack for 8 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Maximum 2 stacks of Block.
1.longDescription: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes a stack of Block, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next Hero Basic Attack for 8 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Maximum 2 stacks of Block.

4.name: Crowd Surfer
4.description: Allows Powerslide to travel over walls and terrain. If no enemies are hit, reduce the cooldown by 6 seconds and refund the Mana cost.
4.longDescription: Allows Powerslide to travel over walls and terrain. If no enemies are hit, reduce the cooldown by 6 seconds and refund the Mana cost.

4.name: Loud Speakers
4.description: Increases Face Melt range and knockback by 50%.
4.longDescription: Increases Face Melt range and knockback by 50%.

4.name: Speed Metal
4.description: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes 20% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.
4.longDescription: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes 20% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.

7.name: Pinball Wizard
7.description: Hitting an enemy with Powerslide causes the next Face Melt against them within 2 seconds to deal 300% more damage.
7.longDescription: Face Melt does 300% more damage to enemies recently affected by Powerslide.

7.name: Hammer-on
7.description: E.T.C.'s Basic Attacks deal 12% more damage, increased to 36% while Guitar Solo is active.
7.longDescription: E.T.C.'s Basic Attacks deal 12% more damage, increased to 36% while Guitar Solo is active.

7.name: Echo Pedal
7.description: Using a Basic or Heroic Ability releases two pulses of 18 (+4% per level) damage. This deals 200% bonus damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. The first occurs instantly, the second occurs 2 seconds later.
7.longDescription: Using a Basic or Heroic Ability releases two pulses of 18 (+4% per level) damage. This deals 200% bonus damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. The first occurs instantly, the second occurs 2 seconds later.

10.name: Mosh Pit
10.description: After 0.75 seconds, channel to stun nearby enemies for 4 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 0.75 seconds, channel to stun nearby enemies for 4 seconds.

10.name: Stage Dive
10.description: Leap to target location, landing after 2.75 seconds, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area, and slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.
10.longDescription: Leap to target location, landing after 2.75 seconds, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area, and slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.

13.name: Mic Check
13.description: Hitting at least 2 targets with Face Melt reduces its cooldown by 6 seconds.
13.longDescription: Hitting at least 2 targets with Face Melt reduces its cooldown by 6 seconds.

13.name: Encore
13.description: Face Melt leaves an Amp behind, which will knock enemies away again 2 seconds later.  Passive: Each enemy Hero hit by Face Melt or the Amp reduces your Heroic Ability cooldown by 4%.
13.longDescription: Face Melt leaves an Amp behind, which will knock enemies away again 2 seconds later. Enemy Heroes knocked back by Face Melt or the Amp reduce E.T.C.’s Heroic cooldown by 4%.

13.name: Face Smelt
13.description: Face Melt Slows enemies by 50%, decaying over 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Face Melt Slows enemies by 50%, decaying over 2 seconds.

16.name: Show Stopper
16.description: After using Powerslide, gain 35 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing all damage taken by 35%.
16.longDescription: After using Powerslide, gain 35 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing all damage taken by 35%.

16.name: Aggressive Shredding
16.description: E.T.C.'s Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Guitar Solo by 0.75 seconds.
16.longDescription: E.T.C.'s Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Guitar Solo by 0.75 second.

16.name: Imposing Presence
16.description: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.

20.name: Tour Bus
20.description: Channeling Mosh Pit refreshes Powerslide's cooldown, and it can be cast to increase Mosh Pit's duration by 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Channeling Mosh Pit refreshes Powerslide's cooldown, and it can be cast to increase Mosh Pit's duration by 2 seconds.

20.name: Crowd Pleaser
20.description: Stage Dive's impact area is 50% bigger, and its Slow is increased by 30%.
20.longDescription: Stage Dive's impact area is 50% bigger. Increase the Slow amount of Stage Dive by 30%.

20.name: Death Metal
20.description: Upon dying, a ghost uses Mosh Pit at E.T.C's location.
20.longDescription: Upon dying, a ghost uses Mosh Pit at E.T.C's location.

20.name: Power of the Horde
20.description: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds, increased by 2% for each other allied Hero in the area.
20.longDescription: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds, increased by 2% for each other allied Hero in the area.

20.name: Ride the Lightning
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location and deal 48 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemy Heroes. The cooldown is reduced by 10 second for every enemy Hero hit, up to 50 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to teleport to a nearby location and deal 48 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemy Heroes. The cooldown is reduced by 10 second for every enemy Hero hit, up to 50 seconds.

1.name: Enduring Swarm
1.description: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by 0.5 seconds and grants 50 Spell Armor while active.
1.longDescription: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by 0.5 seconds and grants 50 Spell Armor while active.

1.name: Tissue Regeneration
1.description: Regeneration Globes grant 10 Essence.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases Health Regeneration by 4, up to 40, and maximum Essence by 1, up to 10.
1.longDescription: Regeneration Globes grant 10 Essence.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases Health Regeneration by 4, up to 40, and maximum Essence by 1, up to 10.

1.name: Enhanced Agility
1.description: Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus now lasts for 4 seconds after leaving a bush.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases the Movement Speed bonus of Brushstalker by 2%, up to 20%.
1.longDescription: Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus now lasts for 4 seconds after leaving a bush.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases the Movement Speed bonus of Brushstalker by 2%, up to 20%.

4.name: Lurker Strain
4.description: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for 3 seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing 125 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing them by 30% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by 2 seconds.
4.longDescription: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for 3 seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing 125 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing them by 30% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by 2 seconds.

4.name: One-Who-Collects
4.description: Increases Essence collected from Minions by 50%. Dark Swarm deals 40% more damage to Mercenaries.
4.longDescription: Increases Essence collected from Minions by 50%. Dark Swarm deals 40% more damage to Mercenaries.

4.name: Hero Stalker
4.description: Increases Essence gained from Takedowns by 100%, and gain 1 Essence for each enemy Hero hit by Dark Swarm, up to 3 at once.
4.longDescription: Increases Essence gained from Takedowns by 100%, and gain 1 Essence for each enemy Hero hit by Dark Swarm, up to 3 at once.

7.name: Feeding Frenzy
7.description: Increase Drag's duration by 0.5 seconds.  Gambit: Basic Attacks reduce Drag's cooldown by 1.5 seconds. Every death reduces this cooldown reduction by 0.25 seconds, up to 3 times.
7.longDescription: Increase Drag's duration by 0.5 seconds.  Gambit: Basic Attacks reduce Drag's cooldown by 1.5 seconds. Every death reduces this cooldown reduction by 0.25 seconds, up to 3 times.

7.name: Paralyzing Enzymes
7.description: Drag Slows the target by 40% and reduces their healing received by 50% while active and for 2 seconds after ending. Dehaka's Basic Attacks increase the duration of the healing reduction to 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Drag Slows the target by 40% and reduces their healing received by 50% while active and for 2 seconds after ending. Dehaka's Basic Attacks increase the duration of the healing reduction to 2 seconds.

7.name: Symbiosis
7.description: Every time Dark Swarm damages an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.4 seconds.
7.longDescription: Every time Dark Swarm damages an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.4 seconds.

10.name: Isolation
10.description: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.
10.longDescription: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.

10.name: Adaptation
10.description: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.
10.longDescription: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.

13.name: Ferocious Stalker
13.description: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by 15% for 0.75 seconds and deals 50% more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.
13.longDescription: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by 15% for 0.75 seconds and deals 50% more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.

13.name: Primal Swarm
13.description: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose 10 Armor for 0.75 seconds, causing them to take 10% extra damage.
13.longDescription: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose 10 Armor for 0.75 seconds, causing them to take 10% extra damage.

13.name: Primal Rage
13.description: Gain 1.25% increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.
13.longDescription: Gain 1.25% increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.

16.name: Elongated Tongue
16.description: Increase Drag range by 20%.
16.longDescription: Increase Drag range by 20%.

16.name: Tunneling Claws
16.description: Increase movement speed while Burrowing to 120%.
16.longDescription: Increase movement speed while Burrowing to 120%.

16.name: Pack Leader
16.description: Dehaka gains 40 Armor and 15% increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for 4 seconds after leaving.
16.longDescription: Dehaka gains 40 Armor and 15% increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for 4 seconds after leaving.

20.name: Contagion
20.description: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target, but it deals 60% less damage to all targets.
20.longDescription: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target, but it deals 60% less damage to all targets.

20.name: Change Is Survival
20.description: Increases Adaptation healing to 200% of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increases Adaptation healing to 200% of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.

20.name: Essence Claws
20.description: Dehaka's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1 second. If the target is a Hero, Dehaka gains 5 Essence.
20.longDescription: Dehaka's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1 second. If the target is a Hero, Dehaka gains 5 Essence.

20.name: Apex Predator
20.description: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by 120 seconds and the cast time by 0.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by 120 seconds and the cast time by 0.5 seconds.

1.name: Exterminator
1.description: Basic Attacks deal 50% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. This is increased to 125% while Inspire is active.  Passive: Inspire does not expire on friendly Minions and Mercenaries.
1.longDescription: Basic Attacks deal 50% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. This is increased to 125% while Inspire is active.  Passive: Inspire does not expire on friendly Minions and Mercenaries.

1.name: Veteran Marksman
1.description: Quest: Every time the primary target of Give 'Em Some Pepper is a Hero, permanently increase its damage bonus by 0.75%.  Gambit: Gain 60% bonus Give 'Em Some Pepper damage. Every death reduces this bonus by 15%.
1.longDescription: Quest: Every time the primary target of Give 'Em Some Pepper is a Hero, permanently increase its damage bonus by 0.75%.  Gambit: Gain 60% bonus Give 'Em Some Pepper damage. Every death reduces this bonus by 15%.

1.name: Ace in the Hole
1.description: Deal 12% more damage to Stunned or Slowed Heroes.  Enemy Heroes hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper are Slowed by 10% for 2.5 seconds.
1.longDescription: Deal 12% more damage to Stunned or Slowed Heroes.  Enemy Heroes hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper are Slowed by 10% for 2.5 seconds.

4.name: Fight or Flight

4.longDescription: Reduce Adrenaline Rush's cooldown by 10 seconds. Casting Adrenaline Rush grants 25 Armor for 3 seconds.

4.name: Sustaining Rounds

4.longDescription: Give 'Em Some Pepper heals Raynor for 3% of his maximum Health, increased to 6% if the primary target is a Hero.

4.name: Behemoth Armor
4.description: Gain 200 bonus maximum Health.   Quest: Every time Give 'Em Some Pepper's primary target is a Hero, gain an additional 8 maximum Health.
4.longDescription: Gain 200 bonus maximum Health.   Quest: Every time Give 'Em Some Pepper's primary target is a Hero, gain an additional 8 maximum Health.

7.name: Heavy Slugs
7.description: Increase Penetrating Round's Slow by 15% and its duration by 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Increase Penetrating Round's Slow by 15% and its duration by 2 seconds.

7.name: Fuel the Rush
7.description: While Inspire is active, Adrenaline Rush's cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks is increased to 2.25 seconds against non-Heroes, and to 4.5 seconds against Heroes.  Passive: Reduce the Mana cost of Adrenaline Rush from 75 to 45.
7.longDescription: While Inspire is active, Adrenaline Rush's cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks is increased to 2.25 seconds against non-Heroes, and to 4.5 seconds against Heroes.  Passive: Reduce the Mana cost of Adrenaline Rush from 75 to 45.

7.name: Unstable Compound
7.description: Increase the radius of Give 'Em Some Pepper by 15%. Each enemy Hero hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper grants Raynor 10 Mana and reduces the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 1.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Increase the radius of Give 'Em Some Pepper by 15%. Each enemy Hero hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper grants Raynor 10 Mana and reduces the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 1.5 seconds.

10.name: Hyperion
10.description: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemies for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing 794 (+4% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemies for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing 794 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: Raynor's Raider
10.description: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals 84 (+4% per level) damage per second and regenerates 75 (+4% per level) Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last 4 seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.  The Banshee respawns automatically after 45 seconds.
10.longDescription: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals 84 (+4% per level) damage per second and regenerates 75 (+4% per level) Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last 4 seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.  The Banshee respawns automatically after 45 seconds.

13.name: Line 'Em Up
13.description: Reduce the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 3 seconds. Penetrating Round hitting two or more enemy Heroes reduces its cooldown by an additional 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 3 seconds. Penetrating Round hitting two or more enemy Heroes reduces its cooldown by an additional 3 seconds.

13.name: Giddy-Up
13.description: Gain 10% Movement Speed while mounted and unmounted. Inspire grants 10% more Movement Speed.
13.longDescription: Gain 10% Movement Speed while mounted and unmounted. Inspire grants 10% more Movement Speed.

13.name: Give Me More!
13.description: While Inspire is active, gain 1 Basic Attack range.  Passive: Increase Adrenaline Rush duration by 0.5 seconds, increasing the total amount healed by 12.5% of Raynor's maximum Health.
13.longDescription: While Inspire is active, gain 1 Basic Attack range.  Passive: Increase Adrenaline Rush duration by 0.5 seconds, increasing the total amount healed by 12.5% of Raynor's maximum Health.

16.name: Paint Them Red
16.description: Increase the damage of Penetrating Round by 50% and heal for 90% of the damage Penetrating Round deals to Heroes.
16.longDescription: Increase the damage of Penetrating Round by 50% and heal for 90% of the damage Penetrating Round deals to Heroes.

16.name: Rallying Cry
16.description: Increase the Attack Speed bonus of Inspire by 20%.  Passive: After every 12 Basic Attacks, cast Inspire for free.
16.longDescription: Increase the Attack Speed bonus of Inspire by 20%.  Passive: After every 12 Basic Attacks, cast Inspire for free.

16.name: Bounty Hunter
16.description: If Give 'Em Some Pepper's target is a Hero, it deals an additional 3% of their maximum Health as damage and grants Raynor 10 Armor for 3 seconds.  Activate Give 'Em Some Pepper to apply it to Raynor's next Basic Attack.
16.longDescription: If Give 'Em Some Pepper's target is a Hero, it deals an additional 3% of their maximum Health as damage and grants Raynor 10 Armor for 3 seconds.  Activate Give 'Em Some Pepper to apply it to Raynor's next Basic Attack.

20.name: Cavalry's Arrived
20.description: Give 'Em Some Pepper lowers the cooldown of Hyperion by 5 seconds if the primary target is a Hero. These Heroes are targeted by the Hyperion for 100% increased damage for 6 seconds.
20.longDescription: Give 'Em Some Pepper lowers the cooldown of Hyperion by 5 seconds if the primary target is a Hero. These Heroes are targeted by the Hyperion for 100% increased damage for 6 seconds.

20.name: Dusk Wing
20.description: Increase the Health and leash range of Raynor's Raider by 100%. Its Basic Attack lowers enemy Hero Armor by 3 for 1 second, stacking up to 30.
20.longDescription: Increase the Health and leash range of Raynor's Raider by 100%. Its Basic Attack lowers enemy Hero Armor by 3 for 1 second, stacking up to 30.

20.name: Raiders Roll
20.description: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable and continues healing for an additional 2 seconds. The additional duration ends upon reaching 70% Health.
20.longDescription: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable and continues healing for an additional 2 seconds. The additional duration ends upon reaching 70% Health.

20.name: Sergeant Pepper
20.description: Give 'Em Some Pepper now activates every 3 Basic Attacks.
20.longDescription: Give 'Em Some Pepper now activates every 3 Basic Attacks.

20.name: Execute Orders
20.description: When Raynor is killed, the Hyperion is cast towards the closest enemy Hero. It lasts 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemy Heroes of the lowest Health in the area for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it will also fire its Yamato Cannon at the lowest Health enemy Hero, dealing 395 (+4% per level) damage.  Passive: Reduce Raynor's death timer by 35 seconds.
20.longDescription: When Raynor is killed, the Hyperion is cast towards the closest enemy Hero. It lasts 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemy Heroes of the lowest Health in the area for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it will also fire its Yamato Cannon at the lowest Health enemy Hero, dealing 395 (+4% per level) damage.  Passive: Reduce Raynor's death timer by 35 seconds.

1.name: Consuming Fire
1.description: Consuming Blaze heals for 150% more when a Hero is Ignited.
1.longDescription: Consuming Blaze heals for 150% more when a Hero is Ignited.

1.name: Calloused Hide
1.description: While under 60% maximum Health, Cho gains 15% increased Movement Speed and healing received.
1.longDescription: While under 60% maximum Health, Cho gains 15% increased Movement Speed and healing received.

1.name: The Will of Cho
1.description: Quest: Killing enemy Minions grants 1 stack of The Will of Cho, and Hero takedowns grant 10 stacks. Gain 1 Armor for every 30 stacks of The Will of Cho, up to a maximum of 10 Armor.  This Armor bonus stacks with Ogre Hide.
1.longDescription: Quest: Killing enemy Minions grants 1 stack of The Will of Cho, and Hero takedowns grant 10 stacks. Gain 1 Armor for every 30 stacks of The Will of Cho, up to a maximum of 10 Armor.  This Armor bonus stacks with Ogre Hide.

4.name: Uppercut
4.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Surging Fist deals additional damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their max Health and reduces the cooldown of Surging Fist by 5 seconds.
4.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Surging Fist deals additional damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their max Health and reduces the cooldown of Surging Fist by 5 seconds.

4.name: Rollback
4.description: Rune Bomb rolls back to Cho, damaging enemies in its path.
4.longDescription: Rune Bomb rolls back to Cho, damaging enemies in its path.

4.name: Seared Flesh
4.description: Each consecutive Basic Attack to enemy Heroes deals 20% more damage, to a maximum of 60% damage. This bonus lasts 5 seconds or until a non-Heroic enemy is attacked.
4.longDescription: Each consecutive Basic Attack to enemy Heroes deals 20% more damage, to a maximum of 60% damage. This bonus lasts 5 seconds or until a non-Heroic enemy is attacked.

7.name: Power Surge
7.description: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Surging Fist are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Gain 15% Movement Speed while charging Surging Fist and for 2.5 seconds after casting the Ability.
7.longDescription: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Surging Fist are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Gain 15% Movement Speed while charging Surging Fist and for 2.5 seconds after casting the Ability.

7.name: Firestarter
7.description: Basic Attacks against ignited Heroes decreases the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Basic Attacks against ignited Heroes decreases the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 3 seconds.

7.name: Enraged Regeneration
7.description: Each time Cho hits an enemy Hero with an Ability or Basic Attack, he heals for 60 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Gall's Dread Orb receive 35% less healing for 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Each time Cho hits an enemy Hero with an Ability or Basic Attack, he heals for 60 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Gall's Dread Orb receive 35% less healing for 2 seconds.

10.name: Hammer of Twilight
10.description: Activate to swing the Hammer of Twilight, dealing 150 (+4.5% per level) damage, pushing enemies away, and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.  Passive: Cho's Basic Attacks deal 25% increased damage.
10.longDescription: Activate to swing the Hammer of Twilight, dealing 150 (+4.5% per level) damage, pushing enemies away, and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.  Passive: Cho's Basic Attacks deal 25% increased damage.

10.name: Upheaval
10.description: After 1 second, pull enemies towards Cho'gall, Slowing them by 25% for 3 seconds and dealing 175 (+4% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, pull enemies towards Cho'gall, Slowing them by 25% for 3 seconds and dealing 175 (+4% per level) damage.

13.name: Surging Dash
13.description: While Channeling Surging Fist, Cho heals for 150 (+4% per level) Health per second.
13.longDescription: While Channeling Surging Fist, Cho heals for 150 (+4% per level) Health per second.

13.name: Twilight Veil
13.description: Activate to increase the Armor bonus of Ogre Hide to 75 for 4 seconds. If cast while Ogre Rage is active, it instantly swaps to Ogre Hide.
13.longDescription: Activate to increase the Armor bonus of Ogre Hide to 75 for 4 seconds. If cast while Ogre Rage is active, it instantly swaps to Ogre Hide.

13.name: Molten Block
13.description: Activate to enter Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds, damaging nearby enemies for 92 (+4% per level) damage per second.
13.longDescription: Activate to enter Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds, damaging nearby enemies for 92 (+4% per level) damage per second.

16.name: Frenzied Fists
16.description: Gain 75% Attack Speed for 5 seconds after using Surging Fist.
16.longDescription: Gain 75% Attack Speed for 5 seconds after using Surging Fist.

16.name: Runic Feedback
16.description: Gall's Runic Blast reduces Cho's Rune Bomb cooldown by 1 second per enemy hit, and 2 seconds for each Hero hit.
16.longDescription: Gall's Runic Blast reduces Cho's Rune Bomb cooldown by 1 second per enemy hit, and 2 seconds for each Hero hit.

16.name: Runed Gauntlet
16.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Cho and Gall's Heroic Abilities by 6%.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Cho and Gall's Heroic Abilities by 6%.

20.name: C'Thun's Gift
20.description: Cho's Basic Attack becomes ranged and Slows targets by 20% for 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Cho's Basic Attack becomes ranged and Slows targets by 20% for 2 seconds.

20.name: Favor of the Old Gods
20.description: Upheaval Roots enemy Heroes for 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Upheaval Roots enemy Heroes for 2 seconds.

20.name: Fuel for the Flame
20.description: Basic Attacks against enemies cause them to explode, dealing 21 (+4% per level) damage to them and 45 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. This damage is doubled against enemy Heroes.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemies cause them to explode, dealing 21 (+4% per level) damage to them and 45 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. This damage is doubled against enemy Heroes.

20.name: Hour of Twilight
20.description: Decreases Cho'gall's death timer by 50%.
20.longDescription: Decreases Cho'gall's death timer by 50%.

1.name: Keep Moving!
1.description: Increases the Movement Speed bonus of Shove by 10% and its duration by 2 seconds.
1.longDescription: Increases the Movement Speed bonus of Shove by 10% and its duration by 2 seconds.

1.name: Taskmaster
1.description: Every time Cho is hit by a Hero Basic Attack, reduce the cooldown of Shove by 1 second.
1.longDescription: Every time Cho is hit by a Hero Basic Attack, reduce the cooldown of Shove by 1 second.

1.name: We See You!
1.description: Eye of Kilrogg's cooldown is decreased by 25 seconds, its range is increased by 33%, and the number of Basic Attacks required to kill it is increased by 1.
1.longDescription: Eye of Kilrogg's cooldown is decreased by 25 seconds, its range is increased by 33%, and the number of Basic Attacks required to kill it is increased by 1.

4.name: Rising Dread
4.description: Each bounce of Dread Orb increases its radius by 25% and damage by 15%. Activate Dread Orb before the second bounce ends to reverse the direction of the third bounce.
4.longDescription: Each bounce of Dread Orb increases its radius by 25% and damage by 15%. Activate Dread Orb before the second bounce ends to reverse the direction of the third bounce.

4.name: Runic Persistence
4.description: Runic Blast deals an additional 180 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds in an area around the detonation point.
4.longDescription: Runic Blast deals an additional 180 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds in an area around the detonation point.

4.name: Bomb's Away
4.description: Quest: Damaging a Hero with Runic Blast increases its damage by 5, up to 200.  Reward: After damaging 20 Heroes, the range and speed of Cho's Rune Bomb is increased by 20%.
4.longDescription: Quest: Damaging a Hero with Runic Blast increases its damage by 5, up to 200.  Reward: After damaging 20 Heroes, the range and speed of Cho's Rune Bomb is increased by 20%.

7.name: Edge of Madness
7.description: Every subsequent hit of Shadowflame against the same enemy Hero deals an additional 12% damage, to a maximum of 60%. These bonuses are lost if the Hero has not been hit for 7 seconds.
7.longDescription: Every subsequent hit of Shadowflame against the same enemy Hero deals an additional 12% damage, to a maximum of 60%. These bonuses are lost if the Hero has not been hit for 7 seconds.

7.name: Double Trouble
7.description: Quest: If Shadowflame hits an enemy Hero that is afflicted by Cho's Consuming Blaze, its cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, Shadowflame's cooldown is instead permanently reduced by 0.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Quest: If Shadowflame hits an enemy Hero that is afflicted by Cho's Consuming Blaze, its cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, Shadowflame's cooldown is instead permanently reduced by 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Ogre Rampage
7.description: Increase the damage bonus of Ogre Rage by 5%. Each time Gall damages an enemy Hero while Ogre Rage is active, this bonus increases by 1% for 4 seconds, up to an additional 10% bonus damage.
7.longDescription: Increase the damage bonus of Ogre Rage by 5%. Each time Gall damages an enemy Hero while Ogre Rage is active, this bonus increases by 1% for 4 seconds, up to an additional 10% bonus damage.

10.name: Shadow Bolt Volley
10.description: After 1 second, unleash 20 Shadow Bolts over 4 seconds, each dealing 87 (+4% per level) damage to the first target hit. The bolts fire towards your mouse.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, unleash 20 Shadow Bolts over 4 seconds, each dealing 87 (+4% per level) damage to the first target hit. The bolts fire towards your mouse.

10.name: Twisting Nether
10.description: After 1 second, nearby enemies are Slowed by 50% while Gall channels, up to 5 seconds. Activate to deal 353 (+5% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, nearby enemies are Slowed by 50% while Gall channels, up to 5 seconds. Activate to deal 353 (+5% per level) damage.

13.name: Searing Shadows
13.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Shadowflame take an additional 2% of their maximum Health as damage.
13.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Shadowflame take an additional 2% of their maximum Health as damage.

13.name: Psychotic Break
13.description: Increase Gall's damage to enemy Heroes by 10%. Upon dying, Gall gains Ogre Rage and can use Abilities for 10 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase Gall's damage to enemy Heroes by 10%. Upon dying, Gall gains Ogre Rage and can use Abilities for 10 seconds.

13.name: Twilight Nova
13.description: After the first bounce of Dread Orb, 2 extra bombs bounce to the sides once.
13.longDescription: After the first bounce of Dread Orb, 2 extra bombs bounce to the sides once.

16.name: Leaden Orb
16.description: Dread Orb Stuns enemy Heroes for 0.75 seconds.
16.longDescription: Dread Orb Stuns enemy Heroes for 0.75 seconds.

16.name: Deafening Blast
16.description: Runic Blast Silences enemy Heroes for 1.25 seconds.
16.longDescription: Runic Blast Silences enemy Heroes for 1.25 seconds.

16.name: Shadowsnare
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by your Basic Abilities are Slowed by 15% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 2 times.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by your Basic Abilities are Slowed by 15% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 2 times.

20.name: Shadowfury
20.description: Shadow Bolt Volley hits all enemies in its path.
20.longDescription: Shadow Bolt Volley hits all enemies in its path.

20.name: Shifting Nether
20.description: Twisting Nether now teleports Cho to a targeted location before it begins Channeling.
20.longDescription: Twisting Nether now teleports Cho to a targeted location before it begins Channeling.

20.name: The Will of Gall
20.description: Takedowns permanently increase the bonus of Ogre Rage by 2%.
20.longDescription: Takedowns permanently increase the bonus of Ogre Rage by 2%.

20.name: Twilight Frenzy
20.description: Activate to reduce the cooldowns of Shadowflame and Dread Orb to 2 seconds for the next 6 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to reduce the cooldowns of Shadowflame and Dread Orb to 2 seconds for the next 6 seconds.

1.name: Wolfheart
1.description: Increase the cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks during Inner Beast from 0.5 to 1.2 seconds, and Worgen Form's Armor bonus from 10 to 15.
1.longDescription: Increase the cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks during Inner Beast from 0.5 to 1.2 seconds, and Worgen Form's Armor bonus from 10 to 15.

1.name: Perfect Aim
