1.description: Increases Gilnean Cocktail's range by 30% and refunds 45 Mana if it hits an enemy Hero.
1.longDescription: Increases Gilnean Cocktail's range by 30% and refunds 45 Mana if it hits an enemy Hero.

1.name: Viciousness
1.description: Increases Inner Beast's duration to 4 seconds, and causes Ability damage to also refresh its duration.
1.longDescription: Increases Inner Beast's duration to 4 seconds, and causes Ability damage to also refresh its duration.

4.name: Thick Skin
4.description: Using Darkflight grants 50 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks while in Worgen Form, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
4.longDescription: Using Darkflight grants 50 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks while in Worgen Form, reducing the damage taken by 50%.

4.name: Eyes in the Dark
4.description: Disengage grants Stealth for 3 seconds.
4.longDescription: Disengage grants Stealth for 3 seconds.

4.name: Insatiable
4.description: Inner Beast causes Basic Attacks to restore 10 Mana, and reduce the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 0.5 seconds.
4.longDescription: Inner Beast causes Basic Attacks to restore 10 Mana, and reduce the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Quicksilver Bullets
7.description: Increases Greymane's Human Basic Attack range by 1.1.
7.longDescription: Increases Greymane's Human Basic Attack range by 1.1.

7.name: Incendiary Elixir
7.description: Quest: Reduce the cooldown of Gilnean Cocktail by 2 seconds. Every time Greymane hits an enemy Hero with the explosion damage from Gilnean Cocktail, increase its explosion damage by 25, up to 375.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, the cooldown is reduced by an additional 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Quest: Reduce the cooldown of Gilnean Cocktail by 2 seconds. Every time Greymane hits an enemy Hero with the explosion damage from Gilnean Cocktail, increase its explosion damage by 25, up to 375.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, the cooldown is reduced by an additional 3 seconds.

7.name: Wizened Duelist
7.description: Quest: Every 6 Human Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Basic Attack damage by 1%, up to 30%. Worgen Basic Attacks grant credit for 3 Basic Attacks. Half of this bonus is lost upon death.
7.longDescription: Quest: Every 6 Human Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Basic Attack damage by 1%, up to 30%. Worgen Basic Attacks grant credit for 3 Basic Attacks. Half of this bonus is lost upon death.

10.name: Go for the Throat
10.description: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a Worgen, slashing for 355 (+4% per level) damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within 10 seconds for free.
10.longDescription: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a Worgen, slashing for 355 (+4% per level) damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within 10 seconds for free.

10.name: Cursed Bullet
10.description: Greymane shapeshifts into a Human and fires a bullet that hits the first enemy Hero in its path, dealing 35% of their current Health in damage.  Does not affect Vehicles.
10.longDescription: Greymane shapeshifts into a Human and fires a bullet that hits the first enemy Hero in its path, dealing 35% of their current Health in damage.  Does not affect Vehicles.

13.name: Running Wild
13.description: Increases Darkflight and Disengage's range by 35%, and reduce their cooldowns by 1 second.
13.longDescription: Increases Darkflight and Disengage's range by 35%, and reduce their cooldowns by 1 second.

13.name: Unfettered Assault
13.description: Increases Razor Swipe's lunge distance by 60%, and Worgen Basic Attacks reduce Razor Swipe's cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increases Razor Swipe's lunge distance by 60%, and Worgen Basic Attacks reduce Razor Swipe's cooldown by 1.5 seconds.

13.name: On the Prowl
13.description: Inner Beast increases Movement Speed by 30% once it has been active for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Inner Beast increases Movement Speed by 30% once it has been active for 3 seconds.

16.name: Eager Wolf
16.description: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Inner Beast by an additional 40% after it has been active for 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Inner Beast by an additional 40% after it has been active for 4 seconds.

16.name: Lord of His Pack
16.description: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Greymane's Basic Attack damage by 25% for 3 seconds, increased to 50% while in Worgen Form.
16.longDescription: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Greymane's Basic Attack damage by 25% for 3 seconds, increased to 50% while in Worgen Form.

16.name: Alpha Killer
16.description: Worgen Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 3% of the Hero's maximum Health.
16.longDescription: Worgen Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 3% of the Hero's maximum Health.

20.name: Unleashed
20.description: Passive: Go For The Throat's damage is increased by 25%.  If Go for the Throat kills its target, refund its Mana cost and reset the cooldowns of Greymane's Abilities.
20.longDescription: Passive: Go For The Throat's damage is increased by 25%.  If Go for the Throat kills its target, refund its Mana cost and reset the cooldowns of Greymane's Abilities.

20.name: Gilnean Roulette
20.description: Cursed Bullet's damage is reduced to 30% of current health but its cooldown is reduced by 24 seconds.
20.longDescription: Cursed Bullet's damage is reduced to 30% of current health but its cooldown is reduced by 24 seconds.

20.name: Hunter's Blunderbuss
20.description: Human Basic Attacks splash for 100% damage behind the target.
20.longDescription: Human Basic Attacks splash for 100% damage behind the target.

20.name: Tooth and Claw
20.description: Worgen Basic Attacks cleave for 100% damage. Increase Razor Swipe's damage by 100%.
20.longDescription: Worgen Basic Attacks cleave for 100% damage. Increase Razor Swipe's damage by 100%.

1.name: Thunderstroke
1.description: Increase the damage of Lightning Fury by 20.  Quest: Lightning Fury's damage is increased by 1.5 every time it hits a Hero.
1.longDescription: Increase the damage of Lightning Fury by 20.  Quest: Lightning Fury's damage is increased by 1.5 every time it hits a Hero.

1.name: Impale
1.description: Increase Fend's cast range and radius by 25%. It deals an additional 70% damage to enemies below 50% Health.
1.longDescription: Increase Fend's cast range and radius by 25%. It deals an additional 70% damage to enemies below 50% Health.

1.name: Charged Strikes
1.description: Gain 15% Attack Speed. Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 20% bonus damage and bounces to nearby enemy Heroes.
1.longDescription: Gain 15% Attack Speed. Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 20% bonus damage and bounces to nearby enemy Heroes.

4.name: Plate of the Whale
4.description: Regenerate 6 (+4% per level) Health per second while Avoidance is active. If fully charged, gain an additional 12 (+4% per level) Health per second.
4.longDescription: Regenerate 6 (+4% per level) Health per second while Avoidance is active. If fully charged, gain an additional 12 (+4% per level) Health per second.

4.name: Ring of the Leech
4.description: Basic Attacks against your primary target heal for 20% of their damage. If an enemy is Blinded, this also affects Lightning Fury and Fend.
4.longDescription: Basic Attacks against your primary target heal for 20% of their damage. If an enemy is Blinded, this also affects Lightning Fury and Fend.

4.name: Inner Light
4.description: Activate to heal for 25% of your maximum Health over 5 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit with Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by 10 seconds.
4.longDescription: Activate to heal for 25% of your maximum Health over 5 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit with Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by 10 seconds.

7.name: Grounding Rod
7.description: Enemies hit by Lightning Fury or Fend are Slowed by 20% for 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Enemies hit by Lightning Fury or Fend are Slowed by 20% for 2 seconds.

7.name: Seraph's Hymn
7.description: Basic Attacks against your primary enemy Hero grant 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Blinding Light by 2 seconds.  Passive: Increase the passive damage bonus of Blinding Light from 15% to 30%.
7.longDescription: Basic Attacks against your primary enemy Hero grant 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Blinding Light by 2 seconds.  Passive: Increase the passive damage bonus of Blinding Light from 15% to 30%.

7.name: Surge of Light
7.description: After taking 650 (+4% per level) damage with Avoidance active, Cassia can activate Avoidance to deal 220 (+4% per level) damage to enemies around her.
7.longDescription: After taking 650 (+4% per level) damage with Avoidance active, Cassia can activate Avoidance to deal 220 (+4% per level) damage to enemies around her.

10.name: Ball Lightning
10.description: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to 6 times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing 180 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit.
10.longDescription: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to 6 times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing 180 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit.

10.name: Valkyrie
10.description: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after 0.75 seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.
10.longDescription: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after 0.75 seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.

13.name: War Matron
13.description: Cassia becomes Protected while Channeling Fend and for an additional 1 second if the Channel is completed.
13.longDescription: Cassia becomes Protected while Channeling Fend and for an additional 1 second if the Channel is completed.

13.name: War Traveler
13.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed and Mounting is instant.
13.longDescription: Gain 5% Movement Speed. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed and Mounting is instant.

13.name: Gloves of Alacrity
13.description: Gain 1 Basic Attack range. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 1 Basic Attack range.
13.longDescription: Gain 1 Basic Attack range. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 1 Basic Attack range.

16.name: Power Strike
16.description: Lightning Fury pierces but only splits on Heroes. Enemy Heroes hit reduce its cooldown by 1 second and become marked for 15 seconds. Upon reaching 3 marks, remove them and cast a Blinding Light at their feet.
16.longDescription: Lightning Fury pierces but only splits on Heroes. Enemy Heroes hit reduce its cooldown by 1 second and become marked for 15 seconds. Upon reaching 3 marks, remove them and cast a Blinding Light at their feet.

16.name: Static Electricity
16.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Lightning Fury. Fend's impact launches a lightning bolt towards each nearby enemy Hero.
16.longDescription: Gain 2 additional charges of Lightning Fury. Fend's impact launches a lightning bolt towards each nearby enemy Hero.

16.name: Martial Law
16.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Increase this to 3% if they are Stunned, Rooted, Slowed, or Blinded.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Increase this to 3% if they are Stunned, Rooted, Slowed, or Blinded.

20.name: Infinite Lightning
20.description: Ball Lightning can now bounce indefinitely. Every bounce reduces its cooldown by 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Ball Lightning can now bounce indefinitely. Every bounce reduces its cooldown by 4 seconds.

20.name: Imprisoning Light
20.description: Upon impaling an enemy Hero, they are Blinded for 5 seconds and Cassia's Valkyrie creates a wave of light that deals 200 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. This wave Silences and Roots them for 3 seconds.
20.longDescription: Upon impaling an enemy Hero, they are Blinded for 5 seconds and Cassia's Valkyrie creates a wave of light that deals 200 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. This wave Silences and Roots them for 3 seconds.

20.name: Titan's Revenge
20.description: Cassia's Basic Attacks now ignore Armor and while Avoidance is fully charged, they deal an additional 20% bonus damage.
20.longDescription: Cassia's Basic Attacks now ignore Armor and while Avoidance is fully charged, they deal an additional 20% bonus damage.

20.name: Rockstopper
20.description: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to 60 for 4 seconds.   Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.
20.longDescription: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to 60 for 4 seconds.   Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.

1.name: Impaling Light
1.description: Celestial Charge deals 150% more damage to Heroes, reduced by 25% for each additional Hero hit. For each Valorous Brand on the target when Celestial Charge's Stun completes, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce Celestial Charge's cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and its Mana cost from 40 to 30.
1.longDescription: Celestial Charge deals 150% more damage to Heroes, reduced by 25% for each additional Hero hit. For each Valorous Brand on the target when Celestial Charge's Stun completes, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce Celestial Charge's cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and its Mana cost from 40 to 30.

1.name: Consuming Flame
1.description: Increase the center damage of Solarion's Fire by an additional 125% and its Slow amount by 15%. The first enemy Hero hit with Solarion's Fire restores 30 Mana.
1.longDescription: Increase the center damage of Solarion's Fire by an additional 125% and its Slow amount by 15%. The first enemy Hero hit with Solarion's Fire restores 30 Mana.

1.name: Burn The Impure
1.description: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark deals bonus damage equal to 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.
1.longDescription: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark deals bonus damage equal to 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.

4.name: Sovereign Armor
4.description: Molten Armor grants 20 Armor for 1.5 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Molten Armor extends the duration of this Armor by 0.5 seconds.
4.longDescription: Molten Armor grants 20 Armor for 1.5 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Molten Armor extends the duration of this Armor by 0.5 seconds.

4.name: Battle Hunger
4.description: Increase the healing of Valorous Brand by 80%.
4.longDescription: Increase the healing of Valorous Brand by 80%.

4.name: Press Forward
4.description: Gain 10 Armor while being healed by a Regeneration Globe. Damaging an enemy Hero sets the duration of an active Regeneration Globe on Imperius to 8 seconds (unless it is already higher).
4.longDescription: Gain 10 Armor while being healed by a Regeneration Globe. Damaging an enemy Hero sets the duration of an active Regeneration Globe on Imperius to 8 seconds (unless it is already higher).

7.name: Flash of Anger
7.description: Consuming a mark from Celestial Charge deals 150 (+4% per level) damage to the target and nearby enemies and grants Imperius a 250 (+4% per level) point Shield for 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: Consuming a mark from Celestial Charge deals 150 (+4% per level) damage to the target and nearby enemies and grants Imperius a 250 (+4% per level) point Shield for 4 seconds.

7.name: Blaze of Glory
7.description: Solarion's Fire leaves a line of scorched earth along its center that explodes after 1.75 seconds for 212 (+4% per level) damage, dealing bonus damage with Valorous Brand marks.
7.longDescription: Solarion's Fire leaves a line of scorched earth along its center that explodes after 1.75 seconds for 212 (+4% per level) damage, dealing bonus damage with Valorous Brand marks.

7.name: Holy Fervor
7.description: Activate to reset Imperius's Basic Attack cooldown and cause the next 4 Basic Attacks within 10 seconds to cleave for 30% additional damage.
7.longDescription: Activate to reset Imperius's Basic Attack cooldown and cause the next 4 Basic Attacks within 10 seconds to cleave for 30% additional damage.

10.name: Angelic Armaments
10.description: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants 850 (+4% per level) Shield for 3 seconds.  If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within 5 seconds to launch 6 swords toward an area, each dealing 140 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit.
10.longDescription: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants 850 (+4% per level) Shield for 3 seconds.  If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within 5 seconds to launch 6 swords toward an area, each dealing 140 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit.

10.name: Wrath of the Angiris
10.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.  After 2 seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage to them, increased by 20% for each Valorous Brand on the target when landing, and Stunning them for 1 second.
10.longDescription: After 0.75 seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.  After 2 seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage to them, increased by 20% for each Valorous Brand on the target when landing, and Stunning them for 1 second.

13.name: Pathetic Mortals
13.description: Stunning enemy Heroes with Celestial Charge reduces their Movement Speed by 25% and their damage by 50% for 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Stunning enemy Heroes with Celestial Charge reduces their Movement Speed by 25% and their damage by 50% for 4 seconds.

13.name: Divine Rage
13.description: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark reduces the cooldown of Molten Armor by 1 second.
13.longDescription: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark reduces the cooldown of Molten Armor by 1 second.

13.name: Heat of Battle
13.description: Increase Molten Armor's healing against Heroes by 2% for every 1% Health Imperius is missing.
13.longDescription: Increase Molten Armor's healing against Heroes by 2% for every 1% Health Imperius is missing.

16.name: Celestial Swiftness
16.description: Gain 20% Movement Speed for 5 seconds after casting Celestial Charge. Gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds for each Hero Stunned with Celestial Charge.
16.longDescription: Gain 20% Movement Speed for 5 seconds after casting Celestial Charge. Gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds for each Hero Stunned with Celestial Charge.

16.name: Melting Touch
16.description: Consuming a Molten Armor mark reduces the target's Armor by 25 for 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Consuming a Molten Armor mark reduces the target's Armor by 25 for 4 seconds.

16.name: Valorous Pursuit
16.description: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds.

20.name: Heavenly Host
20.description: Shields granted by Angelic Armaments no longer expire, and on initial activation, nearby allied Heroes gain a Shield that absorbs 600 (+4% per level) damage.  If a Shield granted to an allied Hero lasts 3 seconds, it fires 1 sword at a nearby enemy, prioritizing closest Heroes, dealing 140 (+4% per level) damage.
20.longDescription: Shields granted by Angelic Armaments no longer expire, and on initial activation, nearby allied Heroes gain a Shield that absorbs 600 (+4% per level) damage.  If a Shield granted to an allied Hero lasts 3 seconds, it fires 1 sword at a nearby enemy, prioritizing closest Heroes, dealing 140 (+4% per level) damage.

20.name: Unrelenting Descent
20.description: Descending from the Heavens restores 30% of Imperius' maximum Health and Mana. Consuming a Valorous Brand reduces the cooldown of Wrath of the Angiris by 10 seconds.
20.longDescription: Descending from the Heavens restores 30% of Imperius' maximum Health and Mana. Consuming a Valorous Brand reduces the cooldown of Wrath of the Angiris by 10 seconds.

20.name: Molten Wrath
20.description: Molten Armor's radius is increased by 25%, and it always strikes 2 additional targets, even if there are Heroes in range.
20.longDescription: Molten Armor's radius is increased by 25%, and it always strikes 2 additional targets, even if there are Heroes in range.

20.name: Brand of Solarion
20.description: Reduce the duration of Valorous Brand to 5 seconds, but it is no longer consumed when triggered.
20.longDescription: Reduce the duration of Valorous Brand to 5 seconds, but it is no longer consumed when triggered.

20.name: Impervious
20.description: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Hitting Heroes with the center of Solarion's Fire reduces this cooldown by 5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Hitting Heroes with the center of Solarion's Fire reduces this cooldown by 5 seconds.

1.name: Widowmakers
1.description: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by 25% for 1 second.  Reward: After Corpse Spiders attack Heroes 100 times, their attack damage is increased by 25% and their duration is increased by 1 second.
1.longDescription: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by 25% for 1 second.  Reward: After Corpse Spiders attack Heroes 100 times, their attack damage is increased by 25% and their duration is increased by 1 second.

1.name: Pandemic
1.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Plague of Toads.  Reward: After hitting 35 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it spawns 2 additional toads.  Reward: After hitting 70 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it reduces the damage Heroes deal by 5%, stacking up to 25%.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit Heroes with Plague of Toads.  Reward: After hitting 35 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it spawns 2 additional toads.  Reward: After hitting 70 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it reduces the damage Heroes deal by 5%, stacking up to 25%.

1.name: Thing of the Deep
1.description: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 20%.  Reward: After gaining 50 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain 5% Spell Power.  Reward: After gaining 100 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain an additional 5% Spell Power.
1.longDescription: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 20%.  Reward: After gaining 50 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain 5% Spell Power.  Reward: After gaining 100 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain an additional 5% Spell Power.

4.name: Hexed Crawlers
4.description: Corpse Spiders restore 1% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana when they attack an enemy Hero.
4.longDescription: Corpse Spiders restore 1% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana when they attack an enemy Hero.

4.name: Big Voodoo
4.description: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by 100%.
4.longDescription: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by 100%.

4.name: Blood Ritual
4.description: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore 2% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana.  Passive: Takedowns grant 3 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.
4.longDescription: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore 2% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana.  Passive: Takedowns grant 3 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.

7.name: Spirit of Arachyr
7.description: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from 3 to 4. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.
7.longDescription: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from 3 to 4. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.

7.name: Dead Rush
7.description: Zombie Wall deals 100% more damage. When it expires up to 5 remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies, losing Health over 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Zombie Wall deals 100% more damage. When it expires up to 5 remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies, losing Health over 3 seconds.

7.name: Toads of Hugeness
7.description: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by 25% after each hop, up to a maximum of 100%.
7.longDescription: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by 25% after each hop, up to a maximum of 100%.

10.name: Gargantuan
10.description: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over 29 seconds. Deals 100 (+4% per level) damage when summoned, attacks for 140 (+4% per level) damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 240 (+4% per level) damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.
10.longDescription: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over 29 seconds. Deals 100 (+4% per level) damage when summoned, attacks for 140 (+4% per level) damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 240 (+4% per level) damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.

10.name: Ravenous Spirit
10.description: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 (+4% per level) damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.
10.longDescription: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 (+4% per level) damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.

13.name: Guardian Toads
13.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, stacking up to 6 seconds.
13.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, stacking up to 6 seconds.

13.name: Superstition
13.description: Gain 40 Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for 3 seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.
13.longDescription: Gain 40 Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for 3 seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.

13.name: Ice Block
13.description: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds.

16.name: Spider Colony
16.description: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 0.125 seconds.
16.longDescription: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 0.125 seconds.

16.name: Ring of Poison
16.description: Zombie Wall lasts 1 second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of 319 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.
16.longDescription: Zombie Wall lasts 1 second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of 319 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.

16.name: Soul Harvest
16.description: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by 7% for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of 35%. Lasts 15 seconds.
16.longDescription: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by 7% for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of 35%. Lasts 15 seconds.

20.name: Humongoid
20.description: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by 25% and its Slow amount is increased to 50%.  Passive: Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by 40 seconds and its Mana cost by 50%.
20.longDescription: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by 25% and its Slow amount is increased to 50%.  Passive: Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by 40 seconds and its Mana cost by 50%.

20.name: Annihilating Spirit
20.description: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by 50% for 1 second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by 5% for the rest of its duration.  Passive: Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by 50%.
20.longDescription: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by 50% for 1 second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by 5% for the rest of its duration.  Passive: Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by 50%.

20.name: Vile Infection
20.description: Quest: Reach 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.  Reward: After reaching 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, it can also be applied to Heroes and its damage is increased from 67 (+4% per level) to 167 (+4% per level) over 6 seconds.
20.longDescription: Quest: Reach 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.  Reward: After reaching 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, it can also be applied to Heroes and its damage is increased from 67 (+4% per level) to 167 (+4% per level) over 6 seconds.

20.name: Bad Medicine
20.description: Consume 5 stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain 20% increased Movement Speed, and 50 Armor for 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Consume 5 stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain 20% increased Movement Speed, and 50 Armor for 2 seconds.

1.name: Convection
1.description: Repeatable Quest: Hit 20 enemy Heroes with Flamestrike without dying.  Repeatable Reward: Permanently increases Flamestrike damage by 200, and Kael'thas's maximum Health by 100.
1.longDescription: Repeatable Quest: Hit 20 enemy Heroes with Flamestrike without dying.  Repeatable Reward: Permanently increases Flamestrike damage by 200, and Kael'thas's maximum Health by 100.

1.name: Fel Infusion
1.description: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by 4%. Kael'thas heals for 94 (+4% per level) Health when activating Verdant Spheres.
1.longDescription: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by 4%. Kael'thas heals for 94 (+4% per level) Health when activating Verdant Spheres.

1.name: Mana Addict
1.description: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.
1.longDescription: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.

4.name: Nether Wind
4.description: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by 30%. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund 80 Mana.
4.longDescription: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by 30%. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund 80 Mana.

4.name: Energy Roil
4.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by 70. If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
4.longDescription: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by 70. If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.

4.name: Mana Tap
4.description: Activating Verdant Spheres restores 5% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.
4.longDescription: Activating Verdant Spheres restores 5% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.

7.name: Burned Flesh
7.description: When Flamestrike damages 2 or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to 8% of their maximum Health.
7.longDescription: When Flamestrike damages 2 or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to 8% of their maximum Health.

7.name: Sun King's Fury
7.description: Living Bombs that have spread to enemy Heroes deal 35% more damage.
7.longDescription: Living Bombs that have spread to enemy Heroes deal 35% more damage.

7.name: Sunfire Enchantment
7.description: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next 2 Basic Attacks to instead deal 115 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
7.longDescription: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next 2 Basic Attacks to instead deal 115 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.

10.name: Phoenix
10.description: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 (+4% per level) damage and splashing for 42 (+4% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 (+4% per level) damage and splashing for 42 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: Pyroblast
10.description: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 (+5% per level) damage to an enemy Hero and 405 (+5% per level) damage to enemies nearby.
10.longDescription: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 (+5% per level) damage to an enemy Hero and 405 (+5% per level) damage to enemies nearby.

13.name: Pyromaniac
13.description: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by 0.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Backdraft
13.description: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.

13.name: Fission Bomb
13.description: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by 20%.
13.longDescription: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by 20%.

16.name: Fury of the Sunwell
16.description: Flamestrike will explode a second time 1.5 seconds later.
16.longDescription: Flamestrike will explode a second time 1.5 seconds later.

16.name: Ignite
16.description: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.
16.longDescription: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.

16.name: Twin Spheres
16.description: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.  Passive: Kael'thas benefits from all of his level 7 talents.
16.longDescription: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.  Passive: Kael'thas benefits from all of his level 7 talents.

20.name: Rebirth
20.description: Increases Phoenix duration by 100%. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores 3 charges.
20.longDescription: Increases Phoenix duration by 100%. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores 3 charges.

20.name: Presence Of Mind
20.description: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by 50%. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by 10 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by 50%. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by 10 seconds.

20.name: Master of Flames
20.description: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.
20.longDescription: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.

20.name: Flamethrower
20.description: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by 40%. If Flamestrike hits 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by 40%. If Flamestrike hits 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.

1.name: Pursuit of Flame
1.description: Quest: Hit 30 enemy Heroes with Fel Flame without dying.  Reward: Permanently increase Fel Flame's area by 33%.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit 30 enemy Heroes with Fel Flame without dying.  Reward: Permanently increase Fel Flame's area by 33%.

1.name: Chaotic Energy
1.description: Increases the cast range of Drain Life by 25%, and Regen Globes heal for 50% more.  Quest: Gather 15 Regen Globes.  Reward: Basic Ability Mana costs are permanently reduced by 20.
1.longDescription: Increases the cast range of Drain Life by 25%, and Regen Globes heal for 50% more.  Quest: Gather 15 Regen Globes.  Reward: Basic Ability Mana costs are permanently reduced by 20.

1.name: Echoed Corruption
1.description: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Corruption.  Reward: After hitting 40 heroes, Corruption gains new functionality. After the third strike, Corruption strikes 3 times in the opposite direction.  Pinnacle Reward: After 85 hits, Corruption heals for 100% of the damage dealt.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Corruption.  Reward: After hitting 40 heroes, Corruption gains new functionality. After the third strike, Corruption strikes 3 times in the opposite direction.  Pinnacle Reward: After 85 hits, Corruption heals for 100% of the damage dealt.

4.name: Health Funnel
4.description: Drain Life's cooldown recharges 100% faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.
4.longDescription: Drain Life's cooldown recharges 100% faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.

4.name: Improved Life Tap
4.description: Increase the Mana restored by Life Tap to 40%.
4.longDescription: Increase the Mana restored by Life Tap to 40%.

4.name: Consume Soul
4.description: Instantly kill an enemy Minion and heal for 365 (+4% per level) Health.  Stores up to 3 charges.
4.longDescription: Instantly kill an enemy Minion and heal for 365 (+4% per level) Health.  Stores up to 3 charges.

7.name: Bound by Shadow
7.description: Each enemy Hero hit with Fel Flame reduces the cooldown of Corruption by 1.75 seconds.
7.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit with Fel Flame reduces the cooldown of Corruption by 1.75 seconds.

7.name: Curse of Exhaustion
7.description: Drain Life deals 50% more damage and Slows the target's Movement Speed by 40%.
7.longDescription: Drain Life deals 50% more damage and Slows the target's Movement Speed by 40%.

7.name: Hunger for Power
7.description: Increases Spell Power by 15% but reduces healing received from allies by 25%.
7.longDescription: Increases Spell Power by 15% but reduces healing received from allies by 25%.

10.name: Horrify
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for 2 seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for 2 seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.

10.name: Rain of Destruction
10.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 (+4% per level) damage in a small area.
10.longDescription: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 (+4% per level) damage in a small area.

13.name: Fel Armor
13.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
13.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.

13.name: Harvest Life
13.description: Drain Life heals for 75% more Health when used on Heroes.
13.longDescription: Drain Life heals for 75% more Health when used on Heroes.

13.name: Dark Bargain
13.description: Gul'dan's maximum Health is permanently increased by 40% but his respawn time is increased by 10 seconds.
13.longDescription: Gul'dan's maximum Health is permanently increased by 40% but his respawn time is increased by 10 seconds.

13.name: Healthstone
13.description: Activate to heal for 25% of Gul'dan's maximum Health.
13.longDescription: Activate to heal for 25% of Gul'dan's maximum Health.

16.name: Rampant Hellfire
16.description: Fel Flame's damage is increased by 12% for 5 seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to 5 times.
16.longDescription: Fel Flame's damage is increased by 12% for 5 seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to 5 times.

16.name: Ruinous Affliction
16.description: Corruption deals an additional 70 (+4% per level) damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals 242 (+4% per level) damage.
16.longDescription: Corruption deals an additional 70 (+4% per level) damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals 242 (+4% per level) damage.

16.name: Darkness Within
16.description: Dealing 600 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Life Tap to cost no Health and grant Gul'dan 25% Spell Power for 5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Dealing 600 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Life Tap to cost no Health and grant Gul'dan 25% Spell Power for 5 seconds.

20.name: Haunt
20.description: Increases the duration of Horrify by 1 second, and while Feared, enemies lose 20 Armor, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
20.longDescription: Increases the duration of Horrify by 1 second, and while Feared, enemies lose 20 Armor, causing them to take 20% increased damage.

20.name: Deep Impact
20.description: Rain of Destruction Slows enemies Movement Speed by 90% for 0.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Rain of Destruction Slows enemies Movement Speed by 90% for 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Demonic Circle
20.description: Summon a Demonic Circle at Gul'dan's location. Activate to teleport Gul'dan to the Demonic Circle.
20.longDescription: Summon a Demonic Circle at Gul'dan's location. Activate to teleport Gul'dan to the Demonic Circle.

1.name: Sentinel Wisp
1.description: After remaining in a bush for 5 seconds, Wisp's vision radius is increased by 200% and reveals the surrounding area.
1.longDescription: After remaining in a bush for 5 seconds, Wisp's vision radius is increased by 200% and reveals the surrounding area.

1.name: Natural Perspective
1.description: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies for its duration.
1.longDescription: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies for its duration.

1.name: Hippity Hop
1.description: After not Basic Attacking or taking damage for 2 seconds, increase the Move Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness by 10%.
1.longDescription: After not Basic Attacking or taking damage for 2 seconds, increase the Move Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness by 10%.

4.name: Blossom Swell
4.description: Increases Noxious Blossom's cast range by 25%. and its radius by 20%. Blossom Swell applies 1 additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies hit.
4.longDescription: Increases Noxious Blossom's cast range by 25%. and its radius by 20%. Blossom Swell applies 1 additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies hit.

4.name: Nature's Culling
4.description: Increases Nature's Toxin's damage by 125% to non-Heroes.
4.longDescription: Increases Nature's Toxin's damage by 125% to non-Heroes.

4.name: Siphoning Toxin
4.description: While at least one enemy is afflicted by Nature's Toxin, heal for 9 (+4% per level) per second. When an enemy Hero has 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin, increase this healing by 19 (+4% per level) per second.
4.longDescription: While at least one enemy is afflicted by Nature's Toxin, heal for 9 (+4% per level) per second. When an enemy Hero has 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin, increase this healing by 19 (+4% per level) per second.

7.name: Splintered Spear
7.description: Casting Noxious Blossom grants Lunara 3 stacks of Splintered Spear. When Lunara uses her Basic Attack, it hits an additional enemy for each stack of Splintered Spear, consuming 1 stack for each target. Stores up to 3 stacks.  Splintered Spear deals 90 (+4% per level) damage, and applies Nature's Toxin.
7.longDescription: Casting Noxious Blossom grants Lunara 3 stacks of Splintered Spear. When Lunara uses her Basic Attack, it hits an additional enemy for each stack of Splintered Spear, consuming 1 stack for each target. Stores up to 3 stacks.  Splintered Spear deals 90 (+4% per level) damage, and applies Nature's Toxin.

7.name: Choking Pollen
7.description: Noxious Blossom deals 100% more damage to enemies afflicted by Nature's Toxin, increased to 175% against enemies with 3 stacks.
7.longDescription: Noxious Blossom deals 100% more damage to enemies afflicted by Nature's Toxin, increased to 175% against enemies with 3 stacks.

7.name: Wild Vigor
7.description: Using Crippling Spores increases the damage of Lunara's next 4 Basic Attacks by 70%.
7.longDescription: Using Crippling Spores increases the damage of Lunara's next 4 Basic Attacks by 70%.

10.name: Thornwood Vine
10.description: Send forth vines that deal 184 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in a line.  Stores up to 3 charges.
10.longDescription: Send forth vines that deal 184 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in a line.  Stores up to 3 charges.

10.name: Leaping Strike
10.description: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by 80% for 0.35 seconds and dealing 271 (+4% per level) damage.  Stores up to 2 charges.
10.longDescription: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by 80% for 0.35 seconds and dealing 271 (+4% per level) damage.  Stores up to 2 charges.

13.name: Endless Spores
13.description: Casting Crippling Spores while at least 2 Heroes are afflicted by Nature's Toxin reduces the cooldown by 4 seconds and refunds 50 Mana.
13.longDescription: Casting Crippling Spores while at least 2 Heroes are afflicted by Nature's Toxin reduces the cooldown by 4 seconds and refunds 50 Mana.

13.name: Let Them Wither
13.description: Increases Crippling Spores' Slow duration by 1 second and causes it to no longer decay.
13.longDescription: Increases Crippling Spores' Slow duration by 1 second and causes it to no longer decay.

13.name: Greater Spell Shield
13.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 75 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
13.longDescription: Every 30 seconds, gain 75 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

13.name: Abolish Magic
13.description: Target an ally to remove all damage over time and disabling effects from them and Lunara. For 2 seconds after, the duration of disabling effects is reduced by 50%.
13.longDescription: Target an ally to remove all damage over time and disabling effects from them and Lunara. For 2 seconds after, the duration of disabling effects is reduced by 50%.

16.name: Accelerated Contamination
16.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Noxious Blossom from 60 to 40. While at least 1 enemy Hero is afflicted with Nature's Toxin, Noxious Blossom's cooldown recharges 75% faster.
16.longDescription: Reduce the Mana cost of Noxious Blossom from 60 to 40. While at least 1 enemy Hero is afflicted with Nature's Toxin, Noxious Blossom's cooldown recharges 75% faster.

16.name: Star Wood Spear
16.description: Increase Lunara's Basic Attack range by 0.5. Using Crippling Spores increases Lunara's Basic Attack range by an additional 2.25 for 6 seconds.
16.longDescription: Increase Lunara's Basic Attack range by 0.5. Using Crippling Spores increases Lunara's Basic Attack range by an additional 2.25 for 6 seconds.

16.name: Invigorating Spores
16.description: Crippling Spores grants 30% Attack Speed for 6 seconds. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin deal damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.
16.longDescription: Crippling Spores grants 30% Attack Speed for 6 seconds. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin deal damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.

16.name: Unfair Advantage
16.description: Nature's Toxin deals 60% more damage to Heroes that are Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.
16.longDescription: Nature's Toxin deals 60% more damage to Heroes that are Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.

20.name: For the Wildlands
20.description: Thornwood Vine shoots 4 additional vines in an arc.
20.longDescription: Thornwood Vine shoots 4 additional vines in an arc.

20.name: Boundless Stride
20.description: All Leaping Strike charges are returned every 15 seconds. Leaping Strike can be used on allies.
20.longDescription: All Leaping Strike charges are returned every 15 seconds. Leaping Strike can be used on allies.

20.name: Forest's Wrath
20.description: Lunara's Heroic Ability applies 1 additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies, and its range is increased by 30%.  Passive: Increase Lunara's vision radius by 35%.
20.longDescription: Lunara's Heroic Ability applies 1 additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies, and its range is increased by 30%.  Passive: Increase Lunara's vision radius by 35%.

20.name: Intensifying Toxin
20.description: At 3 stacks, Nature's Toxin deals 40% more damage.
20.longDescription: At 3 stacks, Nature's Toxin deals 40% more damage.

20.name: Galloping Gait
20.description: Activate to increase the Movement Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness to 80% for 6 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to increase the Movement Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness to 80% for 6 seconds.

1.name: Volatile Acid
1.description: Banelings can travel 50% further before exploding.
1.longDescription: Banelings can travel 50% further before exploding.

1.name: Corpse Feeders
1.description: Reduces the cooldown of Infested Drop by 3 seconds and Roachlings have 30% more Health.
1.longDescription: Reduces the cooldown of Infested Drop by 3 seconds and Roachlings have 30% more Health.

1.name: Infest
1.description: Nearby Ranged Minions deal an additional 100% damage, plus an additional 1% per 1000 Siege damage Zagara has dealt. Can be toggled on or off.
1.longDescription: Nearby Ranged Minions deal an additional 100% damage, plus an additional 1% per 1000 Siege damage Zagara has dealt. Can be toggled on or off.

4.name: Envenomed Spines
4.description: Activate to have Zagara's next Basic Attack apply 230 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds.
4.longDescription: Activate to have Zagara's next Basic Attack apply 230 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds.

4.name: Medusa Blades
4.description: Basic Attacks deal 33% damage to three nearby targets.
4.longDescription: Basic Attacks deal 33% damage to three nearby targets.

4.name: Serrated Spines
4.description: Quest: Each Basic Attack against a Hero increases Zagara's Attack Damage by 0.2%.
4.longDescription: Quest: Each Basic Attack against a Hero increases Zagara's Attack Damage by 0.2%.

7.name: Baneling Massacre
7.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Banelings Barrage, but increase its cooldown by 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Gain 2 additional charges of Banelings Barrage, but increase its cooldown by 2 seconds.

7.name: Viscous Acid
7.description: Banelings Slow enemies by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Banelings Slow enemies by 25% for 2.5 seconds.

7.name: Bile Drop
7.description: Quest: Passively increases the radius of Infested Drop by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 12 Heroes with Infested Drop, it spawns an additional Roachling.
7.longDescription: Quest: Passively increases the radius of Infested Drop by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 12 Heroes with Infested Drop, it spawns an additional Roachling.

10.name: Devouring Maw
10.description: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 (+4% per level) damage per second.  Usable on Unstoppable enemies.
10.longDescription: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 (+4% per level) damage per second.  Usable on Unstoppable enemies.

10.name: Nydus Network
10.description: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second.  Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time.  Passive: Creep spreads 15% farther.  Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.
10.longDescription: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second.  Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time.  Passive: Creep spreads 15% farther.  Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.

13.name: Hydralisk Transfusion
13.description: Zagara is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Hunter Killers' Basic Attacks to Heroes.
13.longDescription: Zagara is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Hunter Killers' Basic Attacks to Heroes.

13.name: Protective Coating
13.description: While on Creep, Zagara gains 20 Armor, taking 20% less damage.
13.longDescription: While on Creep, Zagara gains 20 Armor, taking 20% less damage.

13.name: Spell Shield
13.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
13.longDescription: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

16.name: Corrosive Saliva
16.description: When attacking Heroes, Hunter Killers and Roachlings deal additional damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.
16.longDescription: When attacking Heroes, Hunter Killers and Roachlings deal additional damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.

16.name: Mutalisk
16.description: Reduce the cooldown of Hunter Killer by -0 seconds. Hunter Killer now spawns a Mutalisk. Mutalisks have a bounce attack, lose Health over 42 seconds, and have 420 (+4.5% per level) Health.
16.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Hunter Killer by -0 seconds. Hunter Killer now spawns a Mutalisk. Mutalisks have a bounce attack, lose Health over 42 seconds, and have 420 (+4.5% per level) Health.

16.name: Jagged Barbs
16.description: While on Creep, Zagara gains 50% more Basic Attack damage and her attack range is increased by 1.1.
16.longDescription: While on Creep, Zagara gains 50% more Basic Attack damage and her attack range is increased by 1.1.

20.name: Tyrant Maw
20.description: Devouring Maw deals 50% more damage. Takedowns reduce its cooldown by 25 seconds.
20.longDescription: Devouring Maw deals 50% more damage. Takedowns reduce its cooldown by 25 seconds.

20.name: Endless Creep
20.description: Increase Creep Tumor's cast range from 2.5 to 50. Creep Tumors now last 600 seconds. While on Creep, Zagara gains an additional 10% Movement Speed.
20.longDescription: Increase Creep Tumor's cast range from 2.5 to 50. Creep Tumors now last 600 seconds. While on Creep, Zagara gains an additional 10% Movement Speed.

20.name: Broodmother
20.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack also launches a Baneling towards the target.  Passive: Gain 20% bonus Attack Speed.
20.longDescription: Every 3rd Basic Attack also launches a Baneling towards the target.  Passive: Gain 20% bonus Attack Speed.

20.name: Pack Instinct
20.description: Zagara and her summons deal 20% more damage to enemies attacked by a Hunter Killer in the last 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Zagara and her summons deal 20% more damage to enemies attacked by a Hunter Killer in the last 2 seconds.

1.name: Fish Eye
1.description: Spawning from his Egg increases Murky's mount speed to 45% for 5 seconds.  Passive: Increase the Egg's Health and Shields by 100%, its sight radius by 300%, and it reveals all enemies in its sight radius.
1.longDescription: Spawning from his Egg increases Murky's mount speed to 45% for 5 seconds.  Passive: Increase the Egg's Health and Shields by 100%, its sight radius by 300%, and it reveals all enemies in its sight radius.

1.name: Shell Game
1.description: Murky can now place 2 eggs and will randomly revive from them, however, the cooldown of placing an egg is increased by 15 seconds.
1.longDescription: Murky can now place 2 eggs and will randomly revive from them, however, the cooldown of placing an egg is increased by 15 seconds.

1.name: A Fishy Deal
1.description: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use 8 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 32 stacks of Bribe.
1.longDescription: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use 8 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 32 stacks of Bribe.

4.name: Slime Time
4.description: Quest: Slime enemy Heroes that are already Slimed.  Reward: After Sliming 10 Heroes, increase Slime's bonus damage by 125.  Reward: After Sliming 20 Heroes, increase Slime's slow amount to 30%.
4.longDescription: Quest: Slime enemy Heroes that are already Slimed.  Reward: After Sliming 10 Heroes, increase Slime's bonus damage by 125.  Reward: After Sliming 20 Heroes, increase Slime's slow amount to 30%.

4.name: Tufferfish
4.description: Pufferfish gains 50 Spell Armor and deals 50% more damage to Slimed targets.
4.longDescription: Pufferfish gains 50 Spell Armor and deals 50% more damage to Slimed targets.

4.name: Living the Dream
4.description: Quest: Every 15 seconds Murky is alive, he gains 5% Spell Power, up to 25%. This bonus is reset upon his death.
4.longDescription: Quest: Every 15 seconds Murky is alive, he gains 5% Spell Power, up to 25%. This bonus is reset upon his death.

7.name: Black Lagoon
7.description: Increase Slime's radius by 30%.
7.longDescription: Increase Slime's radius by 30%.

7.name: Slippery When Wet
7.description: Gain 50% Movement Speed and move through units while in Safety Bubble. Additionally, Safety Bubble's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Gain 50% Movement Speed and move through units while in Safety Bubble. Additionally, Safety Bubble's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

7.name: Time to Krill
7.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 7 (+4% per level) damage a second and slow the target by 7% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.
7.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 7 (+4% per level) damage a second and slow the target by 7% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

10.name: March of the Murlocs
10.description: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 (+4% per level) damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.
10.longDescription: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 (+4% per level) damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.

10.name: Octo-Grab
10.description: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.
10.longDescription: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.

13.name: Rejuvenating Bubble
13.description: Safety Bubble restores 40% of Murky's maximum Health.
13.longDescription: Safety Bubble restores 40% of Murky's maximum Health.

13.name: Egg Shell
13.description: Upon casting Spawn Egg, or when one of his eggs is killed, Murky gains a Shield for an amount equal to 35% of Murky's current Health.
13.longDescription: Upon casting Spawn Egg, or when one of his eggs is killed, Murky gains a Shield for an amount equal to 35% of Murky's current Health.

13.name: Fish Tank
13.description: Murky is healed for 20% of the damage he deals with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities.
13.longDescription: Murky is healed for 20% of the damage he deals with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities.

16.name: Toxic Buildup
16.description: Every 3rd consecutive Basic Attack against an enemy Hero causes a free Slime to be cast upon them.
16.longDescription: Every 3rd consecutive Basic Attack against an enemy Hero causes a free Slime to be cast upon them.

16.name: Fish Oil
16.description: The Pufferfish casts Slime at its location upon landing.
16.longDescription: The Pufferfish casts Slime at its location upon landing.

16.name: Wrath of Cod
16.description: Heroes hit by Pufferfish take additional damage equal to 16% of their maximum Health over 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Heroes hit by Pufferfish take additional damage equal to 16% of their maximum Health over 4 seconds.

20.name: Never-Ending Murlocs
20.description: March of the Murlocs can be channeled, sending little Murlocs indefinitely. In addition, March of the Murlocs no longer deals reduced damage to structures.
20.longDescription: March of the Murlocs can be channeled, sending little Murlocs indefinitely. In addition, March of the Murlocs no longer deals reduced damage to structures.

20.name: ... And a Shark Too!
20.description: Increase the damage of Octo-Grab by 13700% (+4% per level).
20.longDescription: Increase the damage of Octo-Grab by 13700% (+4% per level).

20.name: Faster Fish
20.description: Pufferfish explodes 1.5 seconds faster.
20.longDescription: Pufferfish explodes 1.5 seconds faster.

20.name: Making Inky
20.description: Reduces the cooldown of Slime by 1.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Reduces the cooldown of Slime by 1.5 seconds.

1.name: Boneslicer
1.description: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.
1.longDescription: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.

1.name: Recklessness
1.description: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 10% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.
1.longDescription: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 10% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.

1.name: Headhunter
1.description: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2.5%.  Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.
1.longDescription: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2.5%.  Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.

4.name: Troll's Blood
4.description: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.
4.longDescription: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.

4.name: Voodoo Shuffle
4.description: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.  Passive: Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.
4.longDescription: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.  Passive: Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.

4.name: Amani Hide
4.description: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.
4.longDescription: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.

7.name: Vicious Assault
7.description: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.
7.longDescription: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.

7.name: Arcanite Axes
7.description: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by 0.75 every time it hits a Hero.
7.longDescription: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by 0.75 every time it hits a Hero.

7.name: Ferocity
7.description: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by 40%.
7.longDescription: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by 40%.

10.name: Taz'dingo!
10.description: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!
10.longDescription: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!

10.name: Guillotine
10.description: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.
10.longDescription: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.

13.name: Lacerate
13.description: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by 10% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by 10% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Eye of Zul'jin
13.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%.

13.name: Ensnare
13.description: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for 1.5 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to 10 seconds.
13.longDescription: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for 1.5 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to 10 seconds.

16.name: No Mercy!
16.description: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage.
16.longDescription: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage.

16.name: Wrong Place Wrong Time
16.description: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage and count as 5 Hero hits for You Want Axe?.
16.longDescription: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage and count as 5 Hero hits for You Want Axe?.

16.name: Let the Killing Begin
16.description: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by 5%, up to 40%, for 12 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.  Hero Takedowns instantly grant 40% Attack Speed.
16.longDescription: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by 5%, up to 40%, for 12 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.  Hero Takedowns instantly grant 40% Attack Speed.

20.name: Amani Resilience
20.description: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by 1 second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for 50% of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.
20.longDescription: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by 1 second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for 50% of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.

20.name: Buzzsaw
20.description: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing 75% damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.
20.longDescription: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing 75% damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.

20.name: Forest Medicine
20.description: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.
20.longDescription: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.

20.name: A Surprise For Ya
20.description: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for 50% damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for 50% damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.

1.name: Longshot
1.description: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.3.
1.longDescription: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.3.

1.name: Covert Ops
1.description: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.
1.longDescription: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.

1.name: Advanced Cloaking
1.description: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 6 Mana per second.
1.longDescription: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 6 Mana per second.

4.name: Rapid Projection
4.description: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.
4.longDescription: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.

4.name: Holo Stability
4.description: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.
4.longDescription: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.

4.name: Covert Mission
4.description: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.
4.longDescription: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.

7.name: Perfect Shot
7.description: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.
7.longDescription: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.

7.name: One in the Chamber
7.description: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.
7.longDescription: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.

7.name: Anti-Armor Shells
7.description: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 4 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.
7.longDescription: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 4 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.

10.name: Triple Tap
10.description: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 (+4% per level) damage each.
10.longDescription: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 (+4% per level) damage each.

10.name: Precision Strike
10.description: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
10.longDescription: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.

13.name: Psionic Efficiency
13.description: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.
13.longDescription: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.

13.name: Double Tap
13.description: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.

13.name: Ionic Force Field
13.description: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.
13.longDescription: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.

16.name: Explosive Round
16.description: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.
16.longDescription: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.

16.name: Crippling Shot
16.description: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
16.longDescription: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.

16.name: Lethal Decoy
16.description: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.
16.longDescription: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.

20.name: Fast Reload
20.description: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.
20.longDescription: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.

20.name: Precision Barrage
20.description: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
20.longDescription: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.

20.name: Apollo Suit
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.

20.name: Rewind
20.description: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
20.longDescription: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

1.name: Feast on Fear
1.description: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower heals Diablo for 10% of his maximum Health over 3 seconds.
1.longDescription: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower heals Diablo for 10% of his maximum Health over 3 seconds.

1.name: Devil's Due
1.description: Black Soulstone increases the effects of Regen Globes and Healing Fountains by 2.25% per Soul.
1.longDescription: Black Soulstone increases the effects of Regen Globes and Healing Fountains by 2.25% per Soul.

1.name: Soul Shield
1.description: Activate to gain 25 plus 50% of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by 1 second.
1.longDescription: Activate to gain 25 plus 50% of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by 1 second.

4.name: Sacrificial Soul
4.description: Stunning a Hero with Shadow Charge grants 10 Souls and 20 Armor for 3 seconds. While at 100 Souls, increase this Armor to 40.
4.longDescription: Stunning a Hero with Shadow Charge grants 10 Souls and 20 Armor for 3 seconds. While at 100 Souls, increase this Armor to 40.

4.name: Souls to the Flame
4.description: Fire Stomp grants 1 Soul every 3 times it damages an enemy Hero, and heals for an additional 1.3% of its damage dealt per Soul.
4.longDescription: Fire Stomp grants 1 Soul every 3 times it damages an enemy Hero, and heals for an additional 1.3% of its damage dealt per Soul.

4.name: Life Leech
4.description: Diablo gains 1 Soul and heals for 1.75% of his maximum Health when Basic Attacking an enemy Hero. While at 100 Souls, increase this healing to 3.5% of his maximum Health.
4.longDescription: Diablo gains 1 Soul and heals for 1.75% of his maximum Health when Basic Attacking an enemy Hero. While at 100 Souls, increase this healing to 3.5% of his maximum Health.

7.name: Eternal Flames
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Fire Stomp by 1 second. When Diablo Stuns an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower, reset the cooldown of Fire Stomp and restore 45 Mana.
7.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Fire Stomp by 1 second. When Diablo Stuns an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower, reset the cooldown of Fire Stomp and restore 45 Mana.

7.name: Malevolence
7.description: Basic Abilities cause Diablo's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal an additional 100 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. Stores up to 2 charges.
7.longDescription: Basic Abilities cause Diablo's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal an additional 100 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. Stores up to 2 charges.

7.name: Diabolical Momentum
7.description: When Diablo's Basic Attacks damage enemies, reduce the cooldown of Shadow Charge and Overpower by 1.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: When Diablo's Basic Attacks damage enemies, reduce the cooldown of Shadow Charge and Overpower by 1.5 seconds.

10.name: Apocalypse
10.description: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.75 seconds.
10.longDescription: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.75 seconds.

10.name: Lightning Breath
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%.  Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%.  Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.

13.name: Devastating Charge
13.description: Increase Shadow Charge's terrain collision damage by 50%.  Quest: Hit an enemy Hero against terrain 5 times.  Reward: Hitting enemy Heroes against terrain reduces their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase Shadow Charge's terrain collision damage by 50%.  Quest: Hit an enemy Hero against terrain 5 times.  Reward: Hitting enemy Heroes against terrain reduces their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.

13.name: Hellfire
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Fire Stomp grants 3% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%. While at maximum stacks, Diablo deals 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.
13.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Fire Stomp grants 3% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%. While at maximum stacks, Diablo deals 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

13.name: Cruelty
13.description: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower increases Diablo's Attack Speed by 50% for 7 seconds, up to 100%.
13.longDescription: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower increases Diablo's Attack Speed by 50% for 7 seconds, up to 100%.

16.name: Domination
16.description: Casting Overpower resets the cooldown of Shadow Charge.
16.longDescription: Casting Overpower resets the cooldown of Shadow Charge.

16.name: Debilitating Flames
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Fire Stomp are Slowed by 6% for 4 seconds, up to 60%. Heroes Slowed by 24% or more by Debilitating Flames deal 50% less damage.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Fire Stomp are Slowed by 6% for 4 seconds, up to 60%. Heroes Slowed by 24% or more by Debilitating Flames deal 50% less damage.

16.name: Overpowering Nightmare
16.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Overpower, with a 2 second cooldown between uses.
